authors_text: Jalees Nehvi,Vladislav Golyanik,Franziska Mueller,Hans-Peter Seidel,Mohamed Elgharib,Christian Theobalt
title: Differentiable Event Stream Simulator for Non-Rigid 3D Tracking
title_zh: 用于非刚性 3D 跟踪的可微分事件流模拟器
comment: In CVPR 2021 Workshop on Event-based Vision. Project page: http://gvv.mpi-inf.mpg.de/projects/Event-based_Non-rigid_3D_Tracking
comments: In CVPR 2021 Workshop on Event-based Vision. Project page: http://gvv.mpi-inf.mpg.de/projects/Event-based_Non-rigid_3D_Tracking
abstract: This paper introduces the first differentiable simulator of event streams, i.e., streams of asynchronous brightness change signals recorded by event cameras. Our differentiable simulator enables non-rigid 3D tracking of deformable objects (such as human hands, isometric surfaces and general watertight meshes) from event streams by leveraging an analysis-by-synthesis principle. So far, event-based tracking and reconstruction of non-rigid objects in 3D, like hands and body, has been either tackled using explicit event trajectories or large-scale datasets. In contrast, our method does not require any such processing or data, and can be readily applied to incoming event streams. We show the effectiveness of our approach for various types of non-rigid objects and compare to existing methods for non-rigid 3D tracking. In our experiments, the proposed energy-based formulations outperform competing RGB-based methods in terms of 3D errors. The source code and the new data are publicly available.
summary: This paper introduces the first differentiable simulator of event streams, i.e., streams of asynchronous brightness change signals recorded by event cameras. Our differentiable simulator enables non-rigid 3D tracking of deformable objects (such as human hands, isometric surfaces and general watertight meshes) from event streams by leveraging an analysis-by-synthesis principle. So far, event-based tracking and reconstruction of non-rigid objects in 3D, like hands and body, has been either tackled using explicit event trajectories or large-scale datasets. In contrast, our method does not require any such processing or data, and can be readily applied to incoming event streams. We show the effectiveness of our approach for various types of non-rigid objects and compare to existing methods for non-rigid 3D tracking. In our experiments, the proposed energy-based formulations outperform competing RGB-based methods in terms of 3D errors. The source code and the new data are publicly available.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了第一个事件流的可微模拟器，即事件摄像机记录的异步亮度变化信号流。我们的可微分模拟器利用综合分析原理，能够对事件流中的可变形对象（例如人手、等距表面和一般防水网格）进行非刚性 3D 跟踪。到目前为止，基于事件的跟踪和 3D 非刚性对象（例如手和身体）的重建已经使用显式事件轨迹或大规模数据集来解决。相反，我们的方法不需要任何此类处理或数据，并且可以轻松应用于传入的事件流。我们展示了我们的方法对于各种类型的非刚性物体的有效性，并与现有的非刚性 3D 跟踪方法进行了比较。在我们的实验中，所提出的基于能量的公式在 3D 误差方面优于基于 RGB 的竞争方法。源代码和新数据是公开的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出首个可微分事件流模拟器，用于实现无需显式事件轨迹或大规模数据集的非刚性3D物体跟踪。
AI.motivation: 现有非刚性3D跟踪方法依赖显式事件轨迹处理或大规模数据集，限制了实时性和适用性。
AI.method: 基于分析-合成原理构建可微分事件流模拟器，通过能量函数优化实现对可变形物体的3D重建与跟踪。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在3D误差指标上优于现有RGB基方法，适用于手部、人体等非刚性物体。
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法突破了传统事件相机处理限制，代码与数据集开源可促进非刚性3D跟踪研究。

title: Tightening the Biological Constraints on Gradient-Based Predictive Coding
title_zh: 加强基于梯度的预测编码的生物学约束
comment: This is a preprint of a published article. For final, published version see https://doi.org/10.1145/3477145.3477148
comments: This is a preprint of a published article. For final, published version see https://doi.org/10.1145/3477145.3477148
abstract: Predictive coding (PC) is a general theory of cortical function. The local, gradient-based learning rules found in one kind of PC model have recently been shown to closely approximate backpropagation. This finding suggests that this gradient-based PC model may be useful for understanding how the brain solves the credit assignment problem. The model may also be useful for developing local learning algorithms that are compatible with neuromorphic hardware. In this paper, we modify this PC model so that it better fits biological constraints, including the constraints that neurons can only have positive firing rates and the constraint that synapses only flow in one direction. We also compute the gradient-based weight and activity updates given the modified activity values. We show that, under certain conditions, these modified PC networks perform as well or nearly as well on MNIST data as the unmodified PC model and networks trained with backpropagation.
summary: Predictive coding (PC) is a general theory of cortical function. The local, gradient-based learning rules found in one kind of PC model have recently been shown to closely approximate backpropagation. This finding suggests that this gradient-based PC model may be useful for understanding how the brain solves the credit assignment problem. The model may also be useful for developing local learning algorithms that are compatible with neuromorphic hardware. In this paper, we modify this PC model so that it better fits biological constraints, including the constraints that neurons can only have positive firing rates and the constraint that synapses only flow in one direction. We also compute the gradient-based weight and activity updates given the modified activity values. We show that, under certain conditions, these modified PC networks perform as well or nearly as well on MNIST data as the unmodified PC model and networks trained with backpropagation.
abstract_zh: 预测编码（PC）是皮质功能的一般理论。最近表明，一种 PC 模型中基于梯度的局部学习规则非常接近反向传播。这一发现表明，这种基于梯度的 PC 模型可能有助于理解大脑如何解决学分分配问题。该模型还可用于开发与神经形态硬件兼容的本地学习算法。在本文中，我们修改了这个PC模型，使其更好地适应生物约束，包括神经元只能具有正放电率的约束和突触只能沿一个方向流动的约束。我们还计算基于梯度的权重和给定修改后的活动值的活动更新。我们表明，在某些条件下，这些修改后的 PC 网络在 MNIST 数据上的表现与未修改的 PC 模型和反向传播训练的网络一样好或几乎一样好。

AI.tldr: 本文修改了基于梯度的预测编码模型，以更好地符合生物约束条件，并验证其性能。
AI.motivation: 现有预测编码模型的梯度学习规则虽接近反向传播，但需满足生物约束（如神经元仅能正向放电、突触单向传递），以提升模型的生物合理性及在类脑硬件中的适用性。
AI.method: 对预测编码模型施加生物约束条件（正向放电率、单向突触传递），重新计算梯度权重与活动更新规则，并在MNIST数据集上进行性能测试。
AI.result: 在特定条件下，修改后的预测编码网络在MNIST任务上的表现与原始模型及反向传播训练的网络相当。
AI.conclusion: 生物约束下的预测编码模型可保持较高性能，为理解大脑信用分配机制及开发类脑硬件兼容算法提供新思路。

title: Explanation-Based Human Debugging of NLP Models: A Survey
title_zh: 基于解释的 NLP 模型人工调试：调查
comment: Accepted for publication at TACL. This version is a pre-MIT Press publication version
comments: Accepted for publication at TACL. This version is a pre-MIT Press publication version
abstract: Debugging a machine learning model is hard since the bug usually involves the training data and the learning process. This becomes even harder for an opaque deep learning model if we have no clue about how the model actually works. In this survey, we review papers that exploit explanations to enable humans to give feedback and debug NLP models. We call this problem explanation-based human debugging (EBHD). In particular, we categorize and discuss existing work along three dimensions of EBHD (the bug context, the workflow, and the experimental setting), compile findings on how EBHD components affect the feedback providers, and highlight open problems that could be future research directions.
summary: Debugging a machine learning model is hard since the bug usually involves the training data and the learning process. This becomes even harder for an opaque deep learning model if we have no clue about how the model actually works. In this survey, we review papers that exploit explanations to enable humans to give feedback and debug NLP models. We call this problem explanation-based human debugging (EBHD). In particular, we categorize and discuss existing work along three dimensions of EBHD (the bug context, the workflow, and the experimental setting), compile findings on how EBHD components affect the feedback providers, and highlight open problems that could be future research directions.
abstract_zh: 调试机器学习模型很困难，因为错误通常涉及训练数据和学习过程。如果我们不知道模型的实际工作原理，那么对于不透明的深度学习模型来说，这会变得更加困难。在这项调查中，我们回顾了利用解释使人类能够提供反馈和调试 NLP 模型的论文。我们将此问题称为基于解释的人工调试 (EBHD)。特别是，我们沿着 EBHD 的三个维度（错误背景、工作流程和实验设置）对现有工作进行分类和讨论，汇编有关 EBHD 组件如何影响反馈提供者的发现，并强调可能成为未来研究方向的开放问题。

AI.tldr: 综述利用模型解释辅助人类调试NLP模型的方法
AI.motivation: 深度学习模型的不透明性导致调试困难，需通过解释辅助人类理解与修正模型
AI.method: 按三个维度分类现有研究，总结EBHD组件对反馈者的影响，并指出开放问题
AI.result: 发现不同EBHD组件对反馈者的影响，如解释类型和交互方式对调试效率的影响
AI.conclusion: 需进一步研究更有效的解释生成方法及标准化评估框架

title: Stealthy Backdoors as Compression Artifacts
title_zh: 作为压缩工件的隐形后门
abstract: In a backdoor attack on a machine learning model, an adversary produces a model that performs well on normal inputs but outputs targeted misclassifications on inputs containing a small trigger pattern. Model compression is a widely-used approach for reducing the size of deep learning models without much accuracy loss, enabling resource-hungry models to be compressed for use on resource-constrained devices. In this paper, we study the risk that model compression could provide an opportunity for adversaries to inject stealthy backdoors. We design stealthy backdoor attacks such that the full-sized model released by adversaries appears to be free from backdoors (even when tested using state-of-the-art techniques), but when the model is compressed it exhibits highly effective backdoors. We show this can be done for two common model compression techniques -- model pruning and model quantization. Our findings demonstrate how an adversary may be able to hide a backdoor as a compression artifact, and show the importance of performing security tests on the models that will actually be deployed not their precompressed version.
summary: In a backdoor attack on a machine learning model, an adversary produces a model that performs well on normal inputs but outputs targeted misclassifications on inputs containing a small trigger pattern. Model compression is a widely-used approach for reducing the size of deep learning models without much accuracy loss, enabling resource-hungry models to be compressed for use on resource-constrained devices. In this paper, we study the risk that model compression could provide an opportunity for adversaries to inject stealthy backdoors. We design stealthy backdoor attacks such that the full-sized model released by adversaries appears to be free from backdoors (even when tested using state-of-the-art techniques), but when the model is compressed it exhibits highly effective backdoors. We show this can be done for two common model compression techniques -- model pruning and model quantization. Our findings demonstrate how an adversary may be able to hide a backdoor as a compression artifact, and show the importance of performing security tests on the models that will actually be deployed not their precompressed version.
abstract_zh: 在对机器学习模型的后门攻击中，攻击者生成的模型在正常输入上表现良好，但在包含小触发模式的输入上输出有针对性的错误分类。模型压缩是一种广泛使用的方法，可在不损失太多精度的情况下减小深度学习模型的大小，从而使资源匮乏的模型能够被压缩以在资源受限的设备上使用。在本文中，我们研究了模型压缩可能为对手注入隐形后门提供机会的风险。我们设计隐秘的后门攻击，使得对手发布的全尺寸模型似乎没有后门（即使使用最先进的技术进行测试），但当模型被压缩时，它会表现出高效的后门。我们证明这可以通过两种常见的模型压缩技术来完成——模型剪枝和模型量化。我们的研究结果展示了对手如何能够将后门隐藏为压缩工件，并显示了对实际部署的模型（而不是预压缩版本）执行安全测试的重要性。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了模型压缩技术可能被用于隐藏后门攻击的风险，并提出了通过模型压缩注入隐蔽后门的方法。
AI.motivation: 模型压缩广泛用于减少深度学习模型的大小，但其可能被恶意利用来隐藏后门攻击，从而威胁模型的安全性。
AI.method: 作者设计了一种隐蔽后门攻击方法，使得原始模型在测试时看起来没有后门，但经过压缩后会表现出高效的后门行为。该方法适用于两种常见的压缩技术：模型剪枝和模型量化。
AI.result: 实验表明，攻击者可以利用模型压缩技术将后门隐藏为压缩伪影，并且在压缩后的模型中后门表现非常有效。
AI.conclusion: 模型压缩可能成为后门攻击的隐蔽载体，因此部署前应直接对实际使用的模型进行安全性测试，而非压缩前的版本。

authors_text: François Darmon,Bénédicte Bascle,Jean-Clément Devaux,Pascal Monasse,Mathieu Aubry
title: Deep Multi-View Stereo gone wild
title_zh: 深度多视图立体变得狂野
abstract: Deep multi-view stereo (MVS) methods have been developed and extensively compared on simple datasets, where they now outperform classical approaches. In this paper, we ask whether the conclusions reached in controlled scenarios are still valid when working with Internet photo collections. We propose a methodology for evaluation and explore the influence of three aspects of deep MVS methods: network architecture, training data, and supervision. We make several key observations, which we extensively validate quantitatively and qualitatively, both for depth prediction and complete 3D reconstructions. First, complex unsupervised approaches cannot train on data in the wild. Our new approach makes it possible with three key elements: upsampling the output, softmin based aggregation and a single reconstruction loss. Second, supervised deep depthmap-based MVS methods are state-of-the art for reconstruction of few internet images. Finally, our evaluation provides very different results than usual ones. This shows that evaluation in uncontrolled scenarios is important for new architectures.
summary: Deep multi-view stereo (MVS) methods have been developed and extensively compared on simple datasets, where they now outperform classical approaches. In this paper, we ask whether the conclusions reached in controlled scenarios are still valid when working with Internet photo collections. We propose a methodology for evaluation and explore the influence of three aspects of deep MVS methods: network architecture, training data, and supervision. We make several key observations, which we extensively validate quantitatively and qualitatively, both for depth prediction and complete 3D reconstructions. First, complex unsupervised approaches cannot train on data in the wild. Our new approach makes it possible with three key elements: upsampling the output, softmin based aggregation and a single reconstruction loss. Second, supervised deep depthmap-based MVS methods are state-of-the art for reconstruction of few internet images. Finally, our evaluation provides very different results than usual ones. This shows that evaluation in uncontrolled scenarios is important for new architectures.
abstract_zh: 深度多视图立体（MVS）方法已经被开发出来，并在简单的数据集上进行了广泛的比较，现在它们的性能优于经典方法。在本文中，我们询问在受控场景中得出的结论在处理互联网照片集时是否仍然有效。我们提出了一种评估方法，并探讨了深度 MVS 方法三个方面的影响：网络架构、训练数据和监督。我们进行了几项关键观察，并在深度预测和完整 3D 重建方面广泛进行了定量和定性验证。首先，复杂的无监督方法无法在野外数据上进行训练。我们的新方法通过三个关键要素使之成为可能：对输出进行上采样、基于 softmin 的聚合和单个重建损失。其次，基于监督深度图的 MVS 方法是重建少数互联网图像的最先进方法。最后，我们的评估提供了与平常非常不同的结果。这表明不受控制的场景中的评估对于新架构非常重要。

AI.tldr: 评估深度多视图立体（MVS）方法在野外互联网图片数据集上的有效性
AI.motivation: 验证受控环境下表现优异的深度MVS方法在真实场景（如互联网照片）中的适用性，并探索影响其性能的关键因素
AI.method: 提出针对互联网图像的评估方法，分析网络结构、训练数据和监督机制的影响，通过上采样输出、软最小值聚合和单一重建损失改进无监督训练
AI.result: 复杂无监督方法无法处理野外数据，监督深度图MVS在少量互联网图像中表现最佳，评估结果显著不同于常规基准测试
AI.conclusion: 非控制场景下的评估对新架构设计至关重要，提出的改进方法有效解决了野外数据的深度重建挑战

title: Faster Meta Update Strategy for Noise-Robust Deep Learning
title_zh: 用于抗噪声深度学习的更快元更新策略
abstract: It has been shown that deep neural networks are prone to overfitting on biased training data. Towards addressing this issue, meta-learning employs a meta model for correcting the training bias. Despite the promising performances, super slow training is currently the bottleneck in the meta learning approaches. In this paper, we introduce a novel Faster Meta Update Strategy (FaMUS) to replace the most expensive step in the meta gradient computation with a faster layer-wise approximation. We empirically find that FaMUS yields not only a reasonably accurate but also a low-variance approximation of the meta gradient. We conduct extensive experiments to verify the proposed method on two tasks. We show our method is able to save two-thirds of the training time while still maintaining the comparable or achieving even better generalization performance. In particular, our method achieves the state-of-the-art performance on both synthetic and realistic noisy labels, and obtains promising performance on long-tailed recognition on standard benchmarks.
summary: It has been shown that deep neural networks are prone to overfitting on biased training data. Towards addressing this issue, meta-learning employs a meta model for correcting the training bias. Despite the promising performances, super slow training is currently the bottleneck in the meta learning approaches. In this paper, we introduce a novel Faster Meta Update Strategy (FaMUS) to replace the most expensive step in the meta gradient computation with a faster layer-wise approximation. We empirically find that FaMUS yields not only a reasonably accurate but also a low-variance approximation of the meta gradient. We conduct extensive experiments to verify the proposed method on two tasks. We show our method is able to save two-thirds of the training time while still maintaining the comparable or achieving even better generalization performance. In particular, our method achieves the state-of-the-art performance on both synthetic and realistic noisy labels, and obtains promising performance on long-tailed recognition on standard benchmarks.
abstract_zh: 事实证明，深度神经网络很容易对有偏差的训练数据过度拟合。为了解决这个问题，元学习采用元模型来纠正训练偏差。尽管性能很有前途，但超慢的训练目前是元学习方法的瓶颈。在本文中，我们引入了一种新颖的更快元更新策略（FaMUS），用更快的逐层近似代替元梯度计算中最昂贵的步骤。我们凭经验发现，FaMUS 不仅产生相当准确的元梯度，而且还产生低方差的元梯度近似值。我们进行了大量的实验来验证所提出的两个任务的方法。我们证明我们的方法能够节省三分之二的训练时间，同时仍然保持可比或实现更好的泛化性能。特别是，我们的方法在合成和现实噪声标签上都实现了最先进的性能，并在标准基准上的长尾识别上获得了有希望的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为FaMUS的更快元更新策略，旨在解决元学习中训练速度慢的问题，同时保持模型在噪声数据下的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 深度神经网络易受训练数据偏差影响，元学习虽能修正偏差但存在训练速度慢的瓶颈，需更高效的更新策略。
AI.method: 通过用层-wise近似替代元梯度计算中最耗时的步骤，提出FaMUS方法，降低计算复杂度。
AI.result: 实验表明，FaMUS节省了三分之二的训练时间，在合成与真实噪声标签数据及长尾识别任务中均达到或超越现有方法性能。
AI.conclusion: FaMUS在保证模型泛化能力的同时显著加速元学习过程，为噪声鲁棒深度学习提供高效解决方案。

motivation: 深度神经网络易受训练数据偏差影响，元学习虽能修正偏差但存在训练速度慢的瓶颈，需更高效的更新策略。
method: 通过用层-wise近似替代元梯度计算中最耗时的步骤，提出FaMUS方法，降低计算复杂度。

conclusion: FaMUS在保证模型泛化能力的同时显著加速元学习过程，为噪声鲁棒深度学习提供高效解决方案。
search_text: Faster Meta Update Strategy for Noise-Robust Deep Learning 用于抗噪声深度学习的更快元更新策略 It has been shown that deep neural networks are prone to overfitting on biased training data. Towards addressing this issue, meta-learning employs a meta model for correcting the training bias. Despite the promising performances, super slow training is currently the bottleneck in the meta learning approaches. In this paper, we introduce a novel Faster Meta Update Strategy (FaMUS) to replace the most expensive step in the meta gradient computation with a faster layer-wise approximation. We empirically find that FaMUS yields not only a reasonably accurate but also a low-variance approximation of the meta gradient. We conduct extensive experiments to verify the proposed method on two tasks. We show our method is able to save two-thirds of the training time while still maintaining the comparable or achieving even better generalization performance. In particular, our method achieves the state-of-the-art performance on both synthetic and realistic noisy labels, and obtains promising performance on long-tailed recognition on standard benchmarks. 事实证明，深度神经网络很容易对有偏差的训练数据过度拟合。为了解决这个问题，元学习采用元模型来纠正训练偏差。尽管性能很有前途，但超慢的训练目前是元学习方法的瓶颈。在本文中，我们引入了一种新颖的更快元更新策略（FaMUS），用更快的逐层近似代替元梯度计算中最昂贵的步骤。我们凭经验发现，FaMUS 不仅产生相当准确的元梯度，而且还产生低方差的元梯度近似值。我们进行了大量的实验来验证所提出的两个任务的方法。我们证明我们的方法能够节省三分之二的训练时间，同时仍然保持可比或实现更好的泛化性能。特别是，我们的方法在合成和现实噪声标签上都实现了最先进的性能，并在标准基准上的长尾识别上获得了有希望的性能。 本文提出一种名为FaMUS的更快元更新策略，旨在解决元学习中训练速度慢的问题，同时保持模型在噪声数据下的鲁棒性。 Youjiang Xu,Linchao Zhu,Lu Jiang,Yi Yang cs.LG,cs.CV

authors_text: Jean-Raphaël Gaglione,Daniel Neider,Rajarshi Roy,Ufuk Topcu,Zhe Xu
title: Learning Linear Temporal Properties from Noisy Data: A MaxSAT Approach
title_zh: 从噪声数据中学习线性时间属性：MaxSAT 方法
abstract: We address the problem of inferring descriptions of system behavior using Linear Temporal Logic (LTL) from a finite set of positive and negative examples. Most of the existing approaches for solving such a task rely on predefined templates for guiding the structure of the inferred formula. The approaches that can infer arbitrary LTL formulas, on the other hand, are not robust to noise in the data. To alleviate such limitations, we devise two algorithms for inferring concise LTL formulas even in the presence of noise. Our first algorithm infers minimal LTL formulas by reducing the inference problem to a problem in maximum satisfiability and then using off-the-shelf MaxSAT solvers to find a solution. To the best of our knowledge, we are the first to incorporate the usage of MaxSAT solvers for inferring formulas in LTL. Our second learning algorithm relies on the first algorithm to derive a decision tree over LTL formulas based on a decision tree learning algorithm. We have implemented both our algorithms and verified that our algorithms are efficient in extracting concise LTL descriptions even in the presence of noise.
summary: We address the problem of inferring descriptions of system behavior using Linear Temporal Logic (LTL) from a finite set of positive and negative examples. Most of the existing approaches for solving such a task rely on predefined templates for guiding the structure of the inferred formula. The approaches that can infer arbitrary LTL formulas, on the other hand, are not robust to noise in the data. To alleviate such limitations, we devise two algorithms for inferring concise LTL formulas even in the presence of noise. Our first algorithm infers minimal LTL formulas by reducing the inference problem to a problem in maximum satisfiability and then using off-the-shelf MaxSAT solvers to find a solution. To the best of our knowledge, we are the first to incorporate the usage of MaxSAT solvers for inferring formulas in LTL. Our second learning algorithm relies on the first algorithm to derive a decision tree over LTL formulas based on a decision tree learning algorithm. We have implemented both our algorithms and verified that our algorithms are efficient in extracting concise LTL descriptions even in the presence of noise.
abstract_zh: 我们解决了使用线性时序逻辑 (LTL) 从一组有限的正例和负例推断系统行为描述的问题。大多数解决此类任务的现有方法都依赖于预定义的模板来指导推断公式的结构。另一方面，可以推断任意 LTL 公式的方法对于数据中的噪声并不鲁棒。为了减轻这种限制，我们设计了两种算法，即使在存在噪声的情况下也能推断出简洁的 LTL 公式。我们的第一个算法通过将推理问题简化为最大可满足性问题，然后使用现成的 MaxSAT 求解器来找到解决方案，从而推断出最小 LTL 公式。据我们所知，我们是第一个使用 MaxSAT 求解器来推断 LTL 公式的公司。我们的第二个学习算法依赖于第一个算法，通过基于决策树学习算法的 LTL 公式导出决策树。我们已经实现了我们的算法，并验证了我们的算法即使在存在噪声的情况下也能有效地提取简洁的 LTL 描述。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于最大可满足性（MaxSAT）的方法，从带有噪声的数据中学习线性时序逻辑（LTL）公式，以推断系统行为描述。
AI.motivation: 现有方法或依赖预定义模板限制灵活性，或对噪声数据不鲁棒，需开发能处理噪声并生成简洁LTL公式的算法。
AI.method: 设计两种算法：第一种将LTL公式推断转化为MaxSAT问题求解；第二种基于决策树算法构建LTL公式决策树。
AI.result: 实现算法验证其在噪声数据下高效提取简洁LTL描述的能力，且为首次将MaxSAT应用于LTL公式推断。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过MaxSAT框架有效解决噪声数据下的LTL学习问题，为时序性质推断提供新思路。

title: Semantic Relation Preserving Knowledge Distillation for Image-to-Image Translation
title_zh: 用于图像到图像翻译的语义关系保留知识蒸馏
abstract: Generative adversarial networks (GANs) have shown significant potential in modeling high dimensional distributions of image data, especially on image-to-image translation tasks. However, due to the complexity of these tasks, state-of-the-art models often contain a tremendous amount of parameters, which results in large model size and long inference time. In this work, we propose a novel method to address this problem by applying knowledge distillation together with distillation of a semantic relation preserving matrix. This matrix, derived from the teacher's feature encoding, helps the student model learn better semantic relations. In contrast to existing compression methods designed for classification tasks, our proposed method adapts well to the image-to-image translation task on GANs. Experiments conducted on 5 different datasets and 3 different pairs of teacher and student models provide strong evidence that our methods achieve impressive results both qualitatively and quantitatively.
summary: Generative adversarial networks (GANs) have shown significant potential in modeling high dimensional distributions of image data, especially on image-to-image translation tasks. However, due to the complexity of these tasks, state-of-the-art models often contain a tremendous amount of parameters, which results in large model size and long inference time. In this work, we propose a novel method to address this problem by applying knowledge distillation together with distillation of a semantic relation preserving matrix. This matrix, derived from the teacher's feature encoding, helps the student model learn better semantic relations. In contrast to existing compression methods designed for classification tasks, our proposed method adapts well to the image-to-image translation task on GANs. Experiments conducted on 5 different datasets and 3 different pairs of teacher and student models provide strong evidence that our methods achieve impressive results both qualitatively and quantitatively.
abstract_zh: 生成对抗网络（GAN）在对图像数据的高维分布进行建模方面显示出巨大的潜力，特别是在图像到图像的翻译任务上。然而，由于这些任务的复杂性，最先进的模型通常包含大量参数，导致模型尺寸过大和推理时间过长。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新方法来解决这个问题，即应用知识蒸馏和语义关系保留矩阵的蒸馏。该矩阵源自教师的特征编码，有助于学生模型学习更好的语义关系。与现有的为分类任务设计的压缩方法相比，我们提出的方法很好地适应了 GAN 上的图像到图像的翻译任务。在 5 个不同的数据集和 3 个不同的教师和学生模型上进行的实验提供了强有力的证据，证明我们的方法在定性和定量上都取得了令人印象深刻的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种用于图像到图像翻译任务的语义关系保持知识蒸馏方法，通过引入语义关系矩阵提升学生模型性能。
AI.motivation: 现有GAN模型参数量大导致推理效率低，且传统压缩方法难以适应图像到图像翻译任务的特性。
AI.method: 结合知识蒸馏与语义关系保持矩阵，利用教师模型特征编码生成语义关系矩阵指导学生模型学习。
AI.result: 在5个数据集和3组师生模型实验中，方法在定性和定量指标上均取得显著效果。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效压缩模型规模同时保持翻译质量，为图像到图像翻译任务提供新的优化思路。

title: A Meta-Learning-based Trajectory Tracking Framework for UAVs under Degraded Conditions
title_zh: 退化条件下基于元学习的无人机轨迹跟踪框架
comment: 2021 IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS) (to appear) 2021 copyright IEEE
comments: 2021 IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS) (to appear) 2021 copyright IEEE
abstract: Due to changes in model dynamics or unexpected disturbances, an autonomous robotic system may experience unforeseen challenges during real-world operations which may affect its safety and intended behavior: in particular actuator and system failures and external disturbances are among the most common causes of degraded mode of operation. To deal with this problem, in this work, we present a meta-learning-based approach to improve the trajectory tracking performance of an unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV) under actuator faults and disturbances which have not been previously experienced. Our approach leverages meta-learning to train a model that is easily adaptable at runtime to make accurate predictions about the system's future state. A runtime monitoring and validation technique is proposed to decide when the system needs to adapt its model by considering a data pruning procedure for efficient learning. Finally, the reference trajectory is adapted based on future predictions by borrowing feedback control logic to make the system track the original and desired path without needing to access the system's controller. The proposed framework is applied and validated in both simulations and experiments on a faulty UAV navigation case study demonstrating a drastic increase in tracking performance.
summary: Due to changes in model dynamics or unexpected disturbances, an autonomous robotic system may experience unforeseen challenges during real-world operations which may affect its safety and intended behavior: in particular actuator and system failures and external disturbances are among the most common causes of degraded mode of operation. To deal with this problem, in this work, we present a meta-learning-based approach to improve the trajectory tracking performance of an unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV) under actuator faults and disturbances which have not been previously experienced. Our approach leverages meta-learning to train a model that is easily adaptable at runtime to make accurate predictions about the system's future state. A runtime monitoring and validation technique is proposed to decide when the system needs to adapt its model by considering a data pruning procedure for efficient learning. Finally, the reference trajectory is adapted based on future predictions by borrowing feedback control logic to make the system track the original and desired path without needing to access the system's controller. The proposed framework is applied and validated in both simulations and experiments on a faulty UAV navigation case study demonstrating a drastic increase in tracking performance.
abstract_zh: 由于模型动力学的变化或意外的干扰，自主机器人系统在现实操作过程中可能会遇到不可预见的挑战，这可能会影响其安全性和预期行为：特别是执行器和系统故障以及外部干扰是导致操作模式退化的最常见原因。为了解决这个问题，在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于元学习的方法，以提高无人机（UAV）在执行器故障和以前没有经历过的干扰下的轨迹跟踪性能。我们的方法利用元学习来训练一个可以在运行时轻松适应的模型，以准确预测系统的未来状态。提出了一种运行时监控和验证技术，通过考虑有效学习的数据修剪过程来决定系统何时需要调整其模型。最后，通过借用反馈控制逻辑，基于未来的预测来调整参考轨迹，使系统跟踪原始和期望的路径，而无需访问系统的控制器。所提出的框架在故障无人机导航案例研究的模拟和实验中得到了应用和验证，证明了跟踪性能的大幅提高。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于元学习的无人机轨迹跟踪框架，用于在退化条件下（如执行器故障和干扰）提升无人机的轨迹跟踪性能。
AI.motivation: 无人机在实际运行中可能遭遇未预见的系统故障或外部干扰，导致轨迹跟踪性能下降，影响安全性和任务完成度，亟需一种自适应方法应对突发状况。
AI.method: 利用元学习训练可快速适应的模型，结合运行时监控与数据修剪技术实现高效学习，并通过反馈控制逻辑调整参考轨迹，无需直接访问控制器即可修正路径。
AI.result: 在仿真与实际故障无人机实验中，该框架显著提升了轨迹跟踪精度与鲁棒性，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的元学习框架能够有效增强无人机在未知故障和干扰下的轨迹跟踪能力，为复杂环境下的自主飞行提供了新思路。

search_text: A Meta-Learning-based Trajectory Tracking Framework for UAVs under Degraded Conditions 退化条件下基于元学习的无人机轨迹跟踪框架 Due to changes in model dynamics or unexpected disturbances, an autonomous robotic system may experience unforeseen challenges during real-world operations which may affect its safety and intended behavior: in particular actuator and system failures and external disturbances are among the most common causes of degraded mode of operation. To deal with this problem, in this work, we present a meta-learning-based approach to improve the trajectory tracking performance of an unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV) under actuator faults and disturbances which have not been previously experienced. Our approach leverages meta-learning to train a model that is easily adaptable at runtime to make accurate predictions about the system's future state. A runtime monitoring and validation technique is proposed to decide when the system needs to adapt its model by considering a data pruning procedure for efficient learning. Finally, the reference trajectory is adapted based on future predictions by borrowing feedback control logic to make the system track the original and desired path without needing to access the system's controller. The proposed framework is applied and validated in both simulations and experiments on a faulty UAV navigation case study demonstrating a drastic increase in tracking performance. 由于模型动力学的变化或意外的干扰，自主机器人系统在现实操作过程中可能会遇到不可预见的挑战，这可能会影响其安全性和预期行为：特别是执行器和系统故障以及外部干扰是导致操作模式退化的最常见原因。为了解决这个问题，在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于元学习的方法，以提高无人机（UAV）在执行器故障和以前没有经历过的干扰下的轨迹跟踪性能。我们的方法利用元学习来训练一个可以在运行时轻松适应的模型，以准确预测系统的未来状态。提出了一种运行时监控和验证技术，通过考虑有效学习的数据修剪过程来决定系统何时需要调整其模型。最后，通过借用反馈控制逻辑，基于未来的预测来调整参考轨迹，使系统跟踪原始和期望的路径，而无需访问系统的控制器。所提出的框架在故障无人机导航案例研究的模拟和实验中得到了应用和验证，证明了跟踪性能的大幅提高。 本文提出一种基于元学习的无人机轨迹跟踪框架，用于在退化条件下（如执行器故障和干扰）提升无人机的轨迹跟踪性能。 Esen Yel,Nicola Bezzo cs.RO

title: Participatory Budgeting with Donations and Diversity Constraints
title_zh: 具有捐赠和多样性限制的参与式预算
abstract: Participatory budgeting (PB) is a democratic process where citizens jointly decide on how to allocate public funds to indivisible projects. This paper focuses on PB processes where citizens may give additional money to projects they want to see funded. We introduce a formal framework for this kind of PB with donations. Our framework also allows for diversity constraints, meaning that each project belongs to one or more types, and there are lower and upper bounds on the number of projects of the same type that can be funded. We propose three general classes of methods for aggregating the citizens' preferences in the presence of donations and analyze their axiomatic properties. Furthermore, we investigate the computational complexity of determining the outcome of a PB process with donations and of finding a citizen's optimal donation strategy.
summary: Participatory budgeting (PB) is a democratic process where citizens jointly decide on how to allocate public funds to indivisible projects. This paper focuses on PB processes where citizens may give additional money to projects they want to see funded. We introduce a formal framework for this kind of PB with donations. Our framework also allows for diversity constraints, meaning that each project belongs to one or more types, and there are lower and upper bounds on the number of projects of the same type that can be funded. We propose three general classes of methods for aggregating the citizens' preferences in the presence of donations and analyze their axiomatic properties. Furthermore, we investigate the computational complexity of determining the outcome of a PB process with donations and of finding a citizen's optimal donation strategy.
abstract_zh: 参与式预算（PB）是一个民主过程，公民共同决定如何将公共资金分配给不可分割的项目。本文重点关注 PB 流程，公民可以向他们希望获得资助的项目提供额外资金。我们为这种捐赠的 PB 引入了一个正式的框架。我们的框架还允许多样性约束，这意味着每个项目属于一种或多种类型，并且可以资助的同一类型的项目数量存在下限和上限。我们提出了三类通用方法，用于汇总公民在捐赠情况下的偏好，并分析其公理属性。此外，我们还研究了确定 PB 捐赠流程结果以及寻找公民最佳捐赠策略的计算复杂性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种包含捐赠和多样性约束的参与式预算框架，并分析了三种聚合公民偏好的方法及其计算复杂性。
AI.motivation: 传统参与式预算未考虑公民捐赠及项目多样性需求，而实际中公民可能通过捐赠表达偏好，且需确保资助项目的类型均衡。本文旨在解决这一问题，提升预算分配的公平性与代表性。
AI.method: 构建包含捐赠和多样性约束的正式框架，提出三种聚合偏好方法，并分析其公理性质及计算复杂性，包括确定预算结果和最优捐赠策略的难度。
AI.result: 框架支持捐赠与多样性约束的整合，三种方法在不同场景下具有不同性质，计算复杂性分析表明部分问题属于NP难，需权衡效率与公平性。
AI.conclusion: 本文为参与式预算提供了理论扩展，证明了捐赠机制与多样性约束的可行性，同时揭示了计算挑战，为实际应用提供了方法选择依据。

authors_text: Yu Tian,Jian Ren,Menglei Chai,Kyle Olszewski,Xi Peng,Dimitris N. Metaxas,Sergey Tulyakov
title: A Good Image Generator Is What You Need for High-Resolution Video Synthesis
title_zh: 高分辨率视频合成需要一个好的图像生成器
abstract: Image and video synthesis are closely related areas aiming at generating content from noise. While rapid progress has been demonstrated in improving image-based models to handle large resolutions, high-quality renderings, and wide variations in image content, achieving comparable video generation results remains problematic. We present a framework that leverages contemporary image generators to render high-resolution videos. We frame the video synthesis problem as discovering a trajectory in the latent space of a pre-trained and fixed image generator. Not only does such a framework render high-resolution videos, but it also is an order of magnitude more computationally efficient. We introduce a motion generator that discovers the desired trajectory, in which content and motion are disentangled. With such a representation, our framework allows for a broad range of applications, including content and motion manipulation. Furthermore, we introduce a new task, which we call cross-domain video synthesis, in which the image and motion generators are trained on disjoint datasets belonging to different domains. This allows for generating moving objects for which the desired video data is not available. Extensive experiments on various datasets demonstrate the advantages of our methods over existing video generation techniques. Code will be released at https://github.com/snap-research/MoCoGAN-HD.
summary: Image and video synthesis are closely related areas aiming at generating content from noise. While rapid progress has been demonstrated in improving image-based models to handle large resolutions, high-quality renderings, and wide variations in image content, achieving comparable video generation results remains problematic. We present a framework that leverages contemporary image generators to render high-resolution videos. We frame the video synthesis problem as discovering a trajectory in the latent space of a pre-trained and fixed image generator. Not only does such a framework render high-resolution videos, but it also is an order of magnitude more computationally efficient. We introduce a motion generator that discovers the desired trajectory, in which content and motion are disentangled. With such a representation, our framework allows for a broad range of applications, including content and motion manipulation. Furthermore, we introduce a new task, which we call cross-domain video synthesis, in which the image and motion generators are trained on disjoint datasets belonging to different domains. This allows for generating moving objects for which the desired video data is not available. Extensive experiments on various datasets demonstrate the advantages of our methods over existing video generation techniques. Code will be released at https://github.com/snap-research/MoCoGAN-HD.
abstract_zh: 图像和视频合成是密切相关的领域，旨在从噪声中生成内容。虽然在改进基于图像的模型以处理高分辨率、高质量渲染和图像内容的广泛变化方面已经取得了快速进展，但实现可比较的视频生成结果仍然存在问题。我们提出了一个利用当代图像生成器来渲染高分辨率视频的框架。我们将视频合成问题定义为发现预训练和固定图像生成器的潜在空间中的轨迹。这样的框架不仅可以渲染高分辨率视频，而且计算效率也提高了一个数量级。我们引入了一个运动生成器，它可以发现所需的轨迹，其中内容和运动被解开。有了这样的表示，我们的框架就可以实现广泛的应用，包括内容和运动操纵。此外，我们引入了一项新任务，称为跨域视频合成，其中图像和运动生成器在属于不同域的不相交数据集上进行训练。这允许生成所需视频数据不可用的移动对象。对各种数据集的广泛实验证明了我们的方法相对于现有视频生成技术的优势。代码将在 https://github.com/snap-research/MoCoGAN-HD 发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种利用高质量图像生成器进行高分辨率视频合成的框架，通过潜在空间轨迹生成和运动分离技术实现高效视频生成。
AI.motivation: 尽管图像生成技术已取得显著进展，但高分辨率视频生成仍面临质量与效率挑战，现有方法难以兼顾分辨率、内容多样性与计算效率。
AI.method: 构建基于预训练图像生成器的潜在空间轨迹框架，引入运动生成器实现内容与运动解耦，并提出跨领域视频合成任务，利用不同领域数据集训练生成器。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在多个数据集上优于现有视频生成技术，生成分辨率更高且计算效率提升一个数量级，支持内容与运动操控。
AI.conclusion: 通过复用成熟图像生成器与潜在空间建模，提出高效高分辨率视频合成方案，为跨领域生成任务提供新思路。

search_text: A Good Image Generator Is What You Need for High-Resolution Video Synthesis 高分辨率视频合成需要一个好的图像生成器 Image and video synthesis are closely related areas aiming at generating content from noise. While rapid progress has been demonstrated in improving image-based models to handle large resolutions, high-quality renderings, and wide variations in image content, achieving comparable video generation results remains problematic. We present a framework that leverages contemporary image generators to render high-resolution videos. We frame the video synthesis problem as discovering a trajectory in the latent space of a pre-trained and fixed image generator. Not only does such a framework render high-resolution videos, but it also is an order of magnitude more computationally efficient. We introduce a motion generator that discovers the desired trajectory, in which content and motion are disentangled. With such a representation, our framework allows for a broad range of applications, including content and motion manipulation. Furthermore, we introduce a new task, which we call cross-domain video synthesis, in which the image and motion generators are trained on disjoint datasets belonging to different domains. This allows for generating moving objects for which the desired video data is not available. Extensive experiments on various datasets demonstrate the advantages of our methods over existing video generation techniques. Code will be released at https://github.com/snap-research/MoCoGAN-HD. 图像和视频合成是密切相关的领域，旨在从噪声中生成内容。虽然在改进基于图像的模型以处理高分辨率、高质量渲染和图像内容的广泛变化方面已经取得了快速进展，但实现可比较的视频生成结果仍然存在问题。我们提出了一个利用当代图像生成器来渲染高分辨率视频的框架。我们将视频合成问题定义为发现预训练和固定图像生成器的潜在空间中的轨迹。这样的框架不仅可以渲染高分辨率视频，而且计算效率也提高了一个数量级。我们引入了一个运动生成器，它可以发现所需的轨迹，其中内容和运动被解开。有了这样的表示，我们的框架就可以实现广泛的应用，包括内容和运动操纵。此外，我们引入了一项新任务，称为跨域视频合成，其中图像和运动生成器在属于不同域的不相交数据集上进行训练。这允许生成所需视频数据不可用的移动对象。对各种数据集的广泛实验证明了我们的方法相对于现有视频生成技术的优势。代码将在 https://github.com/snap-research/MoCoGAN-HD 发布。 本文提出一种利用高质量图像生成器进行高分辨率视频合成的框架，通过潜在空间轨迹生成和运动分离技术实现高效视频生成。 Yu Tian,Jian Ren,Menglei Chai,Kyle Olszewski,Xi Peng,Dimitris N. Metaxas,Sergey Tulyakov cs.CV

title: Black-box adversarial attacks using Evolution Strategies
title_zh: 使用进化策略的黑盒对抗攻击
comment: To be published in the proceedings of ACM Genetic and Evolutionary Computation Conference (GECCO) Companion 2021
comments: To be published in the proceedings of ACM Genetic and Evolutionary Computation Conference (GECCO) Companion 2021
abstract: In the last decade, deep neural networks have proven to be very powerful in computer vision tasks, starting a revolution in the computer vision and machine learning fields. However, deep neural networks, usually, are not robust to perturbations of the input data. In fact, several studies showed that slightly changing the content of the images can cause a dramatic decrease in the accuracy of the attacked neural network. Several methods able to generate adversarial samples make use of gradients, which usually are not available to an attacker in real-world scenarios. As opposed to this class of attacks, another class of adversarial attacks, called black-box adversarial attacks, emerged, which does not make use of information on the gradients, being more suitable for real-world attack scenarios. In this work, we compare three well-known evolution strategies on the generation of black-box adversarial attacks for image classification tasks. While our results show that the attacked neural networks can be, in most cases, easily fooled by all the algorithms under comparison, they also show that some black-box optimization algorithms may be better in "harder" setups, both in terms of attack success rate and efficiency (i.e., number of queries).
summary: In the last decade, deep neural networks have proven to be very powerful in computer vision tasks, starting a revolution in the computer vision and machine learning fields. However, deep neural networks, usually, are not robust to perturbations of the input data. In fact, several studies showed that slightly changing the content of the images can cause a dramatic decrease in the accuracy of the attacked neural network. Several methods able to generate adversarial samples make use of gradients, which usually are not available to an attacker in real-world scenarios. As opposed to this class of attacks, another class of adversarial attacks, called black-box adversarial attacks, emerged, which does not make use of information on the gradients, being more suitable for real-world attack scenarios. In this work, we compare three well-known evolution strategies on the generation of black-box adversarial attacks for image classification tasks. While our results show that the attacked neural networks can be, in most cases, easily fooled by all the algorithms under comparison, they also show that some black-box optimization algorithms may be better in "harder" setups, both in terms of attack success rate and efficiency (i.e., number of queries).
abstract_zh: 在过去的十年中，深度神经网络已被证明在计算机视觉任务中非常强大，引发了计算机视觉和机器学习领域的一场革命。然而，深度神经网络通常对输入数据的扰动并不鲁棒。事实上，一些研究表明，图像内容的轻微改变可能会导致受攻击的神经网络的准确性急剧下降。几种能够生成对抗性样本的方法都利用了梯度，而在现实场景中，攻击者通常无法使用梯度。与此类攻击相反，出现了另一类对抗性攻击，称为黑盒对抗性攻击，它不利用梯度信息，更适合现实世界的攻击场景。在这项工作中，我们比较了图像分类任务中三种著名的黑盒对抗攻击生成策略。虽然我们的结果表明，在大多数情况下，受攻击的神经网络很容易被所有比较的算法所欺骗，但它们也表明，一些黑盒优化算法在“更难”的设置中可能更好，无论是在攻击成功率还是效率（即查询数量）方面。

AI.tldr: 本文比较了三种进化策略在图像分类任务中生成黑盒对抗样本的效果，探讨其攻击成功率和效率。
AI.motivation: 深度神经网络对输入扰动敏感，但现实场景中攻击者通常无法获取梯度信息。黑盒对抗攻击无需梯度，更适合实际应用，但需评估不同优化算法的效果。
AI.method: 采用三种进化策略，在无梯度信息条件下生成对抗样本，通过攻击成功率和查询次数评估算法性能。
AI.result: 所有算法均能有效欺骗目标网络，但在更复杂场景中部分算法在攻击成功率和效率上表现更优。
AI.conclusion: 黑盒对抗攻击可行，但优化算法的选择对攻击效果有显著影响，为防御策略提供了改进方向。

title: Black-box Gradient Attack on Graph Neural Networks: Deeper Insights in Graph-based Attack and Defense
title_zh: 图神经网络的黑盒梯度攻击：基于图的攻防的更深入见解
comment: A new version of this work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication
comments: A new version of this work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication
abstract: Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) have received significant attention due to their state-of-the-art performance on various graph representation learning tasks. However, recent studies reveal that GNNs are vulnerable to adversarial attacks, i.e. an attacker is able to fool the GNNs by perturbing the graph structure or node features deliberately. While being able to successfully decrease the performance of GNNs, most existing attacking algorithms require access to either the model parameters or the training data, which is not practical in the real world. In this paper, we develop deeper insights into the Mettack algorithm, which is a representative grey-box attacking method, and then we propose a gradient-based black-box attacking algorithm. Firstly, we show that the Mettack algorithm will perturb the edges unevenly, thus the attack will be highly dependent on a specific training set. As a result, a simple yet useful strategy to defense against Mettack is to train the GNN with the validation set. Secondly, to overcome the drawbacks, we propose the Black-Box Gradient Attack (BBGA) algorithm. Extensive experiments demonstrate that out proposed method is able to achieve stable attack performance without accessing the training sets of the GNNs. Further results shows that our proposed method is also applicable when attacking against various defense methods.
summary: Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) have received significant attention due to their state-of-the-art performance on various graph representation learning tasks. However, recent studies reveal that GNNs are vulnerable to adversarial attacks, i.e. an attacker is able to fool the GNNs by perturbing the graph structure or node features deliberately. While being able to successfully decrease the performance of GNNs, most existing attacking algorithms require access to either the model parameters or the training data, which is not practical in the real world. In this paper, we develop deeper insights into the Mettack algorithm, which is a representative grey-box attacking method, and then we propose a gradient-based black-box attacking algorithm. Firstly, we show that the Mettack algorithm will perturb the edges unevenly, thus the attack will be highly dependent on a specific training set. As a result, a simple yet useful strategy to defense against Mettack is to train the GNN with the validation set. Secondly, to overcome the drawbacks, we propose the Black-Box Gradient Attack (BBGA) algorithm. Extensive experiments demonstrate that out proposed method is able to achieve stable attack performance without accessing the training sets of the GNNs. Further results shows that our proposed method is also applicable when attacking against various defense methods.
abstract_zh: 图神经网络（GNN）因其在各种图表示学习任务上的最先进的性能而受到了极大的关注。然而，最近的研究表明，GNN 很容易受到对抗性攻击，即攻击者能够通过故意扰乱图结构或节点特征来欺骗 GNN。虽然能够成功降低 GNN 的性能，但大多数现有的攻击算法需要访问模型参数或训练数据，这在现实世界中并不实用。在本文中，我们对具有代表性的灰盒攻击方法Mettack算法进行了更深入的研究，然后提出了一种基于梯度的黑盒攻击算法。首先，我们表明 Mettack 算法会不均匀地扰动边缘，因此攻击将高度依赖于特定的训练集。因此，防御 Mettack 的一个简单但有用的策略是使用验证集训练 GNN。其次，为了克服这些缺点，我们提出了黑盒梯度攻击（BBGA）算法。大量实验表明，我们提出的方法能够在不访问 GNN 训练集的情况下实现稳定的攻击性能。进一步的结果表明，我们提出的方法也适用于攻击各种防御方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需访问训练数据的黑盒梯度攻击算法（BBGA），用于攻击图神经网络（GNN），并分析了现有攻击方法的局限性。
AI.motivation: 现有GNN攻击方法需依赖模型参数或训练数据，难以实际应用。本文旨在开发更实用的黑盒攻击方法，并探索防御策略。
AI.method: 改进Mettack算法，提出基于梯度的黑盒攻击方法BBGA；通过验证集训练增强防御能力，并验证攻击方法对多种防御策略的有效性。
AI.result: BBGA在无需训练数据的情况下实现稳定攻击效果，且能有效对抗多种防御方法。
AI.conclusion: BBGA为GNN的黑盒攻击提供了新思路，揭示了现有防御机制的不足，需进一步研究鲁棒性更强的防御方法。

Firstly, we show that the Mettack algorithm will perturb the edges unevenly, thus the attack will be highly dependent on a specific training set. Secondly, to overcome the drawbacks, we propose the Black-Box Gradient Attack (BBGA) algorithm. Extensive experiments demonstrate that out proposed method is able to achieve stable attack performance without accessing the training sets of the GNNs. Further results shows that our proposed method is also applicable when attacking against various defense methods. 图神经网络（GNN）因其在各种图表示学习任务上的最先进的性能而受到了极大的关注。然而，最近的研究表明，GNN 很容易受到对抗性攻击，即攻击者能够通过故意扰乱图结构或节点特征来欺骗 GNN。虽然能够成功降低 GNN 的性能，但大多数现有的攻击算法需要访问模型参数或训练数据，这在现实世界中并不实用。在本文中，我们对具有代表性的灰盒攻击方法Mettack算法进行了更深入的研究，然后提出了一种基于梯度的黑盒攻击算法。首先，我们表明 Mettack 算法会不均匀地扰动边缘，因此攻击将高度依赖于特定的训练集。因此，防御 Mettack 的一个简单但有用的策略是使用验证集训练 GNN。其次，为了克服这些缺点，我们提出了黑盒梯度攻击（BBGA）算法。大量实验表明，我们提出的方法能够在不访问 GNN 训练集的情况下实现稳定的攻击性能。进一步的结果表明，我们提出的方法也适用于攻击各种防御方法。 本文提出一种无需访问训练数据的黑盒梯度攻击算法（BBGA），用于攻击图神经网络（GNN），并分析了现有攻击方法的局限性。 Haoxi Zhan,Xiaobing Pei cs.LG,cs.AI,stat.ML

authors_text: Seung Wook Kim,Jonah Philion,Antonio Torralba,Sanja Fidler
title: DriveGAN: Towards a Controllable High-Quality Neural Simulation
title_zh: DriveGAN：迈向可控的高质量神经模拟
abstract: Realistic simulators are critical for training and verifying robotics systems. While most of the contemporary simulators are hand-crafted, a scaleable way to build simulators is to use machine learning to learn how the environment behaves in response to an action, directly from data. In this work, we aim to learn to simulate a dynamic environment directly in pixel-space, by watching unannotated sequences of frames and their associated action pairs. We introduce a novel high-quality neural simulator referred to as DriveGAN that achieves controllability by disentangling different components without supervision. In addition to steering controls, it also includes controls for sampling features of a scene, such as the weather as well as the location of non-player objects. Since DriveGAN is a fully differentiable simulator, it further allows for re-simulation of a given video sequence, offering an agent to drive through a recorded scene again, possibly taking different actions. We train DriveGAN on multiple datasets, including 160 hours of real-world driving data. We showcase that our approach greatly surpasses the performance of previous data-driven simulators, and allows for new features not explored before.
summary: Realistic simulators are critical for training and verifying robotics systems. While most of the contemporary simulators are hand-crafted, a scaleable way to build simulators is to use machine learning to learn how the environment behaves in response to an action, directly from data. In this work, we aim to learn to simulate a dynamic environment directly in pixel-space, by watching unannotated sequences of frames and their associated action pairs. We introduce a novel high-quality neural simulator referred to as DriveGAN that achieves controllability by disentangling different components without supervision. In addition to steering controls, it also includes controls for sampling features of a scene, such as the weather as well as the location of non-player objects. Since DriveGAN is a fully differentiable simulator, it further allows for re-simulation of a given video sequence, offering an agent to drive through a recorded scene again, possibly taking different actions. We train DriveGAN on multiple datasets, including 160 hours of real-world driving data. We showcase that our approach greatly surpasses the performance of previous data-driven simulators, and allows for new features not explored before.
abstract_zh: 真实的模拟器对于训练和验证机器人系统至关重要。虽然大多数当代模拟器都是手工制作的，但构建模拟器的一种可扩展的方法是使用机器学习直接从数据中了解环境如何响应动作。在这项工作中，我们的目标是通过观察未注释的帧序列及其相关的动作对来学习直接在像素空间中模拟动态环境。我们引入了一种新颖的高质量神经模拟器，称为 DriveGAN，它通过在没有监督的情况下解开不同的组件来实现可控性。除了转向控件之外，它还包括用于对场景特征进行采样的控件，例如天气以及非玩家对象的位置。由于 DriveGAN 是一个完全可微分的模拟器，因此它还允许重新模拟给定的视频序列，为代理提供再次驾驶录制场景的机会，并可能采取不同的操作。我们在多个数据集上训练 DriveGAN，其中包括 160 小时的真实驾驶数据。我们展示了我们的方法大大超越了以前的数据驱动模拟器的性能，并且允许以前未探索过的新功能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DriveGAN，一种无需标注数据即可直接在像素空间学习模拟动态环境的高质量神经模拟器。
AI.motivation: 传统手工构建的模拟器难以扩展，而现有数据驱动模拟器存在控制性差、质量低的问题，需开发可控制且高质量的神经模拟方法。
AI.method: 设计DriveGAN框架，通过无监督方式解耦场景不同组件（如天气、非玩家物体位置），结合可微分仿真实现对视频序列的重模拟。
AI.result: 在包含160小时真实驾驶数据的多数据集上验证，DriveGAN显著优于先前数据驱动模拟器，并支持天气等新颖控制功能。
AI.conclusion: DriveGAN实现了可控高质量神经仿真，为机器人系统训练与验证提供了新范式，未来可探索更复杂的环境交互能力。

authors_text: Junhua Chen,Chong Zhang,Alberto Traverso,Ivan Zhovannik,Andre Dekker,Leonard Wee,Inigo Bermejo
title: Generative Models Improve Radiomics Reproducibility in Low Dose CTs: A Simulation Study
title_zh: 生成模型提高低剂量 CT 的放射组学再现性：模拟研究
abstract: Radiomics is an active area of research in medical image analysis, the low reproducibility of radiomics has limited its applicability to clinical practice. This issue is especially prominent when radiomic features are calculated from noisy images, such as low dose computed tomography (CT) scans. In this article, we investigate the possibility of improving the reproducibility of radiomic features calculated on noisy CTs by using generative models for denoising.One traditional denoising method - non-local means - and two generative models - encoder-decoder networks (EDN) and conditional generative adversarial networks (CGANs) - were selected as the test models. We added noise to the sinograms of full dose CTs to mimic low dose CTs with two different levels of noise: low-noise CT and high-noise CT. Models were trained on high-noise CTs and used to denoise low-noise CTs without re-training. We also test the performance of our model in real data, using dataset of same-day repeat low dose CTs to assess the reproducibility of radiomic features in denoised images. The EDN and the CGAN improved the concordance correlation coefficients (CCC) of radiomic features for low-noise images from 0.87 to 0.92 and for high-noise images from 0.68 to 0.92 respectively. Moreover, the EDN and the CGAN improved the test-retest reliability of radiomic features (mean CCC increased from 0.89 to 0.94) based on real low dose CTs. The results show that denoising using EDN and CGANs can improve the reproducibility of radiomic features calculated on noisy CTs. Moreover, images with different noise levels can be denoised to improve the reproducibility using these models without re-training, as long as the noise intensity is equal or lower than that in high-noise CTs. To the authors' knowledge, this is the first effort to improve the reproducibility of radiomic features calculated on low dose CT scans.

abstract_zh: 放射组学是医学图像分析的一个活跃研究领域，放射组学的低重现性限制了其在临床实践中的适用性。当从噪声图像（例如低剂量计算机断层扫描（CT）扫描）计算放射学特征时，这个问题尤其突出。在本文中，我们研究了通过使用生成模型进行去噪来提高在噪声 CT 上计算的放射组学特征的再现性的可能性。选择一种传统的去噪方法（非局部均值）和两种生成模型（编码器解码器网络（EDN）和条件生成对抗网络（CGAN））作为测试模型。我们在全剂量 CT 的正弦图中添加了噪声，以模拟具有两种不同噪声水平的低剂量 CT：低噪声 CT 和高噪声 CT。模型在高噪声 CT 上进行训练，并用于对低噪声 CT 进行去噪，无需重新训练。我们还使用当日重复低剂量 CT 数据集来测试模型在实际数据中的性能，以评估去噪图像中放射组学特征的再现性。 EDN 和 CGAN 将低噪声图像的放射组学特征的一致性相关系数 (CCC) 从 0.87 提高到 0.92，将高噪声图像的放射组学特征的一致性相关系数 (CCC) 从 0.68 提高到 0.92。此外，EDN 和 CGAN 基于真实低剂量 CT 提高了放射组学特征的重测可靠性（平均 CCC 从 0.89 增加到 0.94）。结果表明，使用 EDN 和 CGAN 进行去噪可以提高在噪声 CT 上计算的放射组学特征的再现性。此外，只要噪声强度等于或低于高噪声 CT，就可以使用这些模型对具有不同噪声水平的图像进行去噪，以提高再现性，而无需重新训练。据作者所知，这是提高低剂量 CT 扫描计算的放射组学特征的再现性的首次努力。

AI.tldr: 本文研究使用生成模型（如编码器-解码器网络和条件生成对抗网络）对低剂量CT图像进行去噪，以提高放射组学特征的可重复性。
AI.motivation: 放射组学在临床中的应用受限于低剂量CT图像中放射组学特征的低可重复性，传统去噪方法效果有限，需探索更优解决方案。
AI.method: 通过向全剂量CT的正弦图添加噪声模拟低剂量CT，使用非局部均值、编码器-解码器网络（EDN）和条件生成对抗网络（CGAN）进行去噪，并在真实低剂量CT数据上验证模型效果。
AI.result: EDN和CGAN分别将低噪声CT的特征一致性系数（CCC）从0.87提升至0.92，高噪声CT从0.68提升至0.92；实际数据中测试-再测试可靠性（CCC均值）从0.89提升至0.94。
AI.conclusion: 生成模型无需重新训练即可有效提升低剂量CT图像中放射组学特征的可重复性，且适用于不同噪声水平的图像（噪声强度不超过训练数据）。

The results show that denoising using EDN and CGANs can improve the reproducibility of radiomic features calculated on noisy CTs. Moreover, images with different noise levels can be denoised to improve the reproducibility using these models without re-training, as long as the noise intensity is equal or lower than that in high-noise CTs. To the authors' knowledge, this is the first effort to improve the reproducibility of radiomic features calculated on low dose CT scans. 放射组学是医学图像分析的一个活跃研究领域，放射组学的低重现性限制了其在临床实践中的适用性。当从噪声图像（例如低剂量计算机断层扫描（CT）扫描）计算放射学特征时，这个问题尤其突出。在本文中，我们研究了通过使用生成模型进行去噪来提高在噪声 CT 上计算的放射组学特征的再现性的可能性。选择一种传统的去噪方法（非局部均值）和两种生成模型（编码器解码器网络（EDN）和条件生成对抗网络（CGAN））作为测试模型。我们在全剂量 CT 的正弦图中添加了噪声，以模拟具有两种不同噪声水平的低剂量 CT：低噪声 CT 和高噪声 CT。模型在高噪声 CT 上进行训练，并用于对低噪声 CT 进行去噪，无需重新训练。我们还使用当日重复低剂量 CT 数据集来测试模型在实际数据中的性能，以评估去噪图像中放射组学特征的再现性。 EDN 和 CGAN 将低噪声图像的放射组学特征的一致性相关系数 (CCC) 从 0.87 提高到 0.92，将高噪声图像的放射组学特征的一致性相关系数 (CCC) 从 0.68 提高到 0.92。此外，EDN 和 CGAN 基于真实低剂量 CT 提高了放射组学特征的重测可靠性（平均 CCC 从 0.89 增加到 0.94）。结果表明，使用 EDN 和 CGAN 进行去噪可以提高在噪声 CT 上计算的放射组学特征的再现性。此外，只要噪声强度等于或低于高噪声 CT，就可以使用这些模型对具有不同噪声水平的图像进行去噪，以提高再现性，而无需重新训练。据作者所知，这是提高低剂量 CT 扫描计算的放射组学特征的再现性的首次努力。 本文研究使用生成模型（如编码器-解码器网络和条件生成对抗网络）对低剂量CT图像进行去噪，以提高放射组学特征的可重复性。 Junhua Chen,Chong Zhang,Alberto Traverso,Ivan Zhovannik,Andre Dekker,Leonard Wee,Inigo Bermejo q-bio.QM,cs.LG,eess.IV

authors_text: Xinglong Sun,Guangliang Han,Lihong Guo,Tingfa Xu,Jianan Li,Peixun Liu
title: Updatable Siamese Tracker with Two-stage One-shot Learning
title_zh: 具有两阶段一次性学习功能的可更新连体跟踪器
abstract: Offline Siamese networks have achieved very promising tracking performance, especially in accuracy and efficiency. However, they often fail to track an object in complex scenes due to the incapacity in online update. Traditional updaters are difficult to process the irregular variations and sampling noises of objects, so it is quite risky to adopt them to update Siamese networks. In this paper, we first present a two-stage one-shot learner, which can predict the local parameters of primary classifier with object samples from diverse stages. Then, an updatable Siamese network is proposed based on the learner (SiamTOL), which is able to complement online update by itself. Concretely, we introduce an extra inputting branch to sequentially capture the latest object features, and design a residual module to update the initial exemplar using these features. Besides, an effective multi-aspect training loss is designed for our network to avoid overfit. Extensive experimental results on several popular benchmarks including OTB100, VOT2018, VOT2019, LaSOT, UAV123 and GOT10k manifest that the proposed tracker achieves the leading performance and outperforms other state-of-the-art methods
summary: Offline Siamese networks have achieved very promising tracking performance, especially in accuracy and efficiency. However, they often fail to track an object in complex scenes due to the incapacity in online update. Traditional updaters are difficult to process the irregular variations and sampling noises of objects, so it is quite risky to adopt them to update Siamese networks. In this paper, we first present a two-stage one-shot learner, which can predict the local parameters of primary classifier with object samples from diverse stages. Then, an updatable Siamese network is proposed based on the learner (SiamTOL), which is able to complement online update by itself. Concretely, we introduce an extra inputting branch to sequentially capture the latest object features, and design a residual module to update the initial exemplar using these features. Besides, an effective multi-aspect training loss is designed for our network to avoid overfit. Extensive experimental results on several popular benchmarks including OTB100, VOT2018, VOT2019, LaSOT, UAV123 and GOT10k manifest that the proposed tracker achieves the leading performance and outperforms other state-of-the-art methods
abstract_zh: 离线暹罗网络已经取得了非常有前途的跟踪性能，特别是在准确性和效率方面。然而，由于无法在线更新，它们常常无法在复杂场景中跟踪目标。传统的更新器很难处理对象的不规则变化和采样噪声，因此采用它们来更新孪生网络是相当危险的。在本文中，我们首先提出了一种两阶段一次性学习器，它可以利用不同阶段的对象样本来预测主分类器的局部参数。然后，提出了一种基于学习器的可更新暹罗网络（SiamTOL），它能够补充自身的在线更新。具体来说，我们引入了一个额外的输入分支来顺序捕获最新的对象特征，并设计一个残差模块来使用这些特征更新初始样本。此外，我们的网络还设计了有效的多方面训练损失以避免过度拟合。在OTB100、VOT2018、VOT2019、LaSOT、UAV123和GOT10k等几个流行基准上的广泛实验结果表明，所提出的跟踪器实现了领先的性能并优于其他最先进的方法

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种可更新的Siamese跟踪器（SiamTOL），通过两阶段一次性学习解决传统方法在线更新效果差的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统Siamese网络因缺乏有效在线更新机制，在复杂场景下跟踪性能下降，现有更新器难以处理目标变化和噪声干扰。
AI.method: 设计两阶段一次性学习器预测分类器参数，引入额外输入分支捕获最新目标特征，采用残差模块更新初始样本，并构建多维度训练损失防止过拟合。
AI.result: 在OTB100、VOT2018等六个基准测试中均取得最优性能，超越现有先进方法。
AI.conclusion: SiamTOL通过自适应在线更新机制有效提升了复杂场景下的目标跟踪鲁棒性与准确性。

title: Safety-Control of Mobile Robots Under Time-Delay Using Barrier Certificates and a Two-Layer Predictor
title_zh: 使用障碍证书和两层预测器的时滞下移动机器人的安全控制
abstract: Performing swift and agile maneuvers is essential for the safe operation of autonomous mobile robots. Moreover, the presence of time-delay restricts the response time of the system and hinders the safety performance. Thus, this paper proposes a modular and scalable safety-control design that utilizes the Smith predictor and barrier certificates to safely and consistently avoid obstacles with different footprints. The proposed solution includes a two-layer predictor to compensate for the time-delay in the servo-system and angle control loops. The proposed predictor configuration dramatically improves the transient performance and reduces response time. Barrier certificates are used to determine the safe range of the robot's heading angle to avoid collisions. The proposed obstacle avoidance technique conveniently integrates with various trajectory tracking algorithms, which enhances design flexibility. The angle condition is adaptively calculated and corrects the robot's heading angle and angular velocity. Also, the proposed method accommodates multiple obstacles and decouples the control structure from the obstacles' shape, count, and distribution. The control structure has only eight tunable parameters facilitating control calibration and tuning in large systems of mobile robots. Extensive experimental results verify the effectiveness of the proposed safety-control.
summary: Performing swift and agile maneuvers is essential for the safe operation of autonomous mobile robots. Moreover, the presence of time-delay restricts the response time of the system and hinders the safety performance. Thus, this paper proposes a modular and scalable safety-control design that utilizes the Smith predictor and barrier certificates to safely and consistently avoid obstacles with different footprints. The proposed solution includes a two-layer predictor to compensate for the time-delay in the servo-system and angle control loops. The proposed predictor configuration dramatically improves the transient performance and reduces response time. Barrier certificates are used to determine the safe range of the robot's heading angle to avoid collisions. The proposed obstacle avoidance technique conveniently integrates with various trajectory tracking algorithms, which enhances design flexibility. The angle condition is adaptively calculated and corrects the robot's heading angle and angular velocity. Also, the proposed method accommodates multiple obstacles and decouples the control structure from the obstacles' shape, count, and distribution. The control structure has only eight tunable parameters facilitating control calibration and tuning in large systems of mobile robots. Extensive experimental results verify the effectiveness of the proposed safety-control.
abstract_zh: 执行快速灵活的机动对于自主移动机器人的安全操作至关重要。此外，时滞的存在限制了系统的响应时间，影响了安全性能。因此，本文提出了一种模块化且可扩展的安全控制设计，利用史密斯预测器和障碍证书来安全、一致地避开不同占地面积的障碍物。所提出的解决方案包括一个两层预测器，用于补偿伺服系统和角度控制环中的时间延迟。所提出的预测器配置极大地提高了瞬态性能并减少了响应时间。障碍证书用于确定机器人航向角的安全范围，以避免碰撞。所提出的避障技术可以方便地与各种轨迹跟踪算法集成，从而提高了设计灵活性。自适应计算角度条件并修正机器人的航向角和角速度。此外，所提出的方法可以容纳多个障碍物，并将控制结构与障碍物的形状、数量和分布解耦。该控制结构只有八个可调参数，有助于大型移动机器人系统中的控制校准和调整。大量的实验结果验证了所提出的安全控制的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于屏障证书和双层预测器的移动机器人安全控制方法，解决时间延迟导致的避障问题。
AI.motivation: 时间延迟会限制移动机器人系统响应时间，影响安全性能，需设计兼顾避障与动态响应的控制方案。
AI.method: 结合Smith预测器与屏障证书，采用双层预测结构补偿时间延迟，通过自适应角度校正实现多障碍物避障，控制参数仅8个。
AI.result: 实验验证了该方法在提升瞬态响应、减少延迟影响及适应复杂障碍环境方面的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的控制框架具有模块化、参数少、兼容性强等特点，可有效提升移动机器人在延迟环境下的安全运行能力。

authors_text: Joan Espasa,Ian P. Gent,Ruth Hoffmann,Christopher Jefferson,Alice M. Lynch,András Salamon,Matthew J. McIlree
title: Using Small MUSes to Explain How to Solve Pen and Paper Puzzles
title_zh: 使用小型 MUS 来解释如何解决笔和纸谜题
abstract: In this paper, we present Demystify, a general tool for creating human-interpretable step-by-step explanations of how to solve a wide range of pen and paper puzzles from a high-level logical description. Demystify is based on Minimal Unsatisfiable Subsets (MUSes), which allow Demystify to solve puzzles as a series of logical deductions by identifying which parts of the puzzle are required to progress. This paper makes three contributions over previous work. First, we provide a generic input language, based on the Essence constraint language, which allows us to easily use MUSes to solve a much wider range of pen and paper puzzles. Second, we demonstrate that the explanations that Demystify produces match those provided by humans by comparing our results with those provided independently by puzzle experts on a range of puzzles. We compare Demystify to published guides for solving a range of different pen and paper puzzles and show that by using MUSes, Demystify produces solving strategies which closely match human-produced guides to solving those same puzzles (on average 89% of the time). Finally, we introduce a new randomised algorithm to find MUSes for more difficult puzzles. This algorithm is focused on optimised search for individual small MUSes.
summary: In this paper, we present Demystify, a general tool for creating human-interpretable step-by-step explanations of how to solve a wide range of pen and paper puzzles from a high-level logical description. Demystify is based on Minimal Unsatisfiable Subsets (MUSes), which allow Demystify to solve puzzles as a series of logical deductions by identifying which parts of the puzzle are required to progress. This paper makes three contributions over previous work. First, we provide a generic input language, based on the Essence constraint language, which allows us to easily use MUSes to solve a much wider range of pen and paper puzzles. Second, we demonstrate that the explanations that Demystify produces match those provided by humans by comparing our results with those provided independently by puzzle experts on a range of puzzles. We compare Demystify to published guides for solving a range of different pen and paper puzzles and show that by using MUSes, Demystify produces solving strategies which closely match human-produced guides to solving those same puzzles (on average 89% of the time). Finally, we introduce a new randomised algorithm to find MUSes for more difficult puzzles. This algorithm is focused on optimised search for individual small MUSes.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们介绍了 Demystify，这是一种通用工具，用于创建人类可解释的逐步解释，说明如何从高级逻辑描述解决各种笔和纸谜题。 Demystify 基于最小不可满足子集 (MUS)，它允许 Demystify 通过识别谜题的哪些部分需要进展来将谜题作为一系列逻辑推论来解决。本文相对于之前的工作做出了三点贡献。首先，我们提供了一种基于 Essence 约束语言的通用输入语言，它使我们能够轻松地使用 MUS 来解决更广泛的笔和纸谜题。其次，我们通过将我们的结果与谜题专家独立提供的一系列谜题结果进行比较，证明 Demystify 产生的解释与人类提供的解释相匹配。我们将 Demystify 与已发布的解决一系列不同笔和纸谜题的指南进行比较，结果表明，通过使用 MUS，Demystify 生成的解决策略与人类制作的解决相同谜题的指南非常匹配（平均为 89%）。最后，我们引入了一种新的随机算法来寻找更困难的谜题的 MUS。该算法专注于单个小型 MUS 的优化搜索。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Demystify工具，利用小MUS（最小不可满足子集）生成人类可理解的纸质谜题分步解答。
AI.motivation: 现有解谜工具缺乏通用性且难以生成符合人类思维的分步解释，需开发能匹配人类专家策略的自动化解谜系统。
AI.method: 基于MUS逻辑推理框架，设计通用输入语言（Essence扩展）并引入随机化算法优化MUS搜索，通过对比人类专家解答验证解释合理性。
AI.result: Demystify生成的解谜策略与人类专家指南匹配度达89%，且新算法有效提升复杂谜题的MUS搜索效率。
AI.conclusion: MUS驱动的Demystify系统成功实现了通用化、人类可解释的谜题求解，新算法为复杂问题提供了有效解决方案。

title: Noe: Norms Emergence and Robustness Based on Emotions in Multiagent Systems
title_zh: Noe：多智能体系统中基于情感的规范出现和鲁棒性
comment: 17 pages with 7 figures. Accepted at COINE 2021
comments: 17 pages with 7 figures. Accepted at COINE 2021
abstract: Social norms characterize collective and acceptable group conducts in human society. Furthermore, some social norms emerge from interactions of agents or humans. To achieve agent autonomy and make norm satisfaction explainable, we include emotions into the normative reasoning process, which evaluates whether to comply or violate a norm. Specifically, before selecting an action to execute, an agent observes the environment and infers the state and consequences with its internal states after norm satisfaction or violation of a social norm. Both norm satisfaction and violation provoke further emotions, and the subsequent emotions affect norm enforcement. This paper investigates how modeling emotions affect the emergence and robustness of social norms via social simulation experiments. We find that an ability in agents to consider emotional responses to the outcomes of norm satisfaction and violation (1) promotes norm compliance; and (2) improves societal welfare.
summary: Social norms characterize collective and acceptable group conducts in human society. Furthermore, some social norms emerge from interactions of agents or humans. To achieve agent autonomy and make norm satisfaction explainable, we include emotions into the normative reasoning process, which evaluates whether to comply or violate a norm. Specifically, before selecting an action to execute, an agent observes the environment and infers the state and consequences with its internal states after norm satisfaction or violation of a social norm. Both norm satisfaction and violation provoke further emotions, and the subsequent emotions affect norm enforcement. This paper investigates how modeling emotions affect the emergence and robustness of social norms via social simulation experiments. We find that an ability in agents to consider emotional responses to the outcomes of norm satisfaction and violation (1) promotes norm compliance; and (2) improves societal welfare.
abstract_zh: 社会规范表征了人类社会中集体和可接受的群体行为。此外，一些社会规范是从主体或人类的互动中产生的。为了实现代理人的自主性并使规范满意度可以解释，我们将情感纳入规范推理过程中，以评估是否遵守或违反规范。具体来说，在选择要执行的动作之前，智能体会观察环境，并在满足规范或违反社会规范后推断状态和其内部状态的后果。规范满足和违反都会引发进一步的情绪，随后的情绪会影响规范的执行。本文通过社会模拟实验研究了情绪建模如何影响社会规范的出现和稳健性。我们发现，代理人考虑对规范满足和违反结果的情绪反应的能力（1）促进规范遵守； (2)改善社会福利。

AI.tldr: 本文研究情感建模对多智能体系统中社会规范出现及鲁棒性的影响。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在规范遵守的可解释性和自主性方面存在不足，需引入情感机制以增强规范执行的合理性。
AI.method: 通过社会模拟实验，结合情感模型分析智能体在规范遵守与违反后的情感反应对规范执行的影响。
AI.result: 情感建模显著促进规范遵守，并提升整体社会福利。
AI.conclusion: 情感驱动的规范推理机制有效增强了社会规范的出现与鲁棒性，为多智能体系统设计提供新思路。

title: Post-training deep neural network pruning via layer-wise calibration
title_zh: 通过逐层校准进行训练后深度神经网络修剪
abstract: We present a post-training weight pruning method for deep neural networks that achieves accuracy levels tolerable for the production setting and that is sufficiently fast to be run on commodity hardware such as desktop CPUs or edge devices. We propose a data-free extension of the approach for computer vision models based on automatically-generated synthetic fractal images. We obtain state-of-the-art results for data-free neural network pruning, with ~1.5% top@1 accuracy drop for a ResNet50 on ImageNet at 50% sparsity rate. When using real data, we are able to get a ResNet50 model on ImageNet with 65% sparsity rate in 8-bit precision in a post-training setting with a ~1% top@1 accuracy drop. We release the code as a part of the OpenVINO(TM) Post-Training Optimization tool.
summary: We present a post-training weight pruning method for deep neural networks that achieves accuracy levels tolerable for the production setting and that is sufficiently fast to be run on commodity hardware such as desktop CPUs or edge devices. We propose a data-free extension of the approach for computer vision models based on automatically-generated synthetic fractal images. We obtain state-of-the-art results for data-free neural network pruning, with ~1.5% top@1 accuracy drop for a ResNet50 on ImageNet at 50% sparsity rate. When using real data, we are able to get a ResNet50 model on ImageNet with 65% sparsity rate in 8-bit precision in a post-training setting with a ~1% top@1 accuracy drop. We release the code as a part of the OpenVINO(TM) Post-Training Optimization tool.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种深度神经网络的训练后权重修剪方法，该方法达到了生产环境可容忍的精度水平，并且速度足够快，可以在桌面 CPU 或边缘设备等商用硬件上运行。我们提出了基于自动生成的合成分形图像的计算机视觉模型方法的无数据扩展。我们获得了无数据神经网络修剪的最先进结果，在稀疏率为 50% 的 ImageNet 上，ResNet50 的 top@1 准确率下降了约 1.5%。当使用真实数据时，我们能够在 ImageNet 上获得一个 ResNet50 模型，在训练后设置中，8 位精度的稀疏率为 65%，top@1 精度下降约 1%。我们将代码作为 OpenVINO(TM) 训练后优化工具的一部分发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种训练后深度神经网络剪枝方法，通过逐层校准实现高稀疏度模型压缩，同时保持较高准确率。
AI.motivation: 传统剪枝方法依赖训练数据或需要高计算资源，难以在边缘设备上高效部署，需开发无需数据且快速的剪枝方案。
AI.method: 基于逐层校准的权重剪枝方法，结合自动生成的合成分形图像实现数据无关剪枝，并支持真实数据微调。
AI.result: 在ImageNet数据集上，ResNet50模型达到50%稀疏度时准确率下降1.5%，使用真实数据时65%稀疏度下准确率仅下降1%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在数据无关剪枝领域达到SOTA性能，兼顾模型压缩效率与精度，已集成至OpenVINO工具链开源发布。

search_text: Post-training deep neural network pruning via layer-wise calibration 通过逐层校准进行训练后深度神经网络修剪 We present a post-training weight pruning method for deep neural networks that achieves accuracy levels tolerable for the production setting and that is sufficiently fast to be run on commodity hardware such as desktop CPUs or edge devices. We propose a data-free extension of the approach for computer vision models based on automatically-generated synthetic fractal images. We obtain state-of-the-art results for data-free neural network pruning, with ~1.5% top@1 accuracy drop for a ResNet50 on ImageNet at 50% sparsity rate. When using real data, we are able to get a ResNet50 model on ImageNet with 65% sparsity rate in 8-bit precision in a post-training setting with a ~1% top@1 accuracy drop. We release the code as a part of the OpenVINO(TM) Post-Training Optimization tool. 我们提出了一种深度神经网络的训练后权重修剪方法，该方法达到了生产环境可容忍的精度水平，并且速度足够快，可以在桌面 CPU 或边缘设备等商用硬件上运行。我们提出了基于自动生成的合成分形图像的计算机视觉模型方法的无数据扩展。我们获得了无数据神经网络修剪的最先进结果，在稀疏率为 50% 的 ImageNet 上，ResNet50 的 top@1 准确率下降了约 1.5%。当使用真实数据时，我们能够在 ImageNet 上获得一个 ResNet50 模型，在训练后设置中，8 位精度的稀疏率为 65%，top@1 精度下降约 1%。我们将代码作为 OpenVINO(TM) 训练后优化工具的一部分发布。 本文提出一种训练后深度神经网络剪枝方法，通过逐层校准实现高稀疏度模型压缩，同时保持较高准确率。 Ivan Lazarevich,Alexander Kozlov,Nikita Malinin cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Jun-Ho Choi,Huan Zhang,Jun-Hyuk Kim,Cho-Jui Hsieh,Jong-Seok Lee
title: Deep Image Destruction: Vulnerability of Deep Image-to-Image Models against Adversarial Attacks
title_zh: 深度图像破坏：深度图像到图像模型对抗对抗性攻击的脆弱性
abstract: Recently, the vulnerability of deep image classification models to adversarial attacks has been investigated. However, such an issue has not been thoroughly studied for image-to-image tasks that take an input image and generate an output image (e.g., colorization, denoising, deblurring, etc.) This paper presents comprehensive investigations into the vulnerability of deep image-to-image models to adversarial attacks. For five popular image-to-image tasks, 16 deep models are analyzed from various standpoints such as output quality degradation due to attacks, transferability of adversarial examples across different tasks, and characteristics of perturbations. We show that unlike image classification tasks, the performance degradation on image-to-image tasks largely differs depending on various factors, e.g., attack methods and task objectives. In addition, we analyze the effectiveness of conventional defense methods used for classification models in improving the robustness of the image-to-image models.
summary: Recently, the vulnerability of deep image classification models to adversarial attacks has been investigated. However, such an issue has not been thoroughly studied for image-to-image tasks that take an input image and generate an output image (e.g., colorization, denoising, deblurring, etc.) This paper presents comprehensive investigations into the vulnerability of deep image-to-image models to adversarial attacks. For five popular image-to-image tasks, 16 deep models are analyzed from various standpoints such as output quality degradation due to attacks, transferability of adversarial examples across different tasks, and characteristics of perturbations. We show that unlike image classification tasks, the performance degradation on image-to-image tasks largely differs depending on various factors, e.g., attack methods and task objectives. In addition, we analyze the effectiveness of conventional defense methods used for classification models in improving the robustness of the image-to-image models.
abstract_zh: 最近，人们研究了深度图像分类模型对对抗性攻击的脆弱性。然而，对于采用输入图像并生成输出图像的图像到图像任务（例如，着色、去噪、去模糊等），这一问题尚未得到彻底研究。本文对深度图像到图像模型面对对抗性攻击的脆弱性进行了全面的研究。对于五种流行的图像到图像任务，从不同的角度分析了 16 个深度模型，例如由于攻击导致的输出质量下降、对抗性示例在不同任务中的可转移性以及扰动的特征。我们表明，与图像分类任务不同，图像到图像任务的性能下降很大程度上取决于各种因素，例如攻击方法和任务目标。此外，我们分析了用于分类模型的传统防御方法在提高图像到图像模型的鲁棒性方面的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了深度图像到图像模型在对抗攻击下的脆弱性，分析了不同任务和攻击方法对模型性能的影响。
AI.motivation: 尽管图像分类模型的对抗攻击漏洞已被广泛研究，但图像到图像任务（如去噪、去模糊）的脆弱性尚未被充分探讨。
AI.method: 通过分析16个深度模型在5种图像到图像任务中的表现，从输出质量退化、对抗样本跨任务迁移性及扰动特性等角度进行综合评估。
AI.result: 图像到图像任务的性能退化程度因攻击方法和任务目标而异，传统分类模型防御方法在此场景中效果有限。
AI.conclusion: 图像到图像模型的脆弱性与分类任务存在显著差异，需针对任务特性设计专门的防御策略。

authors_text: Dongming Yang,Yuexian Zou,Can Zhang,Meng Cao,Jie Chen
title: RR-Net: Injecting Interactive Semantics in Human-Object Interaction Detection
title_zh: RR-Net：在人与物体交互检测中注入交互语义
abstract: Human-Object Interaction (HOI) detection devotes to learn how humans interact with surrounding objects. Latest end-to-end HOI detectors are short of relation reasoning, which leads to inability to learn HOI-specific interactive semantics for predictions. In this paper, we therefore propose novel relation reasoning for HOI detection. We first present a progressive Relation-aware Frame, which brings a new structure and parameter sharing pattern for interaction inference. Upon the frame, an Interaction Intensifier Module and a Correlation Parsing Module are carefully designed, where: a) interactive semantics from humans can be exploited and passed to objects to intensify interactions, b) interactive correlations among humans, objects and interactions are integrated to promote predictions. Based on modules above, we construct an end-to-end trainable framework named Relation Reasoning Network (abbr. RR-Net). Extensive experiments show that our proposed RR-Net sets a new state-of-the-art on both V-COCO and HICO-DET benchmarks and improves the baseline about 5.5% and 9.8% relatively, validating that this first effort in exploring relation reasoning and integrating interactive semantics has brought obvious improvement for end-to-end HOI detection.
summary: Human-Object Interaction (HOI) detection devotes to learn how humans interact with surrounding objects. Latest end-to-end HOI detectors are short of relation reasoning, which leads to inability to learn HOI-specific interactive semantics for predictions. In this paper, we therefore propose novel relation reasoning for HOI detection. We first present a progressive Relation-aware Frame, which brings a new structure and parameter sharing pattern for interaction inference. Upon the frame, an Interaction Intensifier Module and a Correlation Parsing Module are carefully designed, where: a) interactive semantics from humans can be exploited and passed to objects to intensify interactions, b) interactive correlations among humans, objects and interactions are integrated to promote predictions. Based on modules above, we construct an end-to-end trainable framework named Relation Reasoning Network (abbr. RR-Net). Extensive experiments show that our proposed RR-Net sets a new state-of-the-art on both V-COCO and HICO-DET benchmarks and improves the baseline about 5.5% and 9.8% relatively, validating that this first effort in exploring relation reasoning and integrating interactive semantics has brought obvious improvement for end-to-end HOI detection.
abstract_zh: 人与物体交互（HOI）检测致力于了解人类如何与周围物体交互。最新的端到端 HOI 检测器缺乏关系推理，这导致无法学习 HOI 特定的交互式语义来进行预测。因此，在本文中，我们提出了用于 HOI 检测的新颖关系推理。我们首先提出了一种渐进式关系感知框架，它为交互推理带来了新的结构和参数共享模式。在该框架上，精心设计了交互增强模块和相关解析模块，其中：a）可以利用人类的交互语义并将其传递给对象以加强交互，b）集成人、对象和交互之间的交互相关性以促进预测。基于上述模块，我们构建了一个端到端的可训练框架，名为关系推理网络（简称RR-Net）。大量实验表明，我们提出的 RR-Net 在 V-COCO 和 HICO-DET 基准上都创下了新的最先进水平，并将基线相对提高了约 5.5% 和 9.8%，验证了探索关系推理和集成交互语义的首次努力为端到端 HOI 检测带来了明显的改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的关系推理网络（RR-Net），用于提升端到端的人-物交互检测任务中的交互语义学习。
AI.motivation: 现有的端到端人-物交互检测方法缺乏关系推理能力，无法有效学习交互语义，导致预测效果不佳。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种渐进式的关系感知框架，并设计了交互增强模块和相关性解析模块，以利用交互语义并整合人、物和交互之间的相关性。
AI.result: 在V-COCO和HICO-DET基准测试中，RR-Net在基线模型上分别提升了约5.5%和9.8%，取得了新的最先进水平。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入关系推理和交互语义集成，RR-Net在端到端人-物交互检测任务中取得了显著的性能提升。
