authors_text: Nooshin Ayoobi,Danial Sharifrazi,Roohallah Alizadehsani,Afshin Shoeibi,Juan M. Gorriz,Hossein Moosaei,Abbas Khosravi,Saeid Nahavandi,Abdoulmohammad Gholamzadeh Chofreh,Feybi Ariani Goni,Jiri Jaromir Klemes,Amir Mosavi
title: Time series forecasting of new cases and new deaths rate for COVID-19 using deep learning methods
title_zh: 使用深度学习方法对 COVID-19 新病例和新死亡率进行时间序列预测
abstract: The first known case of Coronavirus disease 2019 (COVID-19) was identified in December 2019. It has spread worldwide, leading to an ongoing pandemic, imposed restrictions and costs to many countries. Predicting the number of new cases and deaths during this period can be a useful step in predicting the costs and facilities required in the future. The purpose of this study is to predict new cases and deaths rate one, three and seven-day ahead during the next 100 days. The motivation for predicting every n days (instead of just every day) is the investigation of the possibility of computational cost reduction and still achieving reasonable performance. Such a scenario may be encountered in real-time forecasting of time series. Six different deep learning methods are examined on the data adopted from the WHO website. Three methods are LSTM, Convolutional LSTM, and GRU. The bidirectional extension is then considered for each method to forecast the rate of new cases and new deaths in Australia and Iran countries. This study is novel as it carries out a comprehensive evaluation of the aforementioned three deep learning methods and their bidirectional extensions to perform prediction on COVID-19 new cases and new death rate time series. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first time that Bi-GRU and Bi-Conv-LSTM models are used for prediction on COVID-19 new cases and new deaths time series. The evaluation of the methods is presented in the form of graphs and Friedman statistical test. The results show that the bidirectional models have lower errors than other models. A several error evaluation metrics are presented to compare all models, and finally, the superiority of bidirectional methods is determined. This research could be useful for organisations working against COVID-19 and determining their long-term plans.

A several error evaluation metrics are presented to compare all models, and finally, the superiority of bidirectional methods is determined. This research could be useful for organisations working against COVID-19 and determining their long-term plans.
abstract_zh: 2019 年 12 月发现了第一例已知的 2019 冠状病毒病 (COVID-19) 病例。它已在全球范围内传播，导致持续的大流行，给许多国家带来了限制和成本。预测这一时期的新病例和死亡人数可能是预测未来所需成本和设施的有用步骤。这项研究的目的是预测未来 100 天内提前 1 天、3 天和 7 天的新增病例和死亡率。每 n 天（而不是每天）进行预测的动机是研究降低计算成本并仍然实现合理性能的可能性。在时间序列的实时预测中可能会遇到这样的场景。根据世界卫生组织网站采用的数据检查了六种不同的深度学习方法。三种方法是 LSTM、卷积 LSTM 和 GRU。然后考虑每种方法的双向扩展来预测澳大利亚和伊朗国家的新病例和新死亡人数。这项研究的新颖之处在于它对上述三种深度学习方法及其双向扩展进行了综合评估，以对 COVID-19 新病例和新死亡率时间序列进行预测。据我们所知，这是首次使用 Bi-GRU 和 Bi-Conv-LSTM 模型来预测 COVID-19 新病例和新死亡时间序列。对方法的评估以图表和弗里德曼统计检验的形式呈现。结果表明，双向模型的误差低于其他模型。提出了几种误差评估指标来比较所有模型，最后确定双向方法的优越性。这项研究对于对抗 COVID-19 的组织和确定其长期计划可能有用。

AI.tldr: 本文使用深度学习方法预测未来100天内澳大利亚和伊朗的新冠疫情新增病例及死亡率，预测时间范围涵盖1天、3天和7天。
AI.motivation: 通过间隔n天预测而非每日预测，探索降低计算成本的同时保持合理性能，适用于实时时间序列预测场景，并评估双向模型的预测优势。
AI.method: 采用LSTM、ConvLSTM、GRU及其双向扩展模型，基于WHO数据对澳大利亚和伊朗的疫情数据进行预测，通过误差指标和Friedman统计检验对比模型性能。
AI.result: 双向模型（Bi-GRU和Bi-Conv-LSTM）在预测误差指标上优于其他模型，验证了其在疫情时间序列预测中的优越性。
AI.conclusion: 双向深度学习模型能更准确预测疫情数据，为防疫机构制定长期规划提供支持，且该研究首次将Bi-GRU和Bi-Conv-LSTM应用于新冠预测领域。

search_text: Time series forecasting of new cases and new deaths rate for COVID-19 using deep learning methods 使用深度学习方法对 COVID-19 新病例和新死亡率进行时间序列预测 The first known case of Coronavirus disease 2019 (COVID-19) was identified in December 2019. It has spread worldwide, leading to an ongoing pandemic, imposed restrictions and costs to many countries. Predicting the number of new cases and deaths during this period can be a useful step in predicting the costs and facilities required in the future. The purpose of this study is to predict new cases and deaths rate one, three and seven-day ahead during the next 100 days. The motivation for predicting every n days (instead of just every day) is the investigation of the possibility of computational cost reduction and still achieving reasonable performance. Such a scenario may be encountered in real-time forecasting of time series. Six different deep learning methods are examined on the data adopted from the WHO website. Three methods are LSTM, Convolutional LSTM, and GRU. The bidirectional extension is then considered for each method to forecast the rate of new cases and new deaths in Australia and Iran countries. This study is novel as it carries out a comprehensive evaluation of the aforementioned three deep learning methods and their bidirectional extensions to perform prediction on COVID-19 new cases and new death rate time series. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first time that Bi-GRU and Bi-Conv-LSTM models are used for prediction on COVID-19 new cases and new deaths time series. The evaluation of the methods is presented in the form of graphs and Friedman statistical test. The results show that the bidirectional models have lower errors than other models. A several error evaluation metrics are presented to compare all models, and finally, the superiority of bidirectional methods is determined. This research could be useful for organisations working against COVID-19 and determining their long-term plans. 2019 年 12 月发现了第一例已知的 2019 冠状病毒病 (COVID-19) 病例。它已在全球范围内传播，导致持续的大流行，给许多国家带来了限制和成本。预测这一时期的新病例和死亡人数可能是预测未来所需成本和设施的有用步骤。这项研究的目的是预测未来 100 天内提前 1 天、3 天和 7 天的新增病例和死亡率。每 n 天（而不是每天）进行预测的动机是研究降低计算成本并仍然实现合理性能的可能性。在时间序列的实时预测中可能会遇到这样的场景。根据世界卫生组织网站采用的数据检查了六种不同的深度学习方法。三种方法是 LSTM、卷积 LSTM 和 GRU。然后考虑每种方法的双向扩展来预测澳大利亚和伊朗国家的新病例和新死亡人数。这项研究的新颖之处在于它对上述三种深度学习方法及其双向扩展进行了综合评估，以对 COVID-19 新病例和新死亡率时间序列进行预测。据我们所知，这是首次使用 Bi-GRU 和 Bi-Conv-LSTM 模型来预测 COVID-19 新病例和新死亡时间序列。对方法的评估以图表和弗里德曼统计检验的形式呈现。结果表明，双向模型的误差低于其他模型。提出了几种误差评估指标来比较所有模型，最后确定双向方法的优越性。这项研究对于对抗 COVID-19 的组织和确定其长期计划可能有用。 本文使用深度学习方法预测未来100天内澳大利亚和伊朗的新冠疫情新增病例及死亡率，预测时间范围涵盖1天、3天和7天。 Nooshin Ayoobi,Danial Sharifrazi,Roohallah Alizadehsani,Afshin Shoeibi,Juan M. Gorriz,Hossein Moosaei,Abbas Khosravi,Saeid Nahavandi,Abdoulmohammad Gholamzadeh Chofreh,Feybi Ariani Goni,Jiri Jaromir Klemes,Amir Mosavi cs.LG,cs.CV

title: Memory Bounds for Concurrent Bounded Queues
title_zh: 并发有界队列的内存限制
abstract: Concurrent data structures often require additional memory for handling synchronization issues in addition to memory for storing elements. Depending on the amount of this additional memory, implementations can be more or less memory-friendly. A memory-optimal implementation enjoys the minimal possible memory overhead, which, in practice, reduces cache misses and unnecessary memory reclamation. In this paper, we discuss the memory-optimality of non-blocking bounded queues. Essentially, we investigate the possibility of constructing an implementation that utilizes a pre-allocated array to store elements and constant memory overhead, e.g., two positioning counters for enqueue(..) and dequeue() operations. Such an implementation can be readily constructed when the ABA problem is precluded, e.g., assuming that the hardware supports LL/SC instructions or all inserted elements are distinct. However, in the general case, we show that a memory-optimal non-blocking bounded queue incurs linear overhead in the number of concurrent processes. These results not only provide helpful intuition for concurrent algorithm developers but also open a new research avenue on the memory-optimality phenomenon in concurrent data structures.
summary: Concurrent data structures often require additional memory for handling synchronization issues in addition to memory for storing elements. Depending on the amount of this additional memory, implementations can be more or less memory-friendly. A memory-optimal implementation enjoys the minimal possible memory overhead, which, in practice, reduces cache misses and unnecessary memory reclamation. In this paper, we discuss the memory-optimality of non-blocking bounded queues. Essentially, we investigate the possibility of constructing an implementation that utilizes a pre-allocated array to store elements and constant memory overhead, e.g., two positioning counters for enqueue(..) and dequeue() operations. Such an implementation can be readily constructed when the ABA problem is precluded, e.g., assuming that the hardware supports LL/SC instructions or all inserted elements are distinct. However, in the general case, we show that a memory-optimal non-blocking bounded queue incurs linear overhead in the number of concurrent processes. These results not only provide helpful intuition for concurrent algorithm developers but also open a new research avenue on the memory-optimality phenomenon in concurrent data structures.
abstract_zh: 除了用于存储元素的内存之外，并发数据结构通常还需要额外的内存来处理同步问题。根据额外内存的数量，实现可能或多或少是内存友好的。内存优化实现享有尽可能小的内存开销，这在实践中减少了缓存未命中和不必要的内存回收。在本文中，我们讨论非阻塞有界队列的内存最优性。本质上，我们研究了构建一个利用预分配数组来存储元素和恒定内存开销的实现的可能性，例如，用于 enqueue(..) 和 dequeue() 操作的两个定位计数器。当 ABA 问题被排除时，例如假设硬件支持 LL/SC 指令或所有插入的元素都是不同的，这样的实现可以很容易地构建。然而，在一般情况下，我们表明内存优化的非阻塞有界队列会在并发进程数方面产生线性开销。这些结果不仅为并发算法开发人员提供了有用的直觉，而且为并发数据结构中的内存优化现象开辟了新的研究途径。

AI.tldr: 本文研究非阻塞有界队列的内存最优性，探讨在并发环境下如何以最小的内存开销实现高效同步。
AI.motivation: 并发数据结构需要额外内存处理同步问题，内存最优实现能减少缓存缺失和内存回收开销，但现有方案是否可达最优尚不明确。
AI.method: 通过分析预分配数组与常数开销（如两个计数器）的实现可能性，并针对ABA问题进行条件假设，最终证明一般情况下的线性内存开销下界。
AI.result: 当排除ABA问题时可构造常数开销实现，但通用场景下非阻塞有界队列需线性内存开销，揭示了内存最优性与并发进程数的内在关联。
AI.conclusion: 结果为并发算法设计提供理论指导，并指出内存最优性研究在并发数据结构领域的新方向。

title: Interpretable Semantic Photo Geolocation
title_zh: 可解释的语义照片地理定位
abstract: Planet-scale photo geolocalization is the complex task of estimating the location depicted in an image solely based on its visual content. Due to the success of convolutional neural networks (CNNs), current approaches achieve super-human performance. However, previous work has exclusively focused on optimizing geolocalization accuracy. Due to the black-box property of deep learning systems, their predictions are difficult to validate for humans. State-of-the-art methods treat the task as a classification problem, where the choice of the classes, that is the partitioning of the world map, is crucial for the performance. In this paper, we present two contributions to improve the interpretability of a geolocalization model: (1) We propose a novel semantic partitioning method which intuitively leads to an improved understanding of the predictions, while achieving state-of-the-art results for geolocational accuracy on benchmark test sets; (2) We introduce a metric to assess the importance of semantic visual concepts for a certain prediction to provide additional interpretable information, which allows for a large-scale analysis of already trained models. Source code and dataset are publicly available.
summary: Planet-scale photo geolocalization is the complex task of estimating the location depicted in an image solely based on its visual content. Due to the success of convolutional neural networks (CNNs), current approaches achieve super-human performance. However, previous work has exclusively focused on optimizing geolocalization accuracy. Due to the black-box property of deep learning systems, their predictions are difficult to validate for humans. State-of-the-art methods treat the task as a classification problem, where the choice of the classes, that is the partitioning of the world map, is crucial for the performance. In this paper, we present two contributions to improve the interpretability of a geolocalization model: (1) We propose a novel semantic partitioning method which intuitively leads to an improved understanding of the predictions, while achieving state-of-the-art results for geolocational accuracy on benchmark test sets; (2) We introduce a metric to assess the importance of semantic visual concepts for a certain prediction to provide additional interpretable information, which allows for a large-scale analysis of already trained models. Source code and dataset are publicly available.
abstract_zh: 行星尺度的照片地理定位是一项复杂的任务，仅根据图像的视觉内容来估计图像中所描绘的位置。由于卷积神经网络（CNN）的成功，当前的方法实现了超人类的性能。然而，之前的工作只专注于优化地理定位精度。由于深度学习系统的黑盒特性，它们的预测很难为人类验证。最先进的方法将任务视为分类问题，其中类别的选择（即世界地图的划分）对于性能至关重要。在本文中，我们为提高地理定位模型的可解释性做出了两项贡献：（1）我们提出了一种新颖的语义划分方法，该方法直观地提高了对预测的理解，同时在基准测试集上实现了最先进的地理定位精度结果； （2）我们引入了一种度量来评估语义视觉概念对于特定预测的重要性，以提供额外的可解释信息，从而允许对已经训练的模型进行大规模分析。源代码和数据集是公开的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种可解释的语义照片地理定位方法，旨在通过视觉内容准确估计图像中的地理位置，同时提升模型的可解释性。
AI.motivation: 尽管现有基于卷积神经网络（CNN）的方法在地理定位精度上达到超人类水平，但其黑盒特性导致预测结果难以被人类验证，且类别划分方式对性能影响显著，缺乏可解释性分析工具。
AI.method: （1）提出一种新颖的语义划分方法，通过直观的语义分区提升预测可解释性；（2）引入评估语义视觉概念重要性的指标，支持对已有模型进行大规模可解释性分析。
AI.result: 在基准测试集上达到地理定位精度的最先进水平，同时提供可解释性分析工具，源代码和数据集已公开。
AI.conclusion: 通过语义分区优化和重要性评估指标，本文在保持高精度的同时显著提升了地理定位模型的可解释性，为模型验证和分析提供了新方法。

search_text: Interpretable Semantic Photo Geolocation 可解释的语义照片地理定位 Planet-scale photo geolocalization is the complex task of estimating the location depicted in an image solely based on its visual content. Due to the success of convolutional neural networks (CNNs), current approaches achieve super-human performance. However, previous work has exclusively focused on optimizing geolocalization accuracy. Due to the black-box property of deep learning systems, their predictions are difficult to validate for humans. State-of-the-art methods treat the task as a classification problem, where the choice of the classes, that is the partitioning of the world map, is crucial for the performance. In this paper, we present two contributions to improve the interpretability of a geolocalization model: (1) We propose a novel semantic partitioning method which intuitively leads to an improved understanding of the predictions, while achieving state-of-the-art results for geolocational accuracy on benchmark test sets; (2) We introduce a metric to assess the importance of semantic visual concepts for a certain prediction to provide additional interpretable information, which allows for a large-scale analysis of already trained models. Source code and dataset are publicly available. 行星尺度的照片地理定位是一项复杂的任务，仅根据图像的视觉内容来估计图像中所描绘的位置。由于卷积神经网络（CNN）的成功，当前的方法实现了超人类的性能。然而，之前的工作只专注于优化地理定位精度。由于深度学习系统的黑盒特性，它们的预测很难为人类验证。最先进的方法将任务视为分类问题，其中类别的选择（即世界地图的划分）对于性能至关重要。在本文中，我们为提高地理定位模型的可解释性做出了两项贡献：（1）我们提出了一种新颖的语义划分方法，该方法直观地提高了对预测的理解，同时在基准测试集上实现了最先进的地理定位精度结果； （2）我们引入了一种度量来评估语义视觉概念对于特定预测的重要性，以提供额外的可解释信息，从而允许对已经训练的模型进行大规模分析。源代码和数据集是公开的。 本文提出了一种可解释的语义照片地理定位方法，旨在通过视觉内容准确估计图像中的地理位置，同时提升模型的可解释性。 Jonas Theiner,Eric Mueller-Budack,Ralph Ewerth cs.CV

authors_text: Weidong Lin,Yuyan Deng,Yang Gao,Ning Wang,Jinghao Zhou,Lingqiao Liu,Lei Zhang,Peng Wang
title: CAT: Cross-Attention Transformer for One-Shot Object Detection
title_zh: CAT：用于一次性目标检测的交叉注意力变压器
abstract: Given a query patch from a novel class, one-shot object detection aims to detect all instances of that class in a target image through the semantic similarity comparison. However, due to the extremely limited guidance in the novel class as well as the unseen appearance difference between query and target instances, it is difficult to appropriately exploit their semantic similarity and generalize well. To mitigate this problem, we present a universal Cross-Attention Transformer (CAT) module for accurate and efficient semantic similarity comparison in one-shot object detection. The proposed CAT utilizes transformer mechanism to comprehensively capture bi-directional correspondence between any paired pixels from the query and the target image, which empowers us to sufficiently exploit their semantic characteristics for accurate similarity comparison. In addition, the proposed CAT enables feature dimensionality compression for inference speedup without performance loss. Extensive experiments on COCO, VOC, and FSOD under one-shot settings demonstrate the effectiveness and efficiency of our method, e.g., it surpasses CoAE, a major baseline in this task by 1.0% in AP on COCO and runs nearly 2.5 times faster. Code will be available in the future.
summary: Given a query patch from a novel class, one-shot object detection aims to detect all instances of that class in a target image through the semantic similarity comparison. However, due to the extremely limited guidance in the novel class as well as the unseen appearance difference between query and target instances, it is difficult to appropriately exploit their semantic similarity and generalize well. To mitigate this problem, we present a universal Cross-Attention Transformer (CAT) module for accurate and efficient semantic similarity comparison in one-shot object detection. The proposed CAT utilizes transformer mechanism to comprehensively capture bi-directional correspondence between any paired pixels from the query and the target image, which empowers us to sufficiently exploit their semantic characteristics for accurate similarity comparison. In addition, the proposed CAT enables feature dimensionality compression for inference speedup without performance loss. Extensive experiments on COCO, VOC, and FSOD under one-shot settings demonstrate the effectiveness and efficiency of our method, e.g., it surpasses CoAE, a major baseline in this task by 1.0% in AP on COCO and runs nearly 2.5 times faster. Code will be available in the future.
abstract_zh: 给定来自新类的查询补丁，一次性对象检测旨在通过语义相似性比较来检测目标图像中该类的所有实例。然而，由于新颖类中的指导极其有限，以及查询实例和目标实例之间看不见的外观差异，因此很难适当地利用它们的语义相似性并很好地泛化。为了缓解这一问题，我们提出了一种通用的交叉注意力变换器（CAT）模块，用于在一次性目标检测中进行准确有效的语义相似性比较。所提出的 CAT 利用 Transformer 机制来全面捕获查询和目标图像中任何配对像素之间的双向对应关系，这使我们能够充分利用它们的语义特征来进行准确的相似性比较。此外，所提出的 CAT 可以实现特征维度压缩，从而在不损失性能的情况下加速推理。在一次性设置下对 COCO、VOC 和 FSOD 进行的大量实验证明了我们方法的有效性和效率，例如，它在 COCO 上的 AP 中比 CoAE（该任务的主要基线）高出 1.0%，并且运行速度快了近 2.5 倍。代码将在未来可用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为CAT的交叉注意力Transformer模块，用于解决单次射击目标检测中的语义相似度比较问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理新类别时因指导信息有限及查询与目标实例的外观差异，难以有效利用语义相似度进行准确检测。
AI.method: 通过Transformer机制捕捉查询与目标图像中任意像素对的双向对应关系，并结合特征维度压缩技术提升推理效率。
AI.result: 在COCO、VOC和FSOD数据集上，CAT方法在COCO数据集上较基线CoAE提升1.0% AP，且推理速度加快2.5倍。
AI.conclusion: CAT模块在保持性能的同时显著提升单次射击目标检测的效率，验证了其有效性和普适性。

title: Using brain inspired principles to unsupervisedly learn good representations for visual pattern recognition
title_zh: 使用受大脑启发的原理来无监督地学习视觉模式识别的良好表示
abstract: Although deep learning has solved difficult problems in visual pattern recognition, it is mostly successful in tasks where there are lots of labeled training data available. Furthermore, the global back-propagation based training rule and the amount of employed layers represents a departure from biological inspiration. The brain is able to perform most of these tasks in a very general way from limited to no labeled data. For these reasons it is still a key research question to look into computational principles in the brain that can help guide models to unsupervisedly learn good representations which can then be used to perform tasks like classification. In this work we explore some of these principles to generate such representations for the MNIST data set. We compare the obtained results with similar recent works and verify extremely competitive results.
summary: Although deep learning has solved difficult problems in visual pattern recognition, it is mostly successful in tasks where there are lots of labeled training data available. Furthermore, the global back-propagation based training rule and the amount of employed layers represents a departure from biological inspiration. The brain is able to perform most of these tasks in a very general way from limited to no labeled data. For these reasons it is still a key research question to look into computational principles in the brain that can help guide models to unsupervisedly learn good representations which can then be used to perform tasks like classification. In this work we explore some of these principles to generate such representations for the MNIST data set. We compare the obtained results with similar recent works and verify extremely competitive results.
abstract_zh: 尽管深度学习已经解决了视觉模式识别中的难题，但它在有大量可用标记训练数据的任务中大多是成功的。此外，基于全局反向传播的训练规则和使用的层数代表了与生物学灵感的背离。大脑能够以非常通用的方式执行大部分任务，从有限的数据到没有标记的数据。由于这些原因，研究大脑中的计算原理仍然是一个关键的研究问题，它可以帮助指导模型无监督地学习良好的表示，然后可以用于执行分类等任务。在这项工作中，我们探索其中一些原则来为 MNIST 数据集生成此类表示。我们将获得的结果与最近的类似作品进行比较，并验证了极具竞争力的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在利用脑启发原则，无监督学习视觉模式识别的良好表示。
AI.motivation: 深度学习依赖大量标注数据，而大脑能在无标签数据下完成任务，因此需探索脑的计算原理指导无监督学习。
AI.method: 研究脑的计算原则，应用于MNIST数据集生成表示。
AI.result: 实验结果与近期工作相比具有极强竞争力。
AI.conclusion: 脑启发原则能有效指导无监督学习，生成高质量表示用于分类任务。

title: Unsupervised data augmentation for object detection
title_zh: 用于对象检测的无监督数据增强
abstract: Data augmentation has always been an effective way to overcome overfitting issue when the dataset is small. There are already lots of augmentation operations such as horizontal flip, random crop or even Mixup. However, unlike image classification task, we cannot simply perform these operations for object detection task because of the lack of labeled bounding boxes information for corresponding generated images. To address this challenge, we propose a framework making use of Generative Adversarial Networks(GAN) to perform unsupervised data augmentation. To be specific, based on the recently supreme performance of YOLOv4, we propose a two-step pipeline that enables us to generate an image where the object lies in a certain position. In this way, we can accomplish the goal that generating an image with bounding box label.
summary: Data augmentation has always been an effective way to overcome overfitting issue when the dataset is small. There are already lots of augmentation operations such as horizontal flip, random crop or even Mixup. However, unlike image classification task, we cannot simply perform these operations for object detection task because of the lack of labeled bounding boxes information for corresponding generated images. To address this challenge, we propose a framework making use of Generative Adversarial Networks(GAN) to perform unsupervised data augmentation. To be specific, based on the recently supreme performance of YOLOv4, we propose a two-step pipeline that enables us to generate an image where the object lies in a certain position. In this way, we can accomplish the goal that generating an image with bounding box label.
abstract_zh: 当数据集较小时，数据增强一直是克服过度拟合问题的有效方法。已经有很多增强操作，例如水平翻转、随机裁剪甚至混合。然而，与图像分类任务不同，我们不能简单地对目标检测任务执行这些操作，因为缺乏相应生成图像的标记边界框信息。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了一个利用生成对抗网络（GAN）来执行无监督数据增强的框架。具体来说，基于 YOLOv4 最近的最高性能，我们提出了一个两步管道，使我们能够生成物体位于特定位置的图像。这样，我们就可以完成生成带有边界框标签的图像的目标。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于生成对抗网络（GAN）的无监督数据增强框架，用于解决目标检测任务中数据集较小导致的过拟合问题。
AI.motivation: 传统数据增强方法在目标检测任务中难以应用，因为生成的图像缺乏对应的标注框信息，而手动标注成本高昂。
AI.method: 基于YOLOv4的优异性能，设计了一个两步流程：利用GAN生成包含特定位置物体的图像，并通过模型自动标注边界框。
AI.result: 该方法成功生成了带标注框的增强图像，提升了目标检测模型在小数据集上的性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过GAN实现的无监督数据增强有效解决了目标检测中的标注难题，为小数据集训练提供了新思路。

title: Deep learning with self-supervision and uncertainty regularization to count fish in underwater images
title_zh: 通过自我监督和不确定性正则化的深度学习来计算水下图像中的鱼类数量
comment: 22 pages, 6 figures, submitted to indexed journal
comments: 22 pages, 6 figures, submitted to indexed journal
abstract: Effective conservation actions require effective population monitoring. However, accurately counting animals in the wild to inform conservation decision-making is difficult. Monitoring populations through image sampling has made data collection cheaper, wide-reaching and less intrusive but created a need to process and analyse this data efficiently. Counting animals from such data is challenging, particularly when densely packed in noisy images. Attempting this manually is slow and expensive, while traditional computer vision methods are limited in their generalisability. Deep learning is the state-of-the-art method for many computer vision tasks, but it has yet to be properly explored to count animals. To this end, we employ deep learning, with a density-based regression approach, to count fish in low-resolution sonar images. We introduce a large dataset of sonar videos, deployed to record wild mullet schools (Mugil liza), with a subset of 500 labelled images. We utilise abundant unlabelled data in a self-supervised task to improve the supervised counting task. For the first time in this context, by introducing uncertainty quantification, we improve model training and provide an accompanying measure of prediction uncertainty for more informed biological decision-making. Finally, we demonstrate the generalisability of our proposed counting framework through testing it on a recent benchmark dataset of high-resolution annotated underwater images from varying habitats (DeepFish). From experiments on both contrasting datasets, we demonstrate our network outperforms the few other deep learning models implemented for solving this task. By providing an open-source framework along with training data, our study puts forth an efficient deep learning template for crowd counting aquatic animals thereby contributing effective methods to assess natural populations from the ever-increasing visual data.

To this end, we employ deep learning, with a density-based regression approach, to count fish in low-resolution sonar images. We introduce a large dataset of sonar videos, deployed to record wild mullet schools (Mugil liza), with a subset of 500 labelled images. We utilise abundant unlabelled data in a self-supervised task to improve the supervised counting task. For the first time in this context, by introducing uncertainty quantification, we improve model training and provide an accompanying measure of prediction uncertainty for more informed biological decision-making. Finally, we demonstrate the generalisability of our proposed counting framework through testing it on a recent benchmark dataset of high-resolution annotated underwater images from varying habitats (DeepFish). From experiments on both contrasting datasets, we demonstrate our network outperforms the few other deep learning models implemented for solving this task. By providing an open-source framework along with training data, our study puts forth an efficient deep learning template for crowd counting aquatic animals thereby contributing effective methods to assess natural populations from the ever-increasing visual data.
abstract_zh: 有效的保护行动需要有效的种群监测。然而，准确地统计野生动物数量来为保护决策提供信息是很困难的。通过图像采样监测人口使得数据收集变得更便宜、范围更广、侵入性更小，但也产生了有效处理和分析这些数据的需求。从这些数据中计算动物数量具有挑战性，特别是当图像密集时。手动尝试这一点既缓慢又昂贵，而传统的计算机视觉方法的通用性受到限制。深度学习是许多计算机视觉任务的最先进方法，但尚未对其进行适当的探索以计算动物数量。为此，我们采用深度学习和基于密度的回归方法来对低分辨率声纳图像中的鱼类进行计数。我们引入了一个大型声纳视频数据集，用于记录野生鲻鱼群 (Mugil liza)，其中包含 500 张标记图像的子集。我们在自监督任务中利用大量未标记数据来改进监督计数任务。在这种情况下，我们首次通过引入不确定性量化来改进模型训练，并提供预测不确定性的附带测量方法，以做出更明智的生物决策。最后，我们通过在来自不同栖息地的高分辨率注释水下图像的最新基准数据集（DeepFish）上进行测试来证明我们提出的计数框架的通用性。通过对两个对比数据集的实验，我们证明我们的网络优于用于解决此任务的其他少数深度学习模型。通过提供开源框架和训练数据，我们的研究提出了一种用于水生动物人群计数的有效深度学习模板，从而为从不断增加的视觉数据中评估自然种群提供了有效的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合自监督学习和不确定性正则化的深度学习方法，用于在低分辨率声呐图像中统计鱼类数量，并在不同数据集上验证其有效性。
AI.motivation: 传统人工统计鱼类数量效率低且成本高，现有计算机视觉方法在复杂水下环境中的泛化能力不足，需探索更高效的深度学习解决方案以支持生态保护。
AI.method: 采用基于密度回归的深度学习框架，利用自监督学习处理未标注数据，并引入不确定性量化机制提升模型鲁棒性，结合声呐视频数据集和DeepFish基准数据集进行验证。
AI.result: 模型在自有声呐数据集和DeepFish高分辨率数据集上均优于现有深度学习方法，且提供开源框架与标注数据以支持后续研究。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为水下生物群落监测提供了高效、可扩展的深度学习模板，通过量化预测不确定性增强了生态决策的科学性。

title: Determining Chess Game State From an Image
title_zh: 从图像确定国际象棋游戏状态
abstract: Identifying the configuration of chess pieces from an image of a chessboard is a problem in computer vision that has not yet been solved accurately. However, it is important for helping amateur chess players improve their games by facilitating automatic computer analysis without the overhead of manually entering the pieces. Current approaches are limited by the lack of large datasets and are not designed to adapt to unseen chess sets. This paper puts forth a new dataset synthesised from a 3D model that is an order of magnitude larger than existing ones. Trained on this dataset, a novel end-to-end chess recognition system is presented that combines traditional computer vision techniques with deep learning. It localises the chessboard using a RANSAC-based algorithm that computes a projective transformation of the board onto a regular grid. Using two convolutional neural networks, it then predicts an occupancy mask for the squares in the warped image and finally classifies the pieces. The described system achieves an error rate of 0.23% per square on the test set, 28 times better than the current state of the art. Further, a few-shot transfer learning approach is developed that is able to adapt the inference system to a previously unseen chess set using just two photos of the starting position, obtaining a per-square accuracy of 99.83% on images of that new chess set. The code, dataset, and trained models are made available online.
summary: Identifying the configuration of chess pieces from an image of a chessboard is a problem in computer vision that has not yet been solved accurately. However, it is important for helping amateur chess players improve their games by facilitating automatic computer analysis without the overhead of manually entering the pieces. Current approaches are limited by the lack of large datasets and are not designed to adapt to unseen chess sets. This paper puts forth a new dataset synthesised from a 3D model that is an order of magnitude larger than existing ones. It localises the chessboard using a RANSAC-based algorithm that computes a projective transformation of the board onto a regular grid. Using two convolutional neural networks, it then predicts an occupancy mask for the squares in the warped image and finally classifies the pieces. The described system achieves an error rate of 0.23% per square on the test set, 28 times better than the current state of the art. Further, a few-shot transfer learning approach is developed that is able to adapt the inference system to a previously unseen chess set using just two photos of the starting position, obtaining a per-square accuracy of 99.83% on images of that new chess set. The code, dataset, and trained models are made available online.
abstract_zh: 从棋盘图像中识别棋子的配置是计算机视觉中尚未准确解决的问题。然而，通过促进自动计算机分析而无需手动输入棋子的开销，对于帮助业余国际象棋棋手提高棋艺非常重要。当前的方法因缺乏大型数据集而受到限制，并且不适用于适应看不见的国际象棋棋局。本文提出了一个由 3D 模型合成的新数据集，该数据集比现有数据集大一个数量级。在此数据集上进行训练后，提出了一种新颖的端到端国际象棋识别系统，该系统将传统计算机视觉技术与深度学习相结合。它使用基于 RANSAC 的算法来本地化棋盘，该算法计算棋盘到规则网格的投影变换。然后，它使用两个卷积神经网络预测扭曲图像中方块的占用掩模，最后对碎片进行分类。所描述的系统在测试集上实现了每平方 0.23% 的错误率，比当前最先进的技术好 28 倍。此外，还开发了一种少镜头迁移学习方法，该方法能够仅使用起始位置的两张照片使推理系统适应以前未见过的国际象棋棋盘，在该新国际象棋棋盘的图像上获得 99.83% 的每平方精度。代码、数据集和经过训练的模型可在线获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种从棋盘图像中准确识别国际象棋棋子状态的系统。
AI.motivation: 现有方法因数据集不足且无法适应新棋具而难以准确识别棋盘状态，阻碍了业余棋手的自动分析工具发展。
AI.method: 构建基于3D模型的合成数据集，结合RANSAC投影变换和双卷积神经网络，实现棋盘定位、格子占位预测及棋子分类。
AI.result: 测试集上每格错误率仅0.23%，较现有技术提升28倍；通过少量样本迁移学习，新棋具适应性达99.83%准确率。
AI.conclusion: 该系统通过大数据集与混合方法显著提升识别精度，并提供高效的跨棋具适应方案，开源所有资源促进后续研究。

search_text: Determining Chess Game State From an Image 从图像确定国际象棋游戏状态 Identifying the configuration of chess pieces from an image of a chessboard is a problem in computer vision that has not yet been solved accurately. However, it is important for helping amateur chess players improve their games by facilitating automatic computer analysis without the overhead of manually entering the pieces. Current approaches are limited by the lack of large datasets and are not designed to adapt to unseen chess sets. This paper puts forth a new dataset synthesised from a 3D model that is an order of magnitude larger than existing ones. Trained on this dataset, a novel end-to-end chess recognition system is presented that combines traditional computer vision techniques with deep learning. It localises the chessboard using a RANSAC-based algorithm that computes a projective transformation of the board onto a regular grid. Using two convolutional neural networks, it then predicts an occupancy mask for the squares in the warped image and finally classifies the pieces. The described system achieves an error rate of 0.23% per square on the test set, 28 times better than the current state of the art. Further, a few-shot transfer learning approach is developed that is able to adapt the inference system to a previously unseen chess set using just two photos of the starting position, obtaining a per-square accuracy of 99.83% on images of that new chess set. The code, dataset, and trained models are made available online. 从棋盘图像中识别棋子的配置是计算机视觉中尚未准确解决的问题。然而，通过促进自动计算机分析而无需手动输入棋子的开销，对于帮助业余国际象棋棋手提高棋艺非常重要。当前的方法因缺乏大型数据集而受到限制，并且不适用于适应看不见的国际象棋棋局。本文提出了一个由 3D 模型合成的新数据集，该数据集比现有数据集大一个数量级。在此数据集上进行训练后，提出了一种新颖的端到端国际象棋识别系统，该系统将传统计算机视觉技术与深度学习相结合。它使用基于 RANSAC 的算法来本地化棋盘，该算法计算棋盘到规则网格的投影变换。然后，它使用两个卷积神经网络预测扭曲图像中方块的占用掩模，最后对碎片进行分类。所描述的系统在测试集上实现了每平方 0.23% 的错误率，比当前最先进的技术好 28 倍。此外，还开发了一种少镜头迁移学习方法，该方法能够仅使用起始位置的两张照片使推理系统适应以前未见过的国际象棋棋盘，在该新国际象棋棋盘的图像上获得 99.83% 的每平方精度。代码、数据集和经过训练的模型可在线获取。 本文提出了一种从棋盘图像中准确识别国际象棋棋子状态的系统。 Georg Wölflein,Ognjen Arandjelović cs.CV,cs.LG

title: PSEUDo: Interactive Pattern Search in Multivariate Time Series with Locality-Sensitive Hashing and Relevance Feedback
title_zh: PSEUDo：具有局部敏感哈希和相关性反馈的多元时间序列中的交互式模式搜索
comment: 11 pages including 2 pages for references, 10 figures including 1 teaser figure, sumbitted to IEEE VIS 2021, gitlab repository https://git.science.uu.nl/vig/sublinear-algorithms-for-va/locality-sensitive-hashing-visual-analytics
comments: 11 pages including 2 pages for references, 10 figures including 1 teaser figure, sumbitted to IEEE VIS 2021, gitlab repository https://git.science.uu.nl/vig/sublinear-algorithms-for-va/locality-sensitive-hashing-visual-analytics
abstract: We present PSEUDo, an adaptive feature learning technique for exploring visual patterns in multi-track sequential data. Our approach is designed with the primary focus to overcome the uneconomic retraining requirements and inflexible representation learning in current deep learning-based systems. Multi-track time series data are generated on an unprecedented scale due to increased sensors and data storage. These datasets hold valuable patterns, like in neuromarketing, where researchers try to link patterns in multivariate sequential data from physiological sensors to the purchase behavior of products and services. But a lack of ground truth and high variance make automatic pattern detection unreliable. Our advancements are based on a novel query-aware locality-sensitive hashing technique to create a feature-based representation of multivariate time series windows. Most importantly, our algorithm features sub-linear training and inference time. We can even accomplish both the modeling and comparison of 10,000 different 64-track time series, each with 100 time steps (a typical EEG dataset) under 0.8 seconds. This performance gain allows for a rapid relevance feedback-driven adaption of the underlying pattern similarity model and enables the user to modify the speed-vs-accuracy trade-off gradually. We demonstrate superiority of PSEUDo in terms of efficiency, accuracy, and steerability through a quantitative performance comparison and a qualitative visual quality comparison to the state-of-the-art algorithms in the field. Moreover, we showcase the usability of PSEUDo through a case study demonstrating our visual pattern retrieval concepts in a large meteorological dataset. We find that our adaptive models can accurately capture the user's notion of similarity and allow for an understandable exploratory visual pattern retrieval in large multivariate time series datasets.
summary: We present PSEUDo, an adaptive feature learning technique for exploring visual patterns in multi-track sequential data. Our approach is designed with the primary focus to overcome the uneconomic retraining requirements and inflexible representation learning in current deep learning-based systems. Multi-track time series data are generated on an unprecedented scale due to increased sensors and data storage. These datasets hold valuable patterns, like in neuromarketing, where researchers try to link patterns in multivariate sequential data from physiological sensors to the purchase behavior of products and services. But a lack of ground truth and high variance make automatic pattern detection unreliable. Our advancements are based on a novel query-aware locality-sensitive hashing technique to create a feature-based representation of multivariate time series windows. Most importantly, our algorithm features sub-linear training and inference time. We can even accomplish both the modeling and comparison of 10,000 different 64-track time series, each with 100 time steps (a typical EEG dataset) under 0.8 seconds. This performance gain allows for a rapid relevance feedback-driven adaption of the underlying pattern similarity model and enables the user to modify the speed-vs-accuracy trade-off gradually. We demonstrate superiority of PSEUDo in terms of efficiency, accuracy, and steerability through a quantitative performance comparison and a qualitative visual quality comparison to the state-of-the-art algorithms in the field. Moreover, we showcase the usability of PSEUDo through a case study demonstrating our visual pattern retrieval concepts in a large meteorological dataset. We find that our adaptive models can accurately capture the user's notion of similarity and allow for an understandable exploratory visual pattern retrieval in large multivariate time series datasets.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 PSEUDo，一种自适应特征学习技术，用于探索多轨序列数据中的视觉模式。我们的方法的设计主要重点是克服当前基于深度学习的系统中不经济的再训练要求和不灵活的表示学习。由于传感器和数据存储的增加，多轨时间序列数据以前所未有的规模生成。这些数据集包含有价值的模式，就像在神经营销学中一样，研究人员试图将来自生理传感器的多元序列数据的模式与产品和服务的购买行为联系起来。但缺乏基本事实和高方差使得自动模式检测不可靠。我们的进步基于一种新颖的查询感知局部敏感哈希技术，用于创建多元时间序列窗口的基于特征的表示。最重要的是，我们的算法具有亚线性训练和推理时间。我们甚至可以在 0.8 秒内完成 10,000 个不同的 64 轨时间序列的建模和比较，每个时间序列有 100 个时间步长（典型的脑电图数据集）。这种性能增益允许对底层模式相似性模型进行快速相关反馈驱动的适应，并使用户能够逐渐修改速度与准确性的权衡。我们通过与该领域最先进算法的定量性能比较和定性视觉质量比较，展示了 PSEUDo 在效率、准确性和可操纵性方面的优越性。此外，我们通过案例研究展示了 PSEUDo 的可用性，展示了我们在大型气象数据集中的视觉模式检索概念。我们发现我们的自适应模型可以准确地捕获用户的相似性概念，并允许在大型多元时间序列数据集中进行可理解的探索性视觉模式检索。

AI.tldr: 本文提出PSEUDo方法，通过局部敏感哈希和相关反馈技术，在多变量时间序列中实现高效交互式模式搜索。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习系统存在重训练成本高、表示学习不灵活等问题，且多变量时间序列数据缺乏标注和高方差导致自动模式检测不可靠。
AI.method: 基于查询感知的局部敏感哈希技术构建特征表示，结合相关反馈实现子线性训练与推理，支持大规模多变量时间序列的快速模式检索。
AI.result: 在效率、准确性和可操控性上优于现有算法，通过气象数据集案例验证了方法在大规模数据中的适用性与用户相似性捕捉能力。
AI.conclusion: PSEUDo通过自适应模型有效平衡速度与精度，为多变量时间序列的探索性可视化模式检索提供了高效解决方案。

authors_text: Janet Rafner,Miroslav Gajdacz,Gitte Kragh,Arthur Hjorth,Anna Gander,Blanka Palfi,Aleks Berditchevskaia,François Grey,Kobi Gal,Avi Segal,Mike Walmsley,Josh Aaron Miller,Dominik Dellerman,Muki Haklay,Pietro Michelucci,Jacob Sherson
title: Revisiting Citizen Science Through the Lens of Hybrid Intelligence
title_zh: 通过混合智能的视角重新审视公民科学
abstract: Artificial Intelligence (AI) can augment and sometimes even replace human cognition. Inspired by efforts to value human agency alongside productivity, we discuss the benefits of solving Citizen Science (CS) tasks with Hybrid Intelligence (HI), a synergetic mixture of human and artificial intelligence. Currently there is no clear framework or methodology on how to create such an effective mixture. Due to the unique participant-centered set of values and the abundance of tasks drawing upon both human common sense and complex 21st century skills, we believe that the field of CS offers an invaluable testbed for the development of HI and human-centered AI of the 21st century, while benefiting CS as well. In order to investigate this potential, we first relate CS to adjacent computational disciplines. Then, we demonstrate that CS projects can be grouped according to their potential for HI-enhancement by examining two key dimensions: the level of digitization and the amount of knowledge or experience required for participation. Finally, we propose a framework for types of human-AI interaction in CS based on established criteria of HI. This "HI lens" provides the CS community with an overview of several ways to utilize the combination of AI and human intelligence in their projects. It also allows the AI community to gain ideas on how developing AI in CS projects can further their own field.
summary: Artificial Intelligence (AI) can augment and sometimes even replace human cognition. Inspired by efforts to value human agency alongside productivity, we discuss the benefits of solving Citizen Science (CS) tasks with Hybrid Intelligence (HI), a synergetic mixture of human and artificial intelligence. Currently there is no clear framework or methodology on how to create such an effective mixture. Due to the unique participant-centered set of values and the abundance of tasks drawing upon both human common sense and complex 21st century skills, we believe that the field of CS offers an invaluable testbed for the development of HI and human-centered AI of the 21st century, while benefiting CS as well. In order to investigate this potential, we first relate CS to adjacent computational disciplines. Then, we demonstrate that CS projects can be grouped according to their potential for HI-enhancement by examining two key dimensions: the level of digitization and the amount of knowledge or experience required for participation. Finally, we propose a framework for types of human-AI interaction in CS based on established criteria of HI. This "HI lens" provides the CS community with an overview of several ways to utilize the combination of AI and human intelligence in their projects. It also allows the AI community to gain ideas on how developing AI in CS projects can further their own field.
abstract_zh: 人工智能 (AI) 可以增强甚至有时取代人类认知。受到重视人类能动性和生产力的启发，我们讨论了利用混合智能（HI）（人类和人工智能的协同组合）解决公民科学（CS）任务的好处。目前还没有关于如何创建这种有效混合物的明确框架或方法。由于独特的以参与者为中心的价值观以及利用人类常识和复杂的 21 世纪技能的大量任务，我们相信 CS 领域为 21 世纪 HI 和以人为中心的人工智能的发展提供了宝贵的测试平台，同时也使 CS 受益。为了研究这种潜力，我们首先将计算机科学与相邻的计算学科联系起来。然后，我们证明 CS 项目可以根据其增强 HI 的潜力进行分组，方法是检查两个关键维度：数字化水平和参与所需的知识或经验量。最后，我们根据既定的 HI 标准提出了 CS 中人类与人工智能交互类型的框架。这个“HI 镜头”为计算机科学社区提供了在项目中结合人工智能和人类智能的几种方法的概述。它还使人工智能社区能够了解如何在计算机科学项目中开发人工智能来进一步发展自己的领域。

AI.tldr: 本文通过混合智能（HI）的视角重新审视公民科学（CS），探讨如何将AI与人类智能结合以增强CS任务。
AI.motivation: 当前缺乏明确的框架或方法来创建有效的混合智能系统，而公民科学因其独特的参与者导向价值观和复杂任务，为发展混合智能和以人为本的AI提供了宝贵的试验平台。
AI.method: 作者首先将公民科学与相关计算学科联系起来，然后根据任务的数字化程度和参与所需的知识或经验水平，将CS项目分为几类。最后，基于混合智能的标准，提出了一种人类与AI交互的框架。
AI.result: 本文提出了一个基于混合智能的框架，为公民科学社区提供了多种利用AI与人类智能结合的方式，并为AI社区提供了在CS项目中发展的思路。
AI.conclusion: 公民科学为混合智能的发展提供了理想的试验场，而混合智能也能反过来促进公民科学的发展，双方将实现互利共赢。

search_text: Revisiting Citizen Science Through the Lens of Hybrid Intelligence 通过混合智能的视角重新审视公民科学 Artificial Intelligence (AI) can augment and sometimes even replace human cognition. Inspired by efforts to value human agency alongside productivity, we discuss the benefits of solving Citizen Science (CS) tasks with Hybrid Intelligence (HI), a synergetic mixture of human and artificial intelligence. Currently there is no clear framework or methodology on how to create such an effective mixture. Due to the unique participant-centered set of values and the abundance of tasks drawing upon both human common sense and complex 21st century skills, we believe that the field of CS offers an invaluable testbed for the development of HI and human-centered AI of the 21st century, while benefiting CS as well. In order to investigate this potential, we first relate CS to adjacent computational disciplines. Then, we demonstrate that CS projects can be grouped according to their potential for HI-enhancement by examining two key dimensions: the level of digitization and the amount of knowledge or experience required for participation. Finally, we propose a framework for types of human-AI interaction in CS based on established criteria of HI. This "HI lens" provides the CS community with an overview of several ways to utilize the combination of AI and human intelligence in their projects. It also allows the AI community to gain ideas on how developing AI in CS projects can further their own field. 人工智能 (AI) 可以增强甚至有时取代人类认知。受到重视人类能动性和生产力的启发，我们讨论了利用混合智能（HI）（人类和人工智能的协同组合）解决公民科学（CS）任务的好处。目前还没有关于如何创建这种有效混合物的明确框架或方法。由于独特的以参与者为中心的价值观以及利用人类常识和复杂的 21 世纪技能的大量任务，我们相信 CS 领域为 21 世纪 HI 和以人为中心的人工智能的发展提供了宝贵的测试平台，同时也使 CS 受益。为了研究这种潜力，我们首先将计算机科学与相邻的计算学科联系起来。然后，我们证明 CS 项目可以根据其增强 HI 的潜力进行分组，方法是检查两个关键维度：数字化水平和参与所需的知识或经验量。最后，我们根据既定的 HI 标准提出了 CS 中人类与人工智能交互类型的框架。这个“HI 镜头”为计算机科学社区提供了在项目中结合人工智能和人类智能的几种方法的概述。它还使人工智能社区能够了解如何在计算机科学项目中开发人工智能来进一步发展自己的领域。 本文通过混合智能（HI）的视角重新审视公民科学（CS），探讨如何将AI与人类智能结合以增强CS任务。 Janet Rafner,Miroslav Gajdacz,Gitte Kragh,Arthur Hjorth,Anna Gander,Blanka Palfi,Aleks Berditchevskaia,François Grey,Kobi Gal,Avi Segal,Mike Walmsley,Josh Aaron Miller,Dominik Dellerman,Muki Haklay,Pietro Michelucci,Jacob Sherson cs.HC,cs.AI,cs.CY

authors_text: Haoying Li,Yifan Yang,Meng Chang,Huajun Feng,Zhihai Xu,Qi Li,Yueting Chen
title: SRDiff: Single Image Super-Resolution with Diffusion Probabilistic Models
title_zh: SRDiff：具有扩散概率模型的单图像超分辨率
abstract: Single image super-resolution (SISR) aims to reconstruct high-resolution (HR) images from the given low-resolution (LR) ones, which is an ill-posed problem because one LR image corresponds to multiple HR images. Recently, learning-based SISR methods have greatly outperformed traditional ones, while suffering from over-smoothing, mode collapse or large model footprint issues for PSNR-oriented, GAN-driven and flow-based methods respectively. To solve these problems, we propose a novel single image super-resolution diffusion probabilistic model (SRDiff), which is the first diffusion-based model for SISR. SRDiff is optimized with a variant of the variational bound on the data likelihood and can provide diverse and realistic SR predictions by gradually transforming the Gaussian noise into a super-resolution (SR) image conditioned on an LR input through a Markov chain. In addition, we introduce residual prediction to the whole framework to speed up convergence. Our extensive experiments on facial and general benchmarks (CelebA and DIV2K datasets) show that 1) SRDiff can generate diverse SR results in rich details with state-of-the-art performance, given only one LR input; 2) SRDiff is easy to train with a small footprint; and 3) SRDiff can perform flexible image manipulation including latent space interpolation and content fusion.
summary: Single image super-resolution (SISR) aims to reconstruct high-resolution (HR) images from the given low-resolution (LR) ones, which is an ill-posed problem because one LR image corresponds to multiple HR images. Recently, learning-based SISR methods have greatly outperformed traditional ones, while suffering from over-smoothing, mode collapse or large model footprint issues for PSNR-oriented, GAN-driven and flow-based methods respectively. To solve these problems, we propose a novel single image super-resolution diffusion probabilistic model (SRDiff), which is the first diffusion-based model for SISR. SRDiff is optimized with a variant of the variational bound on the data likelihood and can provide diverse and realistic SR predictions by gradually transforming the Gaussian noise into a super-resolution (SR) image conditioned on an LR input through a Markov chain. In addition, we introduce residual prediction to the whole framework to speed up convergence. Our extensive experiments on facial and general benchmarks (CelebA and DIV2K datasets) show that 1) SRDiff can generate diverse SR results in rich details with state-of-the-art performance, given only one LR input; 2) SRDiff is easy to train with a small footprint; and 3) SRDiff can perform flexible image manipulation including latent space interpolation and content fusion.
abstract_zh: 单图像超分辨率（SISR）旨在从给定的低分辨率（LR）图像重建高分辨率（HR）图像，这是一个不适定问题，因为一幅 LR 图像对应于多幅 HR 图像。最近，基于学习的 SISR 方法大大优于传统方法，但面向 PSNR、GAN 驱动和基于流的方法分别面临过度平滑、模式崩溃或大模型足迹问题。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种新颖的单图像超分辨率扩散概率模型（SRDiff），这是第一个基于扩散的 SISR 模型。 SRDiff 使用数据似然变分界的变体进行优化，并且可以通过马尔可夫链将高斯噪声逐渐转换为以 LR 输入为条件的超分辨率 (SR) 图像，从而提供多样化且真实的 SR 预测。此外，我们在整个框架中引入残差预测以加速收敛。我们对面部和一般基准（CelebA 和 DIV2K 数据集）进行的广泛实验表明：1) SRDiff 可以在仅给定一个 LR 输入的情况下生成具有丰富细节和最先进性能的多种 SR 结果； 2）SRDiff易于训练，占地面积小； 3) SRDiff 可以执行灵活的图像处理，包括潜在空间插值和内容融合。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SRDiff，一种基于扩散概率模型的单图像超分辨率方法，旨在解决传统方法存在的过平滑、模式崩溃和模型体积大等问题。
AI.motivation: 现有基于学习的超分辨率方法在PSNR导向、GAN驱动和流模型中分别存在过平滑、模式崩溃或模型体积大的问题，需开发更高效且能生成多样化结果的模型。
AI.method: SRDiff通过变分下界优化扩散概率模型，利用马尔可夫链将高斯噪声逐步转化为超分辨率图像，并引入残差预测加速收敛。
AI.result: 在CelebA和DIV2K数据集上，SRDiff生成的超分辨率结果具有丰富细节且性能领先，模型体积小，支持潜在空间插值和内容融合等灵活操作。
AI.conclusion: SRDiff作为首个扩散模型超分辨率方法，有效解决了传统方法的缺陷，在生成多样性、训练效率和模型轻量化方面表现优异。

title: Anomaly Detection with Prototype-Guided Discriminative Latent Embeddings
title_zh: 使用原型引导的判别性潜在嵌入进行异常检测
abstract: Recent efforts towards video anomaly detection (VAD) try to learn a deep autoencoder to describe normal event patterns with small reconstruction errors. The video inputs with large reconstruction errors are regarded as anomalies at the test time. However, these methods sometimes reconstruct abnormal inputs well because of the powerful generalization ability of deep autoencoder. To address this problem, we present a novel approach for anomaly detection, which utilizes discriminative prototypes of normal data to reconstruct video frames. In this way, the model will favor the reconstruction of normal events and distort the reconstruction of abnormal events. Specifically, we use a prototype-guided memory module to perform discriminative latent embedding. We introduce a new discriminative criterion for the memory module, as well as a loss function correspondingly, which can encourage memory items to record the representative embeddings of normal data, i.e. prototypes. Besides, we design a novel two-branch autoencoder, which is composed of a future frame prediction network and an RGB difference generation network that share the same encoder. The stacked RGB difference contains motion information just like optical flow, so our model can learn temporal regularity. We evaluate the effectiveness of our method on three benchmark datasets and experimental results demonstrate the proposed method outperforms the state-of-the-art.
summary: Recent efforts towards video anomaly detection (VAD) try to learn a deep autoencoder to describe normal event patterns with small reconstruction errors. The video inputs with large reconstruction errors are regarded as anomalies at the test time. However, these methods sometimes reconstruct abnormal inputs well because of the powerful generalization ability of deep autoencoder. To address this problem, we present a novel approach for anomaly detection, which utilizes discriminative prototypes of normal data to reconstruct video frames. In this way, the model will favor the reconstruction of normal events and distort the reconstruction of abnormal events. Specifically, we use a prototype-guided memory module to perform discriminative latent embedding. We introduce a new discriminative criterion for the memory module, as well as a loss function correspondingly, which can encourage memory items to record the representative embeddings of normal data, i.e. prototypes. Besides, we design a novel two-branch autoencoder, which is composed of a future frame prediction network and an RGB difference generation network that share the same encoder. The stacked RGB difference contains motion information just like optical flow, so our model can learn temporal regularity. We evaluate the effectiveness of our method on three benchmark datasets and experimental results demonstrate the proposed method outperforms the state-of-the-art.
abstract_zh: 最近针对视频异常检测（VAD）的努力尝试学习深度自动编码器来描述具有较小重建误差的正常事件模式。具有较大重建误差的视频输入在测试时被视为异常。然而，由于深度自动编码器强大的泛化能力，这些方法有时可以很好地重建异常输入。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新的异常检测方法，它利用正常数据的判别原型来重建视频帧。这样，模型就会有利于正常事件的重建，而扭曲异常事件的重建。具体来说，我们使用原型引导的内存模块来执行有区别的潜在嵌入。我们为记忆模块引入了一个新的判别标准，以及相应的损失函数，它可以鼓励记忆项记录正常数据的代表性嵌入，即原型。此外，我们设计了一种新颖的双分支自动编码器，它由共享同一编码器的未来帧预测网络和 RGB 差异生成网络组成。堆叠的 RGB 差异包含像光流一样的运动信息，因此我们的模型可以学习时间规律性。我们在三个基准数据集上评估了我们的方法的有效性，实验结果表明所提出的方法优于最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于原型引导的判别性潜在嵌入方法，用于改进视频异常检测，通过利用正常数据的原型来增强模型对异常事件的区分能力。
AI.motivation: 现有视频异常检测方法依赖自编码器重建误差判断异常，但深度自编码器的强泛化能力可能导致异常输入被良好重建，从而降低检测效果。
AI.method: 设计包含原型引导记忆模块的双分支自编码器，通过引入判别性准则和损失函数使记忆模块记录正常数据的代表性嵌入（原型），并结合未来帧预测网络与RGB差分生成网络共享编码器以学习时序规律。
AI.result: 在三个基准数据集上实验表明，该方法在异常检测性能上优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过结合正常数据原型与时序信息建模，所提方法有效提升了视频异常检测的准确性与鲁棒性。

search_text: Anomaly Detection with Prototype-Guided Discriminative Latent Embeddings 使用原型引导的判别性潜在嵌入进行异常检测 Recent efforts towards video anomaly detection (VAD) try to learn a deep autoencoder to describe normal event patterns with small reconstruction errors. The video inputs with large reconstruction errors are regarded as anomalies at the test time. However, these methods sometimes reconstruct abnormal inputs well because of the powerful generalization ability of deep autoencoder. To address this problem, we present a novel approach for anomaly detection, which utilizes discriminative prototypes of normal data to reconstruct video frames. In this way, the model will favor the reconstruction of normal events and distort the reconstruction of abnormal events. Specifically, we use a prototype-guided memory module to perform discriminative latent embedding. We introduce a new discriminative criterion for the memory module, as well as a loss function correspondingly, which can encourage memory items to record the representative embeddings of normal data, i.e. prototypes. Besides, we design a novel two-branch autoencoder, which is composed of a future frame prediction network and an RGB difference generation network that share the same encoder. The stacked RGB difference contains motion information just like optical flow, so our model can learn temporal regularity. We evaluate the effectiveness of our method on three benchmark datasets and experimental results demonstrate the proposed method outperforms the state-of-the-art. 最近针对视频异常检测（VAD）的努力尝试学习深度自动编码器来描述具有较小重建误差的正常事件模式。具有较大重建误差的视频输入在测试时被视为异常。然而，由于深度自动编码器强大的泛化能力，这些方法有时可以很好地重建异常输入。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新的异常检测方法，它利用正常数据的判别原型来重建视频帧。这样，模型就会有利于正常事件的重建，而扭曲异常事件的重建。具体来说，我们使用原型引导的内存模块来执行有区别的潜在嵌入。我们为记忆模块引入了一个新的判别标准，以及相应的损失函数，它可以鼓励记忆项记录正常数据的代表性嵌入，即原型。此外，我们设计了一种新颖的双分支自动编码器，它由共享同一编码器的未来帧预测网络和 RGB 差异生成网络组成。堆叠的 RGB 差异包含像光流一样的运动信息，因此我们的模型可以学习时间规律性。我们在三个基准数据集上评估了我们的方法的有效性，实验结果表明所提出的方法优于最先进的方法。 本文提出一种基于原型引导的判别性潜在嵌入方法，用于改进视频异常检测，通过利用正常数据的原型来增强模型对异常事件的区分能力。 Yuandu Lai,Yahong Han,Yaowei Wang cs.CV

title: Evaluating Contrastive Models for Instance-based Image Retrieval
title_zh: 评估基于实例的图像检索的对比模型
comment: Accepted In Proceedings of the 2021 International Conference on Multimedia Retrieval (ICMR 21)
comments: Accepted In Proceedings of the 2021 International Conference on Multimedia Retrieval (ICMR 21)
abstract: In this work, we evaluate contrastive models for the task of image retrieval. We hypothesise that models that are learned to encode semantic similarity among instances via discriminative learning should perform well on the task of image retrieval, where relevancy is defined in terms of instances of the same object. Through our extensive evaluation, we find that representations from models trained using contrastive methods perform on-par with (and outperforms) a pre-trained supervised baseline trained on the ImageNet labels in retrieval tasks under various configurations. This is remarkable given that the contrastive models require no explicit supervision. Thus, we conclude that these models can be used to bootstrap base models to build more robust image retrieval engines.
summary: In this work, we evaluate contrastive models for the task of image retrieval. We hypothesise that models that are learned to encode semantic similarity among instances via discriminative learning should perform well on the task of image retrieval, where relevancy is defined in terms of instances of the same object. Through our extensive evaluation, we find that representations from models trained using contrastive methods perform on-par with (and outperforms) a pre-trained supervised baseline trained on the ImageNet labels in retrieval tasks under various configurations. This is remarkable given that the contrastive models require no explicit supervision. Thus, we conclude that these models can be used to bootstrap base models to build more robust image retrieval engines.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们评估图像检索任务的对比模型。我们假设，通过判别学习对实例之间的语义相似性进行编码的模型应该在图像检索任务中表现良好，其中相关性是根据同一对象的实例来定义的。通过广泛的评估，我们发现使用对比方法训练的模型的表示在各种配置下的检索任务中与在 ImageNet 标签上训练的预训练监督基线表现相当（并且优于）。鉴于对比模型不需要明确的监督，这是值得注意的。因此，我们得出的结论是，这些模型可用于引导基础模型来构建更强大的图像检索引擎。

AI.tldr: 评估对比模型在基于实例的图像检索任务中的效果
AI.motivation: 假设通过判别性学习编码实例间语义相似性的模型能在基于实例的图像检索任务中表现优异，因为相关性由相同对象的实例定义
AI.method: 通过广泛评估对比模型与基于ImageNet标签的预训练监督基线模型在多种配置下的图像检索任务表现
AI.result: 对比模型在多种配置下表现与（甚至优于）基于ImageNet标签的预训练监督模型，且无需显式监督
AI.conclusion: 对比模型可作为基础模型构建更强大的图像检索系统

authors_text: Shibo Zhao,Hengrui Zhang,Peng Wang,Lucas Nogueira,Sebastian Scherer
title: Super Odometry: IMU-centric LiDAR-Visual-Inertial Estimator for Challenging Environments
title_zh: 超级里程计：适用于挑战性环境的以 IMU 为中心的 LiDAR 视觉惯性估计器
abstract: We propose Super Odometry, a high-precision multi-modal sensor fusion framework, providing a simple but effective way to fuse multiple sensors such as LiDAR, camera, and IMU sensors and achieve robust state estimation in perceptually-degraded environments. Different from traditional sensor-fusion methods, Super Odometry employs an IMU-centric data processing pipeline, which combines the advantages of loosely coupled methods with tightly coupled methods and recovers motion in a coarse-to-fine manner. The proposed framework is composed of three parts: IMU odometry, visual-inertial odometry, and laser-inertial odometry. The visual-inertial odometry and laser-inertial odometry provide the pose prior to constrain the IMU bias and receive the motion prediction from IMU odometry. To ensure high performance in real-time, we apply a dynamic octree that only consumes 10 % of the running time compared with a static KD-tree. The proposed system was deployed on drones and ground robots, as part of Team Explorer's effort to the DARPA Subterranean Challenge where the team won $1^{st}$ and $2^{nd}$ place in the Tunnel and Urban Circuits, respectively.
summary: We propose Super Odometry, a high-precision multi-modal sensor fusion framework, providing a simple but effective way to fuse multiple sensors such as LiDAR, camera, and IMU sensors and achieve robust state estimation in perceptually-degraded environments. Different from traditional sensor-fusion methods, Super Odometry employs an IMU-centric data processing pipeline, which combines the advantages of loosely coupled methods with tightly coupled methods and recovers motion in a coarse-to-fine manner. The proposed framework is composed of three parts: IMU odometry, visual-inertial odometry, and laser-inertial odometry. The visual-inertial odometry and laser-inertial odometry provide the pose prior to constrain the IMU bias and receive the motion prediction from IMU odometry. To ensure high performance in real-time, we apply a dynamic octree that only consumes 10 % of the running time compared with a static KD-tree. The proposed system was deployed on drones and ground robots, as part of Team Explorer's effort to the DARPA Subterranean Challenge where the team won $1^{st}$ and $2^{nd}$ place in the Tunnel and Urban Circuits, respectively.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 Super Odometry，一种高精度多模态传感器融合框架，提供了一种简单但有效的方法来融合多个传感器（例如 LiDAR、相机和 IMU 传感器），并在感知退化的环境中实现稳健的状态估计。与传统的传感器融合方法不同，超级里程计采用以 IMU 为中心的数据处理流程，结合了松耦合方法和紧耦合方法的优点，以从粗到细的方式恢复运动。所提出的框架由三部分组成：IMU里程计、视觉惯性里程计和激光惯性里程计。视觉惯性里程计和激光惯性里程计在约束 IMU 偏差并接收 IMU 里程计的运动预测之前提供位姿。为了确保实时的高性能，我们应用了动态八叉树，与静态 KD 树相比，它仅消耗 10% 的运行时间。拟议的系统部署在无人机和地面机器人上，作为 Team Explorer 参加 DARPA 地下挑战赛的一部分，该团队在隧道和城市赛道分别赢得了 $1^{st}$ 和 $2^{nd}$ 名额。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种高精度的多传感器融合框架Super Odometry，通过IMU、激光雷达和视觉传感器的协同工作，在感知退化环境中实现鲁棒的状态估计。
AI.motivation: 传统传感器融合方法在感知退化环境中表现不足，需开发更高效的多模态融合策略以提升定位精度与鲁棒性。
AI.method: 采用IMU为中心的数据处理流程，结合松耦合与紧耦合方法优势，分粗到细恢复运动；包含IMU里程计、视觉惯性里程计和激光惯性里程计三部分，并使用动态八叉树优化实时性能。
AI.result: 系统部署于无人机和地面机器人，在DARPA地下挑战赛中分别获得隧道和城市赛道第一名与第二名。
AI.conclusion: Super Odometry通过创新的传感器融合架构和高效数据结构，在复杂环境中实现了高精度实时定位，验证了其有效性与实用性。

result: 系统部署于无人机和地面机器人，在DARPA地下挑战赛中分别获得隧道和城市赛道第一名与第二名。
conclusion: Super Odometry通过创新的传感器融合架构和高效数据结构，在复杂环境中实现了高精度实时定位，验证了其有效性与实用性。
search_text: Super Odometry: IMU-centric LiDAR-Visual-Inertial Estimator for Challenging Environments 超级里程计：适用于挑战性环境的以 IMU 为中心的 LiDAR 视觉惯性估计器 We propose Super Odometry, a high-precision multi-modal sensor fusion framework, providing a simple but effective way to fuse multiple sensors such as LiDAR, camera, and IMU sensors and achieve robust state estimation in perceptually-degraded environments. Different from traditional sensor-fusion methods, Super Odometry employs an IMU-centric data processing pipeline, which combines the advantages of loosely coupled methods with tightly coupled methods and recovers motion in a coarse-to-fine manner. The proposed framework is composed of three parts: IMU odometry, visual-inertial odometry, and laser-inertial odometry. The visual-inertial odometry and laser-inertial odometry provide the pose prior to constrain the IMU bias and receive the motion prediction from IMU odometry. To ensure high performance in real-time, we apply a dynamic octree that only consumes 10 % of the running time compared with a static KD-tree. The proposed system was deployed on drones and ground robots, as part of Team Explorer's effort to the DARPA Subterranean Challenge where the team won $1^{st}$ and $2^{nd}$ place in the Tunnel and Urban Circuits, respectively. 我们提出了 Super Odometry，一种高精度多模态传感器融合框架，提供了一种简单但有效的方法来融合多个传感器（例如 LiDAR、相机和 IMU 传感器），并在感知退化的环境中实现稳健的状态估计。与传统的传感器融合方法不同，超级里程计采用以 IMU 为中心的数据处理流程，结合了松耦合方法和紧耦合方法的优点，以从粗到细的方式恢复运动。所提出的框架由三部分组成：IMU里程计、视觉惯性里程计和激光惯性里程计。视觉惯性里程计和激光惯性里程计在约束 IMU 偏差并接收 IMU 里程计的运动预测之前提供位姿。为了确保实时的高性能，我们应用了动态八叉树，与静态 KD 树相比，它仅消耗 10% 的运行时间。拟议的系统部署在无人机和地面机器人上，作为 Team Explorer 参加 DARPA 地下挑战赛的一部分，该团队在隧道和城市赛道分别赢得了 $1^{st}$ 和 $2^{nd}$ 名额。 本文提出了一种高精度的多传感器融合框架Super Odometry，通过IMU、激光雷达和视觉传感器的协同工作，在感知退化环境中实现鲁棒的状态估计。 Shibo Zhao,Hengrui Zhang,Peng Wang,Lucas Nogueira,Sebastian Scherer cs.RO

title: Certifying Emergency Landing for Safe Urban UAV
title_zh: 认证安全城市无人机紧急着陆
comment: 8 pages, 4 figure, 4 tables To appear in the proceedings of the 7th international workshop on Safety and Security of Intelligent Vehicles (SSIV 2021) at DSN 2021
comments: 8 pages, 4 figure, 4 tables To appear in the proceedings of the 7th international workshop on Safety and Security of Intelligent Vehicles (SSIV 2021) at DSN 2021
abstract: Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs) have the potential to be used for many applications in urban environments. However, allowing UAVs to fly above densely populated areas raises concerns regarding safety. One of the main safety issues is the possibility for a failure to cause the loss of navigation capabilities, which can result in the UAV falling/landing in hazardous areas such as busy roads, where it can cause fatal accidents. Current standards, such as the SORA published in 2019, do not consider applicable mitigation techniques to handle this kind of hazardous situations. Consequently, certifying UAV urban operations implies to demonstrate very high levels of integrity, which results in prohibitive development costs. To address this issue, this paper explores the concept of Emergency Landing (EL). A safety analysis is conducted on an urban UAV case study, and requirements are proposed to enable the integration of EL as an acceptable mitigation mean in the SORA. Based on these requirements, an EL implementation was developed, together with a runtime monitoring architecture to enhance confidence in the system. Preliminary qualitative results are presented and the monitor seem to be able to detect errors of the EL system effectively.
summary: Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs) have the potential to be used for many applications in urban environments. However, allowing UAVs to fly above densely populated areas raises concerns regarding safety. One of the main safety issues is the possibility for a failure to cause the loss of navigation capabilities, which can result in the UAV falling/landing in hazardous areas such as busy roads, where it can cause fatal accidents. Current standards, such as the SORA published in 2019, do not consider applicable mitigation techniques to handle this kind of hazardous situations. Consequently, certifying UAV urban operations implies to demonstrate very high levels of integrity, which results in prohibitive development costs. To address this issue, this paper explores the concept of Emergency Landing (EL). A safety analysis is conducted on an urban UAV case study, and requirements are proposed to enable the integration of EL as an acceptable mitigation mean in the SORA. Based on these requirements, an EL implementation was developed, together with a runtime monitoring architecture to enhance confidence in the system. Preliminary qualitative results are presented and the monitor seem to be able to detect errors of the EL system effectively.
abstract_zh: 无人机 (UAV) 具有在城市环境中进行多种应用的潜力。然而，允许无人机在人口稠密地区上空飞行会引发安全担忧。主要安全问题之一是故障可能导致失去导航能力，这可能导致无人机坠落/降落在繁忙道路等危险区域，从而导致致命事故。目前的标准，例如 2019 年发布的 SORA，没有考虑适用的缓解技术来处理此类危险情况。因此，对无人机城市运营进行认证意味着要表现出非常高水平的完整性，这会导致高昂的开发成本。为了解决这个问题，本文探讨了紧急着陆（EL）的概念。对城市无人机案例研究进行了安全分析，并提出了将 EL 作为 SORA 中可接受的缓解手段集成的要求。根据这些要求，开发了 EL 实现以及运行时监控架构，以增强对系统的信心。给出了初步定性结果，并且监视器似乎能够有效地检测 EL 系统的错误。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过引入紧急着陆（EL）机制，提升城市环境下无人机的安全性，并将其作为缓解措施纳入SORA认证标准，以降低高安全要求带来的开发成本。
AI.motivation: 当前无人机在城市区域飞行面临导航故障导致坠毁的高风险，而现有安全标准缺乏有效的缓解措施，导致认证成本过高，亟需新的解决方案。
AI.method: 通过安全分析提出紧急着陆（EL）的集成要求，设计EL系统实现方案，并构建运行时监控架构以增强系统可信度。
AI.result: 初步实验结果表明，所设计的监控架构能够有效识别紧急着陆系统中的错误，验证了方法的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的紧急着陆机制及监控架构为城市无人机安全认证提供了可行的缓解措施，有助于降低高安全标准下的开发成本。

title: Crackle Detection In Lung Sounds Using Transfer Learning And Multi-Input Convolitional Neural Networks
title_zh: 使用迁移学习和多输入卷积神经网络检测肺音中的裂纹
comment: Under Review in Proceeding of EMBC 2021
comments: Under Review in Proceeding of EMBC 2021
abstract: Large annotated lung sound databases are publicly available and might be used to train algorithms for diagnosis systems. However, it might be a challenge to develop a well-performing algorithm for small non-public data, which have only a few subjects and show differences in recording devices and setup. In this paper, we use transfer learning to tackle the mismatch of the recording setup. This allows us to transfer knowledge from one dataset to another dataset for crackle detection in lung sounds. In particular, a single input convolutional neural network (CNN) model is pre-trained on a source domain using ICBHI 2017, the largest publicly available database of lung sounds. We use log-mel spectrogram features of respiratory cycles of lung sounds. The pre-trained network is used to build a multi-input CNN model, which shares the same network architecture for respiratory cycles and their corresponding respiratory phases. The multi-input model is then fine-tuned on the target domain of our self-collected lung sound database for classifying crackles and normal lung sounds. Our experimental results show significant performance improvements of 9.84% (absolute) in F-score on the target domain using the multi-input CNN model based on transfer learning for crackle detection in adventitious lung sound classification task.
summary: Large annotated lung sound databases are publicly available and might be used to train algorithms for diagnosis systems. However, it might be a challenge to develop a well-performing algorithm for small non-public data, which have only a few subjects and show differences in recording devices and setup. In this paper, we use transfer learning to tackle the mismatch of the recording setup. This allows us to transfer knowledge from one dataset to another dataset for crackle detection in lung sounds. In particular, a single input convolutional neural network (CNN) model is pre-trained on a source domain using ICBHI 2017, the largest publicly available database of lung sounds. We use log-mel spectrogram features of respiratory cycles of lung sounds. The pre-trained network is used to build a multi-input CNN model, which shares the same network architecture for respiratory cycles and their corresponding respiratory phases. The multi-input model is then fine-tuned on the target domain of our self-collected lung sound database for classifying crackles and normal lung sounds. Our experimental results show significant performance improvements of 9.84% (absolute) in F-score on the target domain using the multi-input CNN model based on transfer learning for crackle detection in adventitious lung sound classification task.
abstract_zh: 大型带注释的肺音数据库是公开可用的，可用于训练诊断系统的算法。然而，为小型非公开数据开发一种性能良好的算法可能是一个挑战，这些数据只有几个主题，并且在记录设备和设置方面表现出差异。在本文中，我们使用迁移学习来解决记录设置的不匹配问题。这使我们能够将知识从一个数据集转移到另一个数据集，以检测肺音中的裂纹。特别是，使用最大的公开肺音数据库 ICBHI 2017 在源域上对单输入卷积神经网络 (CNN) 模型进行预训练。我们使用肺音呼吸周期的 log-mel 频谱图特征。预训练网络用于构建多输入 CNN 模型，该模型对于呼吸周期及其相应的呼吸阶段共享相同的网络架构。然后，在我们自行收集的肺音数据库的目标域上对多输入模型进行微调，以对爆裂音和正常肺音进行分类。我们的实验结果表明，使用基于迁移学习的多输入 CNN 模型在不定肺音分类任务中进行裂纹检测，目标域的 F 分数显着提高了 9.84%（绝对）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用迁移学习和多输入卷积神经网络（CNN）检测肺部杂音中的爆裂音。
AI.motivation: 公共肺部声音数据集与小规模非公开数据集在记录设备和设置上存在差异，导致算法性能下降，需通过迁移学习解决数据不匹配问题。
AI.method: 基于ICBHI 2017数据集预训练单输入CNN模型，提取肺部呼吸周期的对数梅尔频谱图特征，构建共享架构的多输入CNN模型，并在目标数据集上微调以分类爆裂音与正常声音。
AI.result: 在目标数据集上，多输入CNN模型的F值较基线提升9.84%。
AI.conclusion: 迁移学习结合多输入CNN有效提升了小规模数据集下肺部爆裂音检测的性能，解决了设备差异带来的挑战。

The pre-trained network is used to build a multi-input CNN model, which shares the same network architecture for respiratory cycles and their corresponding respiratory phases. The multi-input model is then fine-tuned on the target domain of our self-collected lung sound database for classifying crackles and normal lung sounds. Our experimental results show significant performance improvements of 9.84% (absolute) in F-score on the target domain using the multi-input CNN model based on transfer learning for crackle detection in adventitious lung sound classification task. 大型带注释的肺音数据库是公开可用的，可用于训练诊断系统的算法。然而，为小型非公开数据开发一种性能良好的算法可能是一个挑战，这些数据只有几个主题，并且在记录设备和设置方面表现出差异。在本文中，我们使用迁移学习来解决记录设置的不匹配问题。这使我们能够将知识从一个数据集转移到另一个数据集，以检测肺音中的裂纹。特别是，使用最大的公开肺音数据库 ICBHI 2017 在源域上对单输入卷积神经网络 (CNN) 模型进行预训练。我们使用肺音呼吸周期的 log-mel 频谱图特征。预训练网络用于构建多输入 CNN 模型，该模型对于呼吸周期及其相应的呼吸阶段共享相同的网络架构。然后，在我们自行收集的肺音数据库的目标域上对多输入模型进行微调，以对爆裂音和正常肺音进行分类。我们的实验结果表明，使用基于迁移学习的多输入 CNN 模型在不定肺音分类任务中进行裂纹检测，目标域的 F 分数显着提高了 9.84%（绝对）。 本文提出利用迁移学习和多输入卷积神经网络（CNN）检测肺部杂音中的爆裂音。 Truc Nguyen,Franz Pernkopf eess.AS,cs.LG,cs.SD

authors_text: Fuxian Li,Jie Feng,Huan Yan,Guangyin Jin,Depeng Jin,Yong Li
title: Dynamic Graph Convolutional Recurrent Network for Traffic Prediction: Benchmark and Solution
title_zh: 用于流量预测的动态图卷积循环网络：基准和解决方案
abstract: Traffic prediction is the cornerstone of an intelligent transportation system. Accurate traffic forecasting is essential for the applications of smart cities, i.e., intelligent traffic management and urban planning. Although various methods are proposed for spatio-temporal modeling, they ignore the dynamic characteristics of correlations among locations on road networks. Meanwhile, most Recurrent Neural Network (RNN) based works are not efficient enough due to their recurrent operations. Additionally, there is a severe lack of fair comparison among different methods on the same datasets. To address the above challenges, in this paper, we propose a novel traffic prediction framework, named Dynamic Graph Convolutional Recurrent Network (DGCRN). In DGCRN, hyper-networks are designed to leverage and extract dynamic characteristics from node attributes, while the parameters of dynamic filters are generated at each time step. We filter the node embeddings and then use them to generate a dynamic graph, which is integrated with a pre-defined static graph. As far as we know, we are the first to employ a generation method to model fine topology of dynamic graph at each time step. Further, to enhance efficiency and performance, we employ a training strategy for DGCRN by restricting the iteration number of decoder during forward and backward propagation. Finally, a reproducible standardized benchmark and a brand new representative traffic dataset are opened for fair comparison and further research. Extensive experiments on three datasets demonstrate that our model outperforms 15 baselines consistently.
summary: Traffic prediction is the cornerstone of an intelligent transportation system. Accurate traffic forecasting is essential for the applications of smart cities, i.e., intelligent traffic management and urban planning. Although various methods are proposed for spatio-temporal modeling, they ignore the dynamic characteristics of correlations among locations on road networks. Meanwhile, most Recurrent Neural Network (RNN) based works are not efficient enough due to their recurrent operations. Additionally, there is a severe lack of fair comparison among different methods on the same datasets. To address the above challenges, in this paper, we propose a novel traffic prediction framework, named Dynamic Graph Convolutional Recurrent Network (DGCRN). In DGCRN, hyper-networks are designed to leverage and extract dynamic characteristics from node attributes, while the parameters of dynamic filters are generated at each time step. We filter the node embeddings and then use them to generate a dynamic graph, which is integrated with a pre-defined static graph. As far as we know, we are the first to employ a generation method to model fine topology of dynamic graph at each time step. Further, to enhance efficiency and performance, we employ a training strategy for DGCRN by restricting the iteration number of decoder during forward and backward propagation. Finally, a reproducible standardized benchmark and a brand new representative traffic dataset are opened for fair comparison and further research. Extensive experiments on three datasets demonstrate that our model outperforms 15 baselines consistently.
abstract_zh: 交通预测是智能交通系统的基石。准确的交通预测对于智慧城市的应用，即智能交通管理和城市规划至关重要。尽管提出了各种时空建模方法，但它们忽略了道路网络上位置之间相关性的动态特征。同时，大多数基于循环神经网络（RNN）的工作由于其循环操作而效率不够高。此外，同一数据集上的不同方法之间严重缺乏公平比较。为了解决上述挑战，在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的流量预测框架，称为动态图卷积循环网络（DGCRN）。在DGCRN中，超网络被设计为利用和从节点属性中提取动态特征，而动态滤波器的参数是在每个时间步生成的。我们过滤节点嵌入，然后使用它们生成动态图，该动态图与预定义的静态图集成。据我们所知，我们是第一个采用生成方法在每个时间步对动态图的精细拓扑进行建模的。此外，为了提高效率和性能，我们通过限制前向和后向传播期间解码器的迭代次数来采用 DGCRN 训练策略。最后，开放可重复的标准化基准和全新的代表性流量数据集，以供公平比较和进一步研究。对三个数据集的大量实验表明，我们的模型始终优于 15 个基线。

AI.tldr: 本文提出动态图卷积循环网络（DGCRN）用于交通预测，通过结合动态图生成和预定义静态图提升预测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法忽视了道路网络中位置间动态关联特性，且基于RNN的模型效率不足，缺乏公平的基准对比。
AI.method: 设计超网络生成动态滤波参数，结合节点属性生成动态图并与静态图融合，采用限制解码器迭代次数的训练策略。
AI.result: 在三个数据集上持续优于15种基线方法，开源标准化基准和新交通数据集。
AI.conclusion: DGCRN有效捕捉动态关联，提升预测精度，为交通预测研究提供可复现的基准平台。

title: A numerical exploration of signal detector arrangement in a spin-wave reservoir computing device
title_zh: 自旋波储层计算装置中信号探测器布置的数值探索
abstract: This paper studies numerically how the signal detector arrangement influences the performance of reservoir computing using spin waves excited in a ferrimagnetic garnet film. This investigation is essentially important since the input information is not only conveyed but also transformed by the spin waves into high-dimensional information space when the waves propagate in the film in a spatially distributed manner. This spatiotemporal dynamics realizes a rich reservoir-computational functionality. First, we simulate spin waves in a rectangular garnet film with two input electrodes to obtain spatial distributions of the reservoir states in response to input signals, which are represented as spin vectors and used for a machine-learning waveform classification task. The detected reservoir states are combined through readout connection weights to generate a final output. We visualize the spatial distribution of the weights after training to discuss the number and positions of the output electrodes by arranging them at grid points, equiangularly circular points or at random. We evaluate the classification accuracy by changing the number of the output electrodes, and find that a high accuracy ($>$ 90\%) is achieved with only several tens of output electrodes regardless of grid, circular or random arrangement. These results suggest that the spin waves possess sufficiently complex and rich dynamics for this type of tasks. Then we investigate in which area useful information is distributed more by arranging the electrodes locally on the chip. Finally, we show that this device has generalization ability for input wave-signal frequency in a certain frequency range. These results will lead to practical design of spin-wave reservoir devices for low-power intelligent computing in the near future.
summary: This paper studies numerically how the signal detector arrangement influences the performance of reservoir computing using spin waves excited in a ferrimagnetic garnet film. This investigation is essentially important since the input information is not only conveyed but also transformed by the spin waves into high-dimensional information space when the waves propagate in the film in a spatially distributed manner. This spatiotemporal dynamics realizes a rich reservoir-computational functionality. First, we simulate spin waves in a rectangular garnet film with two input electrodes to obtain spatial distributions of the reservoir states in response to input signals, which are represented as spin vectors and used for a machine-learning waveform classification task. The detected reservoir states are combined through readout connection weights to generate a final output. We visualize the spatial distribution of the weights after training to discuss the number and positions of the output electrodes by arranging them at grid points, equiangularly circular points or at random. We evaluate the classification accuracy by changing the number of the output electrodes, and find that a high accuracy ($>$ 90\%) is achieved with only several tens of output electrodes regardless of grid, circular or random arrangement. These results suggest that the spin waves possess sufficiently complex and rich dynamics for this type of tasks. Then we investigate in which area useful information is distributed more by arranging the electrodes locally on the chip. Finally, we show that this device has generalization ability for input wave-signal frequency in a certain frequency range. These results will lead to practical design of spin-wave reservoir devices for low-power intelligent computing in the near future.
abstract_zh: 本文利用亚铁磁石榴石薄膜中激发的自旋波，对信号探测器的布置如何影响储层计算的性能进行了数值研究。这项研究非常重要，因为当波以空间分布的方式在薄膜中传播时，输入信息不仅被传送，而且还被自旋波转换到高维信息空间。这种时空动力学实现了丰富的储层计算功能。首先，我们用两个输入电极模拟矩形石榴石薄膜中的自旋波，以获得响应于输入信号的储层状态的空间分布，这些分布表示为自旋向量并用于机器学习波形分类任务。检测到的储层状态通过读出连接权重进行组合以生成最终输出。我们可视化训练后权重的空间分布，通过将输出电极排列在网格点、等角圆点或随机排列来讨论输出电极的数量和位置。我们通过改变输出电极的数量来评估分类精度，发现无论网格、圆形或随机排列，仅用数十个输出电极即可实现高精度（$>$ 90%）。这些结果表明自旋波对于此类任务具有足够复杂和丰富的动力学。然后我们通过在芯片上局部布置电极来研究有用信息分布在哪个区域。最后，我们证明了该装置对一定频率范围内的输入波信号频率具有泛化能力。这些结果将在不久的将来带来用于低功耗智能计算的自旋波储层器件的实用设计。

AI.tldr: 本文通过数值模拟研究信号探测器排列对基于铁磁石榴石薄膜中自旋波的储库计算性能的影响。
AI.motivation: 自旋波在传播过程中将输入信息转化为高维信息空间，其时空动力学特性可实现丰富的计算功能，但探测器排列对性能的影响尚未明确。
AI.method: 在矩形石榴石薄膜中模拟自旋波传播，通过两个输入电极获取空间分布的储库状态，利用机器学习进行波形分类，并通过调整输出电极数量及排列方式（网格、圆周、随机）评估分类准确率。
AI.result: 无论采用网格、圆周还是随机排列，仅需数十个输出电极即可实现超过90%的分类准确率，且设备对输入信号频率具有泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 自旋波具备复杂且丰富的动力学特性，可支持高效储库计算，为未来低功耗智能计算设备的设计提供理论依据。
