Then we investigate in which area useful information is distributed more by arranging the electrodes locally on the chip. Finally, we show that this device has generalization ability for input wave-signal frequency in a certain frequency range. These results will lead to practical design of spin-wave reservoir devices for low-power intelligent computing in the near future. 本文利用亚铁磁石榴石薄膜中激发的自旋波，对信号探测器的布置如何影响储层计算的性能进行了数值研究。这项研究非常重要，因为当波以空间分布的方式在薄膜中传播时，输入信息不仅被传送，而且还被自旋波转换到高维信息空间。这种时空动力学实现了丰富的储层计算功能。首先，我们用两个输入电极模拟矩形石榴石薄膜中的自旋波，以获得响应于输入信号的储层状态的空间分布，这些分布表示为自旋向量并用于机器学习波形分类任务。检测到的储层状态通过读出连接权重进行组合以生成最终输出。我们可视化训练后权重的空间分布，通过将输出电极排列在网格点、等角圆点或随机排列来讨论输出电极的数量和位置。我们通过改变输出电极的数量来评估分类精度，发现无论网格、圆形或随机排列，仅用数十个输出电极即可实现高精度（$>$ 90%）。这些结果表明自旋波对于此类任务具有足够复杂和丰富的动力学。然后我们通过在芯片上局部布置电极来研究有用信息分布在哪个区域。最后，我们证明了该装置对一定频率范围内的输入波信号频率具有泛化能力。这些结果将在不久的将来带来用于低功耗智能计算的自旋波储层器件的实用设计。 本文通过数值模拟研究信号探测器排列对基于铁磁石榴石薄膜中自旋波的储库计算性能的影响。 Takehiro Ichimura,Ryosho Nakane,Gouhei Tanaka,Akira Hirose cs.ET,physics.app-ph

authors_text: Yichao Yan,Jie Qin1,Jiaxin Chen,Li Liu,Fan Zhu,Ying Tai,Ling Shao
title: Learning Multi-Granular Hypergraphs for Video-Based Person Re-Identification
title_zh: 学习用于基于视频的人员重新识别的多粒度超图
abstract: Video-based person re-identification (re-ID) is an important research topic in computer vision. The key to tackling the challenging task is to exploit both spatial and temporal clues in video sequences. In this work, we propose a novel graph-based framework, namely Multi-Granular Hypergraph (MGH), to pursue better representational capabilities by modeling spatiotemporal dependencies in terms of multiple granularities. Specifically, hypergraphs with different spatial granularities are constructed using various levels of part-based features across the video sequence. In each hypergraph, different temporal granularities are captured by hyperedges that connect a set of graph nodes (i.e., part-based features) across different temporal ranges. Two critical issues (misalignment and occlusion) are explicitly addressed by the proposed hypergraph propagation and feature aggregation schemes. Finally, we further enhance the overall video representation by learning more diversified graph-level representations of multiple granularities based on mutual information minimization. Extensive experiments on three widely adopted benchmarks clearly demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed framework. Notably, 90.0% top-1 accuracy on MARS is achieved using MGH, outperforming the state-of-the-arts. Code is available at https://github.com/daodaofr/hypergraph_reid.
summary: Video-based person re-identification (re-ID) is an important research topic in computer vision. The key to tackling the challenging task is to exploit both spatial and temporal clues in video sequences. In this work, we propose a novel graph-based framework, namely Multi-Granular Hypergraph (MGH), to pursue better representational capabilities by modeling spatiotemporal dependencies in terms of multiple granularities. Specifically, hypergraphs with different spatial granularities are constructed using various levels of part-based features across the video sequence. In each hypergraph, different temporal granularities are captured by hyperedges that connect a set of graph nodes (i.e., part-based features) across different temporal ranges. Two critical issues (misalignment and occlusion) are explicitly addressed by the proposed hypergraph propagation and feature aggregation schemes. Finally, we further enhance the overall video representation by learning more diversified graph-level representations of multiple granularities based on mutual information minimization. Extensive experiments on three widely adopted benchmarks clearly demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed framework. Notably, 90.0% top-1 accuracy on MARS is achieved using MGH, outperforming the state-of-the-arts. Code is available at https://github.com/daodaofr/hypergraph_reid.
abstract_zh: 基于视频的行人重新识别（re-ID）是计算机视觉领域的一个重要研究课题。解决具有挑战性的任务的关键是利用视频序列中的空间和时间线索。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的基于图的框架，即多粒度超图（MGH），通过根据多粒度建模时空依赖性来追求更好的表示能力。具体来说，具有不同空间粒度的超图是使用视频序列中不同级别的基于部分的特征来构建的。在每个超图中，不同的时间粒度由连接不同时间范围内的一组图节点（即基于部分的特征）的超边捕获。所提出的超图传播和特征聚合方案明确解决了两个关键问题（未对准和遮挡）。最后，我们通过基于互信息最小化学习更多样化的多粒度图级表示来进一步增强整体视频表示。对三个广泛采用的基准进行的大量实验清楚地证明了所提出的框架的有效性。值得注意的是，使用 MGH 在 MARS 上实现了 90.0% 的 top-1 准确率，优于最先进的技术。代码可在 https://github.com/daodaofr/hypergraph_reid 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多粒度超图框架（MGH），通过建模视频序列中的多粒度时空依赖关系，解决视频基于行人重识别中的挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以有效捕捉视频中复杂的时空线索，且存在遮挡和时空错位等关键问题，需更精细的多粒度建模以提升表示能力。
AI.method: 构建多粒度超图：1）使用不同空间粒度的部件特征生成超图；2）通过跨时序范围的超边捕捉时间粒度；3）设计超图传播与特征聚合方案解决遮挡与错位问题；4）基于互信息最小化学习多样化图级表示。
AI.result: 在MARS等三个基准数据集上实验表明，MGH达到90.0%的top-1准确率，显著优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 多粒度超图框架通过精细建模时空依赖关系，有效解决了视频行人重识别中的关键问题，验证了方法的有效性与先进性。

title: Nearest-Neighbor-based Collision Avoidance for Quadrotors via Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 通过强化学习实现四旋翼飞行器的最近邻碰撞避免
comment: Accepted to the 39th IEEE Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA). Fixed some typos
comments: Accepted to the 39th IEEE Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA). Fixed some typos
abstract: Collision avoidance algorithms are of central interest to many drone applications. In particular, decentralized approaches may be the key to enabling robust drone swarm solutions in cases where centralized communication becomes computationally prohibitive. In this work, we draw biological inspiration from flocks of starlings (Sturnus vulgaris) and apply the insight to end-to-end learned decentralized collision avoidance. More specifically, we propose a new, scalable observation model following a biomimetic nearest-neighbor information constraint that leads to fast learning and good collision avoidance behavior. By proposing a general reinforcement learning approach, we obtain an end-to-end learning-based approach to integrating collision avoidance with arbitrary tasks such as package collection and formation change. To validate the generality of this approach, we successfully apply our methodology through motion models of medium complexity, modeling momentum and nonetheless allowing direct application to real world quadrotors in conjunction with a standard PID controller. In contrast to prior works, we find that in our sufficiently rich motion model, nearest-neighbor information is indeed enough to learn effective collision avoidance behavior. Our learned policies are tested in simulation and subsequently transferred to real-world drones to validate their real-world applicability.
summary: Collision avoidance algorithms are of central interest to many drone applications. In particular, decentralized approaches may be the key to enabling robust drone swarm solutions in cases where centralized communication becomes computationally prohibitive. In this work, we draw biological inspiration from flocks of starlings (Sturnus vulgaris) and apply the insight to end-to-end learned decentralized collision avoidance. More specifically, we propose a new, scalable observation model following a biomimetic nearest-neighbor information constraint that leads to fast learning and good collision avoidance behavior. By proposing a general reinforcement learning approach, we obtain an end-to-end learning-based approach to integrating collision avoidance with arbitrary tasks such as package collection and formation change. To validate the generality of this approach, we successfully apply our methodology through motion models of medium complexity, modeling momentum and nonetheless allowing direct application to real world quadrotors in conjunction with a standard PID controller. In contrast to prior works, we find that in our sufficiently rich motion model, nearest-neighbor information is indeed enough to learn effective collision avoidance behavior. Our learned policies are tested in simulation and subsequently transferred to real-world drones to validate their real-world applicability.
abstract_zh: 防撞算法是许多无人机应用的核心关注点。特别是，在集中式通信在计算上变得令人望而却步的情况下，分散式方法可能是实现强大的无人机群解决方案的关键。在这项工作中，我们从八哥鸟群（Sturnus vulgaris）中汲取生物学灵感，并将见解应用于端到端学习的去中心化碰撞避免。更具体地说，我们提出了一种新的、可扩展的观察模型，遵循仿生最近邻信息约束，从而实现快速学习和良好的避免碰撞行为。通过提出一种通用的强化学习方法，我们获得了一种基于端到端学习的方法，将碰撞避免与任意任务（例如包收集和队形变化）相结合。为了验证这种方法的通用性，我们成功地将我们的方法应用于中等复杂度的运动模型、动量建模，并且仍然允许与标准 PID 控制器结合直接应用于现实世界的四旋翼飞行器。与之前的工作相比，我们发现在我们足够丰富的运动模型中，最近邻信息确实足以学习有效的避碰行为。我们学到的策略在模拟中进行测试，然后转移到现实世界的无人机上以验证其现实世界的适用性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于最近邻信息的分布式避障方法，通过强化学习实现四旋翼无人机群的端到端避障控制，适用于多种任务场景。
AI.motivation: 集中式避障算法在大规模无人机群中存在计算瓶颈，而生物群体（如椋鸟群）的最近邻交互机制可为分布式避障提供生物启发式解决方案。
AI.method: 设计仿生最近邻观察模型约束感知范围，结合强化学习框架实现避障策略与任务目标的端到端学习，并通过中等复杂度运动模型与PID控制器验证实际可行性。
AI.result: 在仿真环境中验证了方法的通用性，成功迁移至实体四旋翼无人机，实验表明最近邻信息足以学习有效避障行为且适用于复杂任务。
AI.conclusion: 基于最近邻的强化学习避障框架在足够表达的运动模型下表现优异，为无人机群实际应用提供了可扩展的分布式解决方案。

Our learned policies are tested in simulation and subsequently transferred to real-world drones to validate their real-world applicability. 防撞算法是许多无人机应用的核心关注点。特别是，在集中式通信在计算上变得令人望而却步的情况下，分散式方法可能是实现强大的无人机群解决方案的关键。在这项工作中，我们从八哥鸟群（Sturnus vulgaris）中汲取生物学灵感，并将见解应用于端到端学习的去中心化碰撞避免。更具体地说，我们提出了一种新的、可扩展的观察模型，遵循仿生最近邻信息约束，从而实现快速学习和良好的避免碰撞行为。通过提出一种通用的强化学习方法，我们获得了一种基于端到端学习的方法，将碰撞避免与任意任务（例如包收集和队形变化）相结合。为了验证这种方法的通用性，我们成功地将我们的方法应用于中等复杂度的运动模型、动量建模，并且仍然允许与标准 PID 控制器结合直接应用于现实世界的四旋翼飞行器。与之前的工作相比，我们发现在我们足够丰富的运动模型中，最近邻信息确实足以学习有效的避碰行为。我们学到的策略在模拟中进行测试，然后转移到现实世界的无人机上以验证其现实世界的适用性。 本文提出一种基于最近邻信息的分布式避障方法，通过强化学习实现四旋翼无人机群的端到端避障控制，适用于多种任务场景。 Ramzi Ourari,Kai Cui,Ahmed Elshamanhory,Heinz Koeppl cs.RO,cs.AI,cs.LG

title: Graph-Aware Evolutionary Algorithms for Influence Maximization
title_zh: 用于影响力最大化的图感知进化算法
comment: To be published in the proceedings of ACM Genetic and Evolutionary Computation Conference (GECCO) Companion 2021
comments: To be published in the proceedings of ACM Genetic and Evolutionary Computation Conference (GECCO) Companion 2021
abstract: Social networks represent nowadays in many contexts the main source of information transmission and the way opinions and actions are influenced. For instance, generic advertisements are way less powerful than suggestions from our contacts. However, this process hugely depends on the influence of people who disseminate these suggestions. Therefore modern marketing often involves paying some targeted users, or influencers, for advertising products or ideas. Finding the set of nodes in a social network that lead to the highest information spread -- the so-called Influence Maximization (IM) problem -- is therefore a pressing question and as such it has recently attracted a great research interest. In particular, several approaches based on Evolutionary Algorithms (EAs) have been proposed, although they are known to scale poorly with the graph size. In this paper, we tackle this limitation in two ways. Firstly, we use approximate fitness functions to speed up the EA. Secondly, we include into the EA various graph-aware mechanisms, such as smart initialization, custom mutations and node filtering, to facilitate the EA convergence. Our experiments show that the proposed modifications allow to obtain a relevant runtime gain and also improve, in some cases, the spread results.
summary: Social networks represent nowadays in many contexts the main source of information transmission and the way opinions and actions are influenced. For instance, generic advertisements are way less powerful than suggestions from our contacts. However, this process hugely depends on the influence of people who disseminate these suggestions. Therefore modern marketing often involves paying some targeted users, or influencers, for advertising products or ideas. Finding the set of nodes in a social network that lead to the highest information spread -- the so-called Influence Maximization (IM) problem -- is therefore a pressing question and as such it has recently attracted a great research interest. In particular, several approaches based on Evolutionary Algorithms (EAs) have been proposed, although they are known to scale poorly with the graph size. In this paper, we tackle this limitation in two ways. Firstly, we use approximate fitness functions to speed up the EA. Secondly, we include into the EA various graph-aware mechanisms, such as smart initialization, custom mutations and node filtering, to facilitate the EA convergence. Our experiments show that the proposed modifications allow to obtain a relevant runtime gain and also improve, in some cases, the spread results.
abstract_zh: 如今，社交网络在许多情况下代表了信息传输的主要来源以及意见和行动受到影响的方式。例如，通用广告的影响力远不如我们联系人的建议。然而，这个过程很大程度上取决于传播这些建议的人的影响力。因此，现代营销通常涉及向一些目标用户或影响者付费，以宣传产品或创意。因此，寻找社交网络中导致最高信息传播的节点集（即所谓的影响最大化（IM）问题）是一个紧迫的问题，因此最近引起了极大的研究兴趣。特别是，已经提出了几种基于进化算法（EA）的方法，尽管众所周知它们随图大小的扩展性很差。在本文中，我们通过两种方式解决这个限制。首先，我们使用近似适应度函数来加速 EA。其次，我们在 EA 中加入了各种图形感知机制，例如智能初始化、自定义突变和节点过滤，以促进 EA 收敛。我们的实验表明，所提出的修改可以获得相关的运行时间增益，并且在某些情况下还可以改善扩展结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合图感知机制的进化算法，用于解决社交网络中的影响力最大化问题。
AI.motivation: 传统进化算法在处理大规模社交网络时效率低下，难以满足实际应用需求。
AI.method: 采用近似适应度函数加速算法，并引入智能初始化、自定义突变和节点过滤等图感知机制。
AI.result: 实验表明方法在运行效率上取得显著提升，部分场景下信息传播效果也得到改善。
AI.conclusion: 图感知机制有效提升了进化算法在影响力最大化问题中的性能和可扩展性。

title: Deep Learning Based Steel Pipe Weld Defect Detection
title_zh: 基于深度学习的钢管焊缝缺陷检测
abstract: Steel pipes are widely used in high-risk and high-pressure scenarios such as oil, chemical, natural gas, shale gas, etc. If there is some defect in steel pipes, it will lead to serious adverse consequences. Applying object detection in the field of deep learning to pipe weld defect detection and identification can effectively improve inspection efficiency and promote the development of industrial automation. Most predecessors used traditional computer vision methods applied to detect defects of steel pipe weld seams. However, traditional computer vision methods rely on prior knowledge and can only detect defects with a single feature, so it is difficult to complete the task of multi-defect classification, while deep learning is end-to-end. In this paper, the state-of-the-art single-stage object detection algorithm YOLOv5 is proposed to be applied to the field of steel pipe weld defect detection, and compared with the two-stage representative object detection algorithm Faster R-CNN. The experimental results show that applying YOLOv5 to steel pipe weld defect detection can greatly improve the accuracy, complete the multi-classification task, and meet the criteria of real-time detection.
summary: Steel pipes are widely used in high-risk and high-pressure scenarios such as oil, chemical, natural gas, shale gas, etc. If there is some defect in steel pipes, it will lead to serious adverse consequences. Applying object detection in the field of deep learning to pipe weld defect detection and identification can effectively improve inspection efficiency and promote the development of industrial automation. Most predecessors used traditional computer vision methods applied to detect defects of steel pipe weld seams. However, traditional computer vision methods rely on prior knowledge and can only detect defects with a single feature, so it is difficult to complete the task of multi-defect classification, while deep learning is end-to-end. In this paper, the state-of-the-art single-stage object detection algorithm YOLOv5 is proposed to be applied to the field of steel pipe weld defect detection, and compared with the two-stage representative object detection algorithm Faster R-CNN. The experimental results show that applying YOLOv5 to steel pipe weld defect detection can greatly improve the accuracy, complete the multi-classification task, and meet the criteria of real-time detection.
abstract_zh: 钢管广泛应用于石油、化工、天然气、页岩气等高风险、高压场景，如果钢管存在缺陷，将会导致严重的不良后果。将深度学习领域的物体检测应用于管道焊缝缺陷检测与识别，可以有效提高检测效率，促进工业自动化的发展。大多数前辈使用传统的计算机视觉方法来检测钢管焊缝的缺陷。然而，传统的计算机视觉方法依赖于先验知识，只能检测单一特征的缺陷，因此很难完成多缺陷分类的任务，而深度学习是端到端的。本文提出将最先进的单阶段目标检测算法YOLOv5应用于钢管焊缝缺陷检测领域，并与两阶段代表性目标检测算法Faster R-CNN进行比较。实验结果表明，将YOLOv5应用于钢管焊缝缺陷检测，可以大大提高准确率，完成多分类任务，满足实时检测的标准。

AI.tldr: 本文提出将YOLOv5算法应用于钢制管道焊缝缺陷检测，以提升检测效率和多分类能力。
AI.motivation: 传统计算机视觉方法依赖先验知识且难以实现多缺陷分类，而深度学习的端到端特性可解决此问题。
AI.method: 采用YOLOv5单阶段检测算法并与Faster R-CNN双阶段算法进行对比实验。
AI.result: YOLOv5在钢制管道焊缝缺陷检测中显著提升准确率并满足实时检测需求。
AI.conclusion: YOLOv5算法适用于钢制管道焊缝缺陷检测任务，可有效推动工业自动化发展。

authors_text: Chi-Man Wong,Fan Feng,Wen Zhang,Chi-Man Vong,Hui Chen,Yichi Zhang,Peng He,Huan Chen,Kun Zhao,Huajun Chen
title: Improving Conversational Recommendation System by Pretraining on Billions Scale of Knowledge Graph
title_zh: 通过数十亿规模的知识图谱预训练改进会话推荐系统
comment: Paper is accepted by ICDE2021 industry track
comments: Paper is accepted by ICDE2021 industry track
abstract: Conversational Recommender Systems (CRSs) in E-commerce platforms aim to recommend items to users via multiple conversational interactions. Click-through rate (CTR) prediction models are commonly used for ranking candidate items. However, most CRSs are suffer from the problem of data scarcity and sparseness. To address this issue, we propose a novel knowledge-enhanced deep cross network (K-DCN), a two-step (pretrain and fine-tune) CTR prediction model to recommend items. We first construct a billion-scale conversation knowledge graph (CKG) from information about users, items and conversations, and then pretrain CKG by introducing knowledge graph embedding method and graph convolution network to encode semantic and structural information respectively.To make the CTR prediction model sensible of current state of users and the relationship between dialogues and items, we introduce user-state and dialogue-interaction representations based on pre-trained CKG and propose K-DCN.In K-DCN, we fuse the user-state representation, dialogue-interaction representation and other normal feature representations via deep cross network, which will give the rank of candidate items to be recommended.We experimentally prove that our proposal significantly outperforms baselines and show it's real application in Alime.
summary: Conversational Recommender Systems (CRSs) in E-commerce platforms aim to recommend items to users via multiple conversational interactions. Click-through rate (CTR) prediction models are commonly used for ranking candidate items. However, most CRSs are suffer from the problem of data scarcity and sparseness. To address this issue, we propose a novel knowledge-enhanced deep cross network (K-DCN), a two-step (pretrain and fine-tune) CTR prediction model to recommend items. We first construct a billion-scale conversation knowledge graph (CKG) from information about users, items and conversations, and then pretrain CKG by introducing knowledge graph embedding method and graph convolution network to encode semantic and structural information respectively.To make the CTR prediction model sensible of current state of users and the relationship between dialogues and items, we introduce user-state and dialogue-interaction representations based on pre-trained CKG and propose K-DCN.In K-DCN, we fuse the user-state representation, dialogue-interaction representation and other normal feature representations via deep cross network, which will give the rank of candidate items to be recommended.We experimentally prove that our proposal significantly outperforms baselines and show it's real application in Alime.
abstract_zh: 电子商务平台中的会话推荐系统（CRS）旨在通过多种会话交互向用户推荐商品。点击率 (CTR) 预测模型通常用于对候选项目进行排名。然而，大多数CRS都存在数据稀缺和稀疏的问题。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的知识增强深度交叉网络（K-DCN），这是一种用于推荐项目的两步（预训练和微调）CTR预测模型。我们首先从用户、项目和对话的信息构建一个十亿级的对话知识图谱（CKG），然后通过引入知识图嵌入方法和图卷积网络分别对语义和结构信息进行编码来预训练CKG。为了使CTR预测模型对用户当前状态以及对话和项目之间的关系敏感，我们引入了基于预训练CKG的用户状态和对话交互表示，并提出了K-DCN。在K-DCN中，我们融合了用户状态通过深度交叉网络表示、对话交互表示和其他正常特征表示，这将给出要推荐的候选项目的排名。我们通过实验证明我们的建议明显优于基线，并表明它在 Alime 中的实际应用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于大规模知识图谱预训练的对话推荐系统改进方法，解决电商场景下对话推荐因数据稀疏性导致的性能瓶颈问题。
AI.motivation: 现有对话推荐系统面临用户-商品交互数据稀疏、对话上下文语义建模不足等挑战，传统CTR模型难以有效捕捉复杂对话关系和知识关联。
AI.method: 构建百亿级对话知识图谱（CKG），结合知识图谱嵌入与图卷积网络进行预训练，提出融合用户状态表示、对话交互表示的K-DCN模型，通过深度交叉网络实现多模态特征融合。
AI.result: 在Alime实际场景验证中，K-DCN模型较基线方法提升显著，有效提升对话推荐的点击率和用户满意度指标。
AI.conclusion: 知识增强的预训练方法能有效缓解对话推荐的数据稀疏性问题，为电商场景下的多轮对话推荐提供新的技术路径。

search_text: Improving Conversational Recommendation System by Pretraining on Billions Scale of Knowledge Graph 通过数十亿规模的知识图谱预训练改进会话推荐系统 Conversational Recommender Systems (CRSs) in E-commerce platforms aim to recommend items to users via multiple conversational interactions. Click-through rate (CTR) prediction models are commonly used for ranking candidate items. However, most CRSs are suffer from the problem of data scarcity and sparseness. To address this issue, we propose a novel knowledge-enhanced deep cross network (K-DCN), a two-step (pretrain and fine-tune) CTR prediction model to recommend items. We first construct a billion-scale conversation knowledge graph (CKG) from information about users, items and conversations, and then pretrain CKG by introducing knowledge graph embedding method and graph convolution network to encode semantic and structural information respectively.To make the CTR prediction model sensible of current state of users and the relationship between dialogues and items, we introduce user-state and dialogue-interaction representations based on pre-trained CKG and propose K-DCN.In K-DCN, we fuse the user-state representation, dialogue-interaction representation and other normal feature representations via deep cross network, which will give the rank of candidate items to be recommended.We experimentally prove that our proposal significantly outperforms baselines and show it's real application in Alime. 电子商务平台中的会话推荐系统（CRS）旨在通过多种会话交互向用户推荐商品。点击率 (CTR) 预测模型通常用于对候选项目进行排名。然而，大多数CRS都存在数据稀缺和稀疏的问题。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的知识增强深度交叉网络（K-DCN），这是一种用于推荐项目的两步（预训练和微调）CTR预测模型。我们首先从用户、项目和对话的信息构建一个十亿级的对话知识图谱（CKG），然后通过引入知识图嵌入方法和图卷积网络分别对语义和结构信息进行编码来预训练CKG。为了使CTR预测模型对用户当前状态以及对话和项目之间的关系敏感，我们引入了基于预训练CKG的用户状态和对话交互表示，并提出了K-DCN。在K-DCN中，我们融合了用户状态通过深度交叉网络表示、对话交互表示和其他正常特征表示，这将给出要推荐的候选项目的排名。我们通过实验证明我们的建议明显优于基线，并表明它在 Alime 中的实际应用。 本文提出一种基于大规模知识图谱预训练的对话推荐系统改进方法，解决电商场景下对话推荐因数据稀疏性导致的性能瓶颈问题。 Chi-Man Wong,Fan Feng,Wen Zhang,Chi-Man Vong,Hui Chen,Yichi Zhang,Peng He,Huan Chen,Kun Zhao,Huajun Chen cs.IR,cs.AI

authors_text: Dimitrios Antoniadis,Peilong Feng,Andrea Mifsud,Timothy G. Constandinou
title: Open-Source Memory Compiler for Automatic RRAM Generation and Verification
title_zh: 用于自动 RRAM 生成和验证的开源内存编译器
abstract: The lack of open-source memory compilers in academia typically causes significant delays in research and design implementations. This paper presents an open-source memory compiler that is directly integrated within the Cadence Virtuoso environment using physical verification tools provided by Mentor Graphics (Calibre). It facilitates the entire memory generation process from netlist generation to layout implementation, and physical implementation verification. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first open-source memory compiler that has been developed specifically to automate Resistive Random Access Memory (RRAM) generation. RRAM holds the promise of achieving high speed, high density and non-volatility. A novel RRAM architecture, additionally is proposed, and a number of generated RRAM arrays are evaluated to identify their worst case control line parasitics and worst case settling time across the memristors of their cells. The total capacitance of lines SEL, N and P is 5.83 fF/cell, 3.31 fF/cell and 2.48 fF/cell respectively, while the total calculated resistance for SEL is 1.28 Ohm/cell and 0.14 Ohm/cell for both N and P lines.
summary: The lack of open-source memory compilers in academia typically causes significant delays in research and design implementations. This paper presents an open-source memory compiler that is directly integrated within the Cadence Virtuoso environment using physical verification tools provided by Mentor Graphics (Calibre). It facilitates the entire memory generation process from netlist generation to layout implementation, and physical implementation verification. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first open-source memory compiler that has been developed specifically to automate Resistive Random Access Memory (RRAM) generation. RRAM holds the promise of achieving high speed, high density and non-volatility. A novel RRAM architecture, additionally is proposed, and a number of generated RRAM arrays are evaluated to identify their worst case control line parasitics and worst case settling time across the memristors of their cells. The total capacitance of lines SEL, N and P is 5.83 fF/cell, 3.31 fF/cell and 2.48 fF/cell respectively, while the total calculated resistance for SEL is 1.28 Ohm/cell and 0.14 Ohm/cell for both N and P lines.
abstract_zh: 学术界缺乏开源内存编译器通常会导致研究和设计实现的严重延迟。本文介绍了一种开源内存编译器，它使用 Mentor Graphics (Calibre) 提供的物理验证工具直接集成到 Cadence Virtuoso 环境中。它促进了从网表生成到布局实现以及物理实现验证的整个存储器生成过程。据我们所知，这是第一个专门为自动生成电阻随机存取存储器（RRAM）而开发的开源内存编译器。 RRAM 有望实现高速、高密度和非易失性。此外还提出了一种新颖的 RRAM 架构，并对许多生成的 RRAM 阵列进行了评估，以确定其最坏情况控制线寄生效应以及其单元忆阻器上最坏情况的稳定时间。 SEL、N 和 P 线的总电容分别为 5.83 fF/cell、3.31 fF/cell 和 2.48 fF/cell，而 N 和 P 线的 SEL 总计算电阻分别为 1.28 Ohm/cell 和 0.14 Ohm/cell。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种开源内存编译器，用于在Cadence Virtuoso环境中自动化生成和验证电阻式随机存取存储器（RRAM）。
AI.motivation: 学术界缺乏开源内存编译器导致研究和设计实现显著延迟，而RRAM因其高速、高密度和非易失性特性具有重要应用前景，需专用工具支持。
AI.method: 基于Mentor Graphics的Calibre物理验证工具，在Cadence Virtuoso环境中开发开源内存编译器，涵盖从网表生成到布局验证的全流程，并提出新型RRAM架构以评估控制线寄生参数和稳定时间。
AI.result: 生成的RRAM阵列中，SEL、N、P控制线的总电容分别为5.83 fF/cell、3.31 fF/cell、2.48 fF/cell，SEL线电阻为1.28 Ohm/cell，N/P线电阻为0.14 Ohm/cell。
AI.conclusion: 该编译器是首个专为RRAM设计的开源工具，通过自动化流程和参数评估验证了其可行性，为高效内存设计提供支持。

authors_text: Junru Chen,Shiqing Geng,Yongluan Yan,Danyang Huang,Hao Liu,Yadong Li
title: Vehicle Re-identification Method Based on Vehicle Attribute and Mutual Exclusion Between Cameras
title_zh: 基于车辆属性和摄像机互斥的车辆重识别方法
abstract: Vehicle Re-identification aims to identify a specific vehicle across time and camera view. With the rapid growth of intelligent transportation systems and smart cities, vehicle Re-identification technology gets more and more attention. However, due to the difference of shooting angle and the high similarity of vehicles belonging to the same brand, vehicle re-identification becomes a great challenge for existing method. In this paper, we propose a vehicle attribute-guided method to re-rank vehicle Re-ID result. The attributes used include vehicle orientation and vehicle brand . We also focus on the camera information and introduce camera mutual exclusion theory to further fine-tune the search results. In terms of feature extraction, we combine the data augmentations of multi-resolutions with the large model ensemble to get a more robust vehicle features. Our method achieves mAP of 63.73% and rank-1 accuracy 76.61% in the CVPR 2021 AI City Challenge.
summary: Vehicle Re-identification aims to identify a specific vehicle across time and camera view. With the rapid growth of intelligent transportation systems and smart cities, vehicle Re-identification technology gets more and more attention. However, due to the difference of shooting angle and the high similarity of vehicles belonging to the same brand, vehicle re-identification becomes a great challenge for existing method. In this paper, we propose a vehicle attribute-guided method to re-rank vehicle Re-ID result. The attributes used include vehicle orientation and vehicle brand . We also focus on the camera information and introduce camera mutual exclusion theory to further fine-tune the search results. In terms of feature extraction, we combine the data augmentations of multi-resolutions with the large model ensemble to get a more robust vehicle features. Our method achieves mAP of 63.73% and rank-1 accuracy 76.61% in the CVPR 2021 AI City Challenge.
abstract_zh: 车辆重新识别旨在跨时间和摄像机视图识别特定车辆。随着智能交通系统和智慧城市的快速发展，车辆重识别技术受到越来越多的关注。然而，由于拍摄角度的差异以及同一品牌车辆的高度相似性，车辆重新识别成为现有方法的巨大挑战。在本文中，我们提出了一种车辆属性引导的方法来对车辆 Re-ID 结果进行重新排序。使用的属性包括车辆方向和车辆品牌。我们还关注相机信息并引入相机互斥理论来进一步微调搜索结果。在特征提取方面，我们将多分辨率的数据增强与大型模型集成相结合，以获得更鲁棒的车辆特征。我们的方法在 CVPR 2021 AI 城市挑战赛中实现了 63.73% 的 mAP 和 76.61% 的 1 级准确率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于车辆属性和摄像头互斥性的车辆重识别方法。
AI.motivation: 由于拍摄角度差异和相同品牌车辆的高相似性，现有车辆重识别方法面临挑战，因此需要更有效的识别方法。
AI.method: 本文采用车辆属性引导的方法对重识别结果进行重新排序，并引入摄像头互斥理论进一步优化搜索结果，同时结合多分辨率数据增强和大型模型集成提取更稳健的车辆特征。
AI.result: 该方法在CVPR 2021 AI City Challenge中取得了mAP为63.73%和rank-1准确率为76.61%的成绩。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过结合车辆属性和摄像头互斥性，有效提升了车辆重识别的性能。

tldr: 本文提出了一种基于车辆属性和摄像头互斥性的车辆重识别方法。
motivation: 由于拍摄角度差异和相同品牌车辆的高相似性，现有车辆重识别方法面临挑战，因此需要更有效的识别方法。
method: 本文采用车辆属性引导的方法对重识别结果进行重新排序，并引入摄像头互斥理论进一步优化搜索结果，同时结合多分辨率数据增强和大型模型集成提取更稳健的车辆特征。
result: 该方法在CVPR 2021 AI City Challenge中取得了mAP为63.73%和rank-1准确率为76.61%的成绩。
conclusion: 该方法通过结合车辆属性和摄像头互斥性，有效提升了车辆重识别的性能。
search_text: Vehicle Re-identification Method Based on Vehicle Attribute and Mutual Exclusion Between Cameras 基于车辆属性和摄像机互斥的车辆重识别方法 Vehicle Re-identification aims to identify a specific vehicle across time and camera view. With the rapid growth of intelligent transportation systems and smart cities, vehicle Re-identification technology gets more and more attention. However, due to the difference of shooting angle and the high similarity of vehicles belonging to the same brand, vehicle re-identification becomes a great challenge for existing method. In this paper, we propose a vehicle attribute-guided method to re-rank vehicle Re-ID result. The attributes used include vehicle orientation and vehicle brand . We also focus on the camera information and introduce camera mutual exclusion theory to further fine-tune the search results. In terms of feature extraction, we combine the data augmentations of multi-resolutions with the large model ensemble to get a more robust vehicle features. Our method achieves mAP of 63.73% and rank-1 accuracy 76.61% in the CVPR 2021 AI City Challenge. 车辆重新识别旨在跨时间和摄像机视图识别特定车辆。随着智能交通系统和智慧城市的快速发展，车辆重识别技术受到越来越多的关注。然而，由于拍摄角度的差异以及同一品牌车辆的高度相似性，车辆重新识别成为现有方法的巨大挑战。在本文中，我们提出了一种车辆属性引导的方法来对车辆 Re-ID 结果进行重新排序。使用的属性包括车辆方向和车辆品牌。我们还关注相机信息并引入相机互斥理论来进一步微调搜索结果。在特征提取方面，我们将多分辨率的数据增强与大型模型集成相结合，以获得更鲁棒的车辆特征。我们的方法在 CVPR 2021 AI 城市挑战赛中实现了 63.73% 的 mAP 和 76.61% 的 1 级准确率。 本文提出了一种基于车辆属性和摄像头互斥性的车辆重识别方法。 Junru Chen,Shiqing Geng,Yongluan Yan,Danyang Huang,Hao Liu,Yadong Li cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Adrià Casamitjana,Marco Lorenzi,Sebastiano Ferraris,Loc Peter,Marc Modat,Allison Stevens,Bruce Fischl,Tom Vercauteren,Juan Eugenio Iglesias
title: Robust joint registration of multiple stains and MRI for multimodal 3D histology reconstruction: Application to the Allen human brain atlas
title_zh: 用于多模态 3D 组织学重建的多种染色和 MRI 的稳健联合配准：在 Allen 人脑图谱中的应用
comment: Medical Image Analysis (Accepted on 07/10/2021). 22 pages, 11 figures,
comments: Medical Image Analysis (Accepted on 07/10/2021). 22 pages, 11 figures,
abstract: Joint registration of a stack of 2D histological sections to recover 3D structure (``3D histology reconstruction'') finds application in areas such as atlas building and validation of \emph{in vivo} imaging. Straightforward pairwise registration of neighbouring sections yields smooth reconstructions but has well-known problems such as ``banana effect'' (straightening of curved structures) and ``z-shift'' (drift). While these problems can be alleviated with an external, linearly aligned reference (e.g., Magnetic Resonance (MR) images), registration is often inaccurate due to contrast differences and the strong nonlinear distortion of the tissue, including artefacts such as folds and tears. In this paper, we present a probabilistic model of spatial deformation that yields reconstructions for multiple histological stains that that are jointly smooth, robust to outliers, and follow the reference shape. The model relies on a spanning tree of latent transforms connecting all the sections and slices of the reference volume, and assumes that the registration between any pair of images can be see as a noisy version of the composition of (possibly inverted) latent transforms connecting the two images. Bayesian inference is used to compute the most likely latent transforms given a set of pairwise registrations between image pairs within and across modalities. The framework is used for accurate 3D reconstruction of two stains (Nissl and parvalbumin) from the Allen human brain atlas, showing its benefits on real data with severe distortions. Moreover, we also provide the registration of the reconstructed volume to MNI space, bridging the gaps between two of the most widely used atlases in histology and MRI. The 3D reconstructed volumes and atlas registration can be downloaded from https://openneuro.org/datasets/ds003590. The code is freely available at https://github.com/acasamitjana/3dhirest.
summary: Joint registration of a stack of 2D histological sections to recover 3D structure (``3D histology reconstruction'') finds application in areas such as atlas building and validation of \emph{in vivo} imaging. Straightforward pairwise registration of neighbouring sections yields smooth reconstructions but has well-known problems such as ``banana effect'' (straightening of curved structures) and ``z-shift'' (drift). While these problems can be alleviated with an external, linearly aligned reference (e.g., Magnetic Resonance (MR) images), registration is often inaccurate due to contrast differences and the strong nonlinear distortion of the tissue, including artefacts such as folds and tears. In this paper, we present a probabilistic model of spatial deformation that yields reconstructions for multiple histological stains that that are jointly smooth, robust to outliers, and follow the reference shape. The model relies on a spanning tree of latent transforms connecting all the sections and slices of the reference volume, and assumes that the registration between any pair of images can be see as a noisy version of the composition of (possibly inverted) latent transforms connecting the two images. Bayesian inference is used to compute the most likely latent transforms given a set of pairwise registrations between image pairs within and across modalities. The framework is used for accurate 3D reconstruction of two stains (Nissl and parvalbumin) from the Allen human brain atlas, showing its benefits on real data with severe distortions. Moreover, we also provide the registration of the reconstructed volume to MNI space, bridging the gaps between two of the most widely used atlases in histology and MRI. The 3D reconstructed volumes and atlas registration can be downloaded from https://openneuro.org/datasets/ds003590. The code is freely available at https://github.com/acasamitjana/3dhirest.
abstract_zh: 联合配准一堆 2D 组织学切片以恢复 3D 结构（“3D 组织学重建”）可应用于图谱构建和 emph{体内} 成像验证等领域。相邻部分的直接成对配准可产生平滑的重建，但存在众所周知的问题，例如“香蕉效应”（弯曲结构的拉直）和“z 偏移”（漂移）。虽然可以通过外部线性对齐参考（例如磁共振 (MR) 图像）来缓解这些问题，但由于对比度差异和组织的强烈非线性失真（包括折叠和撕裂等伪影），配准通常不准确。在本文中，我们提出了一种空间变形的概率模型，该模型可以对多个组织学染色进行重建，这些染色共同平滑，对异常值具有鲁棒性，并且遵循参考形状。该模型依赖于连接参考体积的所有部分和切片的潜在变换的生成树，并假设任何图像对之间的配准可以被视为连接两个图像的（可能是反向的）潜在变换的组合的噪声版本。贝叶斯推理用于计算给定模态内和跨模态的图像对之间的一组成对配准的最可能的潜在变换。该框架用于对 Allen 人脑图谱中的两种染色剂（尼氏染色和小清蛋白）进行精确 3D 重建，显示了其对严重扭曲的真实数据的优势。此外，我们还提供重建体积到 MNI 空间的配准，弥合组织学和 MRI 中两个最广泛使用的图册之间的差距。 3D 重建体积和图集注册可以从 https://openneuro.org/datasets/ds003590 下载。该代码可在 https://github.com/acasamitjana/3dhirest 上免费获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种鲁棒的多染色与MRI联合配准方法，用于多模态3D组织学重建，并应用于Allen人类脑图谱。
AI.motivation: 传统逐对配准方法存在'香蕉效应'和'z漂移'等问题，且因对比度差异和组织非线性形变导致配准不准确，需借助外部参考（如MRI）提升精度。
AI.method: 构建基于潜在变换的生成树模型，通过贝叶斯推断计算最可能的潜在变换，实现跨模态图像对的鲁棒配准与联合平滑重建。
AI.result: 成功重建了Allen脑图谱中Nissl和parvalbumin两种染色的3D体积，并实现与MNI空间的注册，数据与代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了组织学重建中的非线性形变与异常值问题，为连接组织学与MRI两大主流图谱提供了关键技术支撑。

search_text: Robust joint registration of multiple stains and MRI for multimodal 3D histology reconstruction: Application to the Allen human brain atlas 用于多模态 3D 组织学重建的多种染色和 MRI 的稳健联合配准：在 Allen 人脑图谱中的应用 Joint registration of a stack of 2D histological sections to recover 3D structure (``3D histology reconstruction'') finds application in areas such as atlas building and validation of \emph{in vivo} imaging. The model relies on a spanning tree of latent transforms connecting all the sections and slices of the reference volume, and assumes that the registration between any pair of images can be see as a noisy version of the composition of (possibly inverted) latent transforms connecting the two images. Moreover, we also provide the registration of the reconstructed volume to MNI space, bridging the gaps between two of the most widely used atlases in histology and MRI. The 3D reconstructed volumes and atlas registration can be downloaded from https://openneuro.org/datasets/ds003590. title: Action in Mind: A Neural Network Approach to Action Recognition and Segmentation
title_zh: 心中的行动：动作识别和分割的神经网络方法
abstract: Recognizing and categorizing human actions is an important task with applications in various fields such as human-robot interaction, video analysis, surveillance, video retrieval, health care system and entertainment industry. This thesis presents a novel computational approach for human action recognition through different implementations of multi-layer architectures based on artificial neural networks. Each system level development is designed to solve different aspects of the action recognition problem including online real-time processing, action segmentation and the involvement of objects. The analysis of the experimental results are illustrated and described in six articles. The proposed action recognition architecture of this thesis is composed of several processing layers including a preprocessing layer, an ordered vector representation layer and three layers of neural networks. It utilizes self-organizing neural networks such as Kohonen feature maps and growing grids as the main neural network layers. Thus the architecture presents a biological plausible approach with certain features such as topographic organization of the neurons, lateral interactions, semi-supervised learning and the ability to represent high dimensional input space in lower dimensional maps. For each level of development the system is trained with the input data consisting of consecutive 3D body postures and tested with generalized input data that the system has never met before. The experimental results of different system level developments show that the system performs well with quite high accuracy for recognizing human actions.
summary: Recognizing and categorizing human actions is an important task with applications in various fields such as human-robot interaction, video analysis, surveillance, video retrieval, health care system and entertainment industry. This thesis presents a novel computational approach for human action recognition through different implementations of multi-layer architectures based on artificial neural networks. Each system level development is designed to solve different aspects of the action recognition problem including online real-time processing, action segmentation and the involvement of objects. The analysis of the experimental results are illustrated and described in six articles. The proposed action recognition architecture of this thesis is composed of several processing layers including a preprocessing layer, an ordered vector representation layer and three layers of neural networks. It utilizes self-organizing neural networks such as Kohonen feature maps and growing grids as the main neural network layers. Thus the architecture presents a biological plausible approach with certain features such as topographic organization of the neurons, lateral interactions, semi-supervised learning and the ability to represent high dimensional input space in lower dimensional maps. For each level of development the system is trained with the input data consisting of consecutive 3D body postures and tested with generalized input data that the system has never met before. The experimental results of different system level developments show that the system performs well with quite high accuracy for recognizing human actions.
abstract_zh: 识别和分类人类行为是一项重要的任务，广泛应用于人机交互、视频分析、监控、视频检索、医疗保健系统和娱乐行业等各个领域。本论文通过基于人工神经网络的多层架构的不同实现，提出了一种用于人类动作识别的新颖计算方法。每个系统级开发旨在解决动作识别问题的不同方面，包括在线实时处理、动作分割和对象的参与。实验结果的分析在六篇文章中进行了说明和描述。本文提出的动作识别架构由多个处理层组成，包括预处理层、有序向量表示层和三层神经网络。它利用自组织神经网络（例如 Kohonen 特征图和生长网格）作为主要神经网络层。因此，该架构提出了一种生物学上合理的方法，具有某些特征，例如神经元的拓扑组织、横向交互、半监督学习以及在低维映射中表示高维输入空间的能力。对于每个开发级别，系统都会使用由连续 3D 身体姿势组成的输入数据进行训练，并使用系统以前从未遇到过的通用输入数据进行测试。不同系统级别开发的实验结果表明，该系统在识别人类动作方面表现良好，具有相当高的准确度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于人工神经网络的多层架构方法，用于人类动作识别与分割。
AI.motivation: 动作识别在人机交互、视频分析、医疗系统等领域具有广泛应用，但现有方法在实时处理、动作分割及物体交互等方面仍存在挑战。
AI.method: 采用自组织神经网络（如Kohonen特征图和生长网格）构建包含预处理层、有序向量表示层及三层神经网络的架构，结合拓扑组织、侧向交互和半监督学习等生物启发机制。
AI.result: 实验表明，该系统在未见过的通用输入数据上实现了较高动作识别准确率，验证了不同系统层级开发的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的神经网络架构通过生物合理性设计，在动作识别任务中表现出优越性能，为复杂场景下的动作分析提供了新思路。

tldr: 本文提出了一种基于人工神经网络的多层架构方法，用于人类动作识别与分割。
motivation: 动作识别在人机交互、视频分析、医疗系统等领域具有广泛应用，但现有方法在实时处理、动作分割及物体交互等方面仍存在挑战。
method: 采用自组织神经网络（如Kohonen特征图和生长网格）构建包含预处理层、有序向量表示层及三层神经网络的架构，结合拓扑组织、侧向交互和半监督学习等生物启发机制。
result: 实验表明，该系统在未见过的通用输入数据上实现了较高动作识别准确率，验证了不同系统层级开发的有效性。
conclusion: 提出的神经网络架构通过生物合理性设计，在动作识别任务中表现出优越性能，为复杂场景下的动作分析提供了新思路。
search_text: Action in Mind: A Neural Network Approach to Action Recognition and Segmentation 心中的行动：动作识别和分割的神经网络方法 Recognizing and categorizing human actions is an important task with applications in various fields such as human-robot interaction, video analysis, surveillance, video retrieval, health care system and entertainment industry. This thesis presents a novel computational approach for human action recognition through different implementations of multi-layer architectures based on artificial neural networks. Each system level development is designed to solve different aspects of the action recognition problem including online real-time processing, action segmentation and the involvement of objects. The analysis of the experimental results are illustrated and described in six articles. The proposed action recognition architecture of this thesis is composed of several processing layers including a preprocessing layer, an ordered vector representation layer and three layers of neural networks. It utilizes self-organizing neural networks such as Kohonen feature maps and growing grids as the main neural network layers. Thus the architecture presents a biological plausible approach with certain features such as topographic organization of the neurons, lateral interactions, semi-supervised learning and the ability to represent high dimensional input space in lower dimensional maps. For each level of development the system is trained with the input data consisting of consecutive 3D body postures and tested with generalized input data that the system has never met before. The experimental results of different system level developments show that the system performs well with quite high accuracy for recognizing human actions. 识别和分类人类行为是一项重要的任务，广泛应用于人机交互、视频分析、监控、视频检索、医疗保健系统和娱乐行业等各个领域。本论文通过基于人工神经网络的多层架构的不同实现，提出了一种用于人类动作识别的新颖计算方法。每个系统级开发旨在解决动作识别问题的不同方面，包括在线实时处理、动作分割和对象的参与。实验结果的分析在六篇文章中进行了说明和描述。本文提出的动作识别架构由多个处理层组成，包括预处理层、有序向量表示层和三层神经网络。它利用自组织神经网络（例如 Kohonen 特征图和生长网格）作为主要神经网络层。因此，该架构提出了一种生物学上合理的方法，具有某些特征，例如神经元的拓扑组织、横向交互、半监督学习以及在低维映射中表示高维输入空间的能力。对于每个开发级别，系统都会使用由连续 3D 身体姿势组成的输入数据进行训练，并使用系统以前从未遇到过的通用输入数据进行测试。不同系统级别开发的实验结果表明，该系统在识别人类动作方面表现良好，具有相当高的准确度。 本文提出了一种基于人工神经网络的多层架构方法，用于人类动作识别与分割。 Zahra Gharaee cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.HC,cs.LG,cs.RO

authors_text: Onur Keleş,M. Akın Yılmaz,A. Murat Tekalp,Cansu Korkmaz,Zafer Dogan
title: On the Computation of PSNR for a Set of Images or Video
title_zh: 一组图像或视频的 PSNR 计算
comment: accepted for publication in Picture Coding Symposium (PCS) 2021
comments: accepted for publication in Picture Coding Symposium (PCS) 2021
abstract: When comparing learned image/video restoration and compression methods, it is common to report peak-signal to noise ratio (PSNR) results. However, there does not exist a generally agreed upon practice to compute PSNR for sets of images or video. Some authors report average of individual image/frame PSNR, which is equivalent to computing a single PSNR from the geometric mean of individual image/frame mean-square error (MSE). Others compute a single PSNR from the arithmetic mean of frame MSEs for each video. Furthermore, some compute the MSE/PSNR of Y-channel only, while others compute MSE/PSNR for RGB channels. This paper investigates different approaches to computing PSNR for sets of images, single video, and sets of video and the relation between them. We show the difference between computing the PSNR based on arithmetic vs. geometric mean of MSE depends on the distribution of MSE over the set of images or video, and that this distribution is task-dependent. In particular, these two methods yield larger differences in restoration problems, where the MSE is exponentially distributed and smaller differences in compression problems, where the MSE distribution is narrower. We hope this paper will motivate the community to clearly describe how they compute reported PSNR values to enable consistent comparison.
summary: When comparing learned image/video restoration and compression methods, it is common to report peak-signal to noise ratio (PSNR) results. However, there does not exist a generally agreed upon practice to compute PSNR for sets of images or video. Some authors report average of individual image/frame PSNR, which is equivalent to computing a single PSNR from the geometric mean of individual image/frame mean-square error (MSE). Others compute a single PSNR from the arithmetic mean of frame MSEs for each video. Furthermore, some compute the MSE/PSNR of Y-channel only, while others compute MSE/PSNR for RGB channels. This paper investigates different approaches to computing PSNR for sets of images, single video, and sets of video and the relation between them. We show the difference between computing the PSNR based on arithmetic vs. geometric mean of MSE depends on the distribution of MSE over the set of images or video, and that this distribution is task-dependent. In particular, these two methods yield larger differences in restoration problems, where the MSE is exponentially distributed and smaller differences in compression problems, where the MSE distribution is narrower. We hope this paper will motivate the community to clearly describe how they compute reported PSNR values to enable consistent comparison.
abstract_zh: 在比较学习的图像/视频恢复和压缩方法时，通常会报告峰值信噪比（PSNR）结果。然而，对于计算图像或视频集的 PSNR 并不存在普遍认可的做法。一些作者报告了单个图像/帧 PSNR 的平均值，这相当于根据单个图像/帧均方误差 (MSE) 的几何平均值计算单个 PSNR。其他人根据每个视频的帧 MSE 的算术平均值计算单个 PSNR。此外，有些仅计算 Y 通道的 MSE/PSNR，而其他则计算 RGB 通道的 MSE/PSNR。本文研究了计算图像集、单个视频和视频集的 PSNR 的不同方法以及它们之间的关系。我们展示了基于 MSE 的算术平均值与几何平均值计算 PSNR 之间的差异取决于 MSE 在图像或视频集上的分布，并且该分布与任务相关。特别是，这两种方法在恢复问题中产生较大差异（其中 MSE 呈指数分布），而在压缩问题中产生较小差异（其中 MSE 分布较窄）。我们希望本文能够激励社区清楚地描述他们如何计算报告的 PSNR 值，以实现一致的比较。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了针对图像集或视频计算PSNR的不同方法及其影响。
AI.motivation: 当前缺乏统一的PSNR计算标准，不同研究者采用平均PSNR或MSE均值等方法，导致结果可比性差。
AI.method: 分析了图像集/视频中基于算术均值与几何均值的MSE计算方法，以及Y通道与RGB通道对PSNR的影响。
AI.result: 算术均值与几何均值的PSNR差异取决于MSE分布，修复任务中差异较大，压缩任务中差异较小。
AI.conclusion: 呼吁研究者明确说明PSNR计算方式，以提升实验结果的可比性与一致性。
